| 11.431 | UI: data-import-wizard primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.449 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/data-import-wizard.tsx` ships `<DataImportWizard>` -- five-step wizard (upload -> map -> preview -> import -> done). File upload (with drag-and-drop), column mapping between source headers and target schema, validation preview with row-level error chips, batch import progress, and a final error report with per-row drill-down. API: `step?` (controlled) + `defaultStep?` (default 'upload') + `onStepChange`; `acceptedFileTypes?` (default ['.csv','.json','.xlsx']) + `uploadedFile?` + `onFileUpload(file)`; `sourceColumns?` + `targetColumns?: ImportColumn[]` (key/label/required?/description?); `mapping?` (controlled) + `defaultMapping?` + `onMappingChange`; `previewRows?: ImportRow[]` + `previewSummary?: { valid, invalid }`; `importProgress?` (0..1) + `isImporting?`; `errorRows?: ImportRow[]` + `successCount?` + `errorCount?`; `onImport` / `onRetry` / `onClose`; `labels?` (per-step + back/next/retry/close/importAction); `ariaLabel?` (default 'Data import wizard'). Steps render as a horizontal navigation strip with chevron markers, per-step `data-state` ('completed' | 'active' | 'pending'), and `aria-current="step"` on the active step. Upload step: drop zone (onDragOver highlights border + sets `data-dragging="true"`) + hidden `<input type="file">`; drop or change fires onFileUpload. Map step: table with one row per source column; each row exposes a `<select>` of target columns; '-- skip --' clears the mapping; required targets flagged with `*`; warning banner lists every missing required target. Preview step: optional summary chips + scrollable table with `data-row-status="valid"|"invalid"` per row. Import step: `<progressbar>` with aria-valuemin/max/now/text + spinning loader; clamps to `[0, 1]`. Done step: success/error count chips + per-error row chevron toggle revealing row values + every error entry; Retry/Close buttons each render only when callback supplied. Next gated per step: upload requires uploadedFile; map requires every required mapped; preview enabled only when valid > 0 (or no summary); import/done suppress Next. Back disabled on first step + while isImporting. Pure helpers exported: `IMPORT_WIZARD_STEPS` / `IMPORT_WIZARD_STEP_LABELS`; `getImportStepIndex(step)`; `getNextImportStep` / `getPrevImportStep` clamp at boundaries; `validateImportMapping(mapping, targetColumns)` returns `{ ok, missing }` (non-required never flagged); `isImportMappingComplete` delegate; `clampImportProgress` (NaN/neg/>1 guard); `formatImportProgressPercent` integer round. ARIA: region root + step strip role=navigation with aria-current; map select per-row aria-label; map warning role=alert; import progressbar role=progressbar; error toggle aria-expanded + aria-controls. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `data-import-wizard` / `-steps` / `-step` / `-step-marker` / `-step-label` / `-step-connector` / `-body` / `-upload` / `-upload-label` / `-upload-input` / `-upload-file` / `-map` / `-map-table` / `-map-row` / `-map-select` / `-map-error` / `-preview` / `-preview-summary` / `-preview-summary-valid` / `-preview-summary-invalid` / `-preview-rows` / `-preview-row` / `-import` / `-import-progress` / `-import-track` / `-import-fill` / `-import-label` / `-done` / `-done-summary` / `-done-success` / `-done-errors` / `-error-report` / `-error-row` / `-error-toggle` / `-error-detail` / `-error-values` / `-error-value` / `-error-list` / `-error-entry` / `-actions` / `-back` / `-next` / `-import-action` / `-retry` / `-close`; root mirrors data-step / data-step-index / data-mapping-complete / data-importing; per-step data-step + data-state; upload data-dragging; map row data-source; preview row data-row-index + data-row-status; error row data-row-index + data-expanded; progress wrapper data-progress). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 55 new test cases in data-import-wizard.test.tsx (2 step list constants + 1 getImportStepIndex + 4 next/prev + 4 validateImportMapping + 1 isImportMappingComplete + 4 clampImportProgress + 3 formatImportProgressPercent + 36 component); 55/55 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.432 | UI: api-response-viewer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.450 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/api-response-viewer.tsx` ships `<ApiResponseViewer>` -- HTTP response card with status badge, request method + URL, formatted JSON body tree with collapsible nodes + per-type syntax highlighting, and a "Copy as curl" affordance that writes a shell-ready curl command to the clipboard. API: `status?` + `statusText?`; `url?` + `method?` (default 'GET'); `requestHeaders?` + `responseHeaders?`; `body?` (JSON) + `rawBody?` (non-JSON) + `requestBody?` (for curl -d); `copyAsCurl?` (default true); `copyBody?` (default true); `defaultCollapsed?`; `maxInitialDepth?` (default 2); `ariaLabel?` (default 'API response'); `onCopy?`; `emptyBody?` (default 'No response body'); `durationMs?`. Header row renders (in order): status badge (colour-coded by 2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx/1xx/unknown), method chip, URL, duration chip, and two right-aligned action buttons ("curl" and "Copy"). JSON body renders through an internal recursive `JsonNode`: scalars get per-type colour classes (string -> success, number -> warning, boolean -> primary, null/undefined -> muted italic) and a `data-scalar-type` attribute; containers (object/array) expose a chevron toggle, collapsed-state summary ('N keys'/'N items'), and `data-expanded` attr. Each node opens by default up to `maxInitialDepth`; `defaultCollapsed` forces root closed by clamping the depth to 0. `rawBody` renders as `<pre>` block. Empty body renders the `emptyBody` slot. "Copy as curl" button calls `buildCurlCommand` and writes to `navigator.clipboard.writeText`. "Copy" button copies the pretty-printed JSON body (2-space indent). Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_API_VIEWER_MAX_INITIAL_DEPTH=2`; `getStatusCodeKind(status?)` -- maps ranges to info/success/redirect/client-error/server-error, out-of-band/undefined -> unknown; `getStatusCodeBadgeClass(kind)`; `getJsonNodeType(value)`; `formatJson(value, indent?)` -- cyclic fallback to String(); `buildCurlCommand(method?, url?, headers?, body?)` -- paste-safe with shell escaping of `"` and `\`, emits `-X` for non-GET, `-H` per header, `-d` for non-GET body; `copyToClipboard(text)` -- returns true on success, swallows rejection. ARIA: region root + aria-label; status badge + method chip; per-node toggle button `aria-expanded` + `aria-label`; copy buttons `aria-label="Copy as curl"` / `aria-label="Copy response body"`. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `api-response-viewer` / `-header` / `-status` / `-method` / `-url` / `-duration` / `-actions` / `-copy-curl` / `-copy-body` / `-headers` / `-header-row` / `-body` / `-tree` / `-node` / `-node-toggle` / `-node-key` / `-node-summary` / `-node-children` / `-node-child` / `-scalar` / `-raw` / `-body-empty`; root mirrors data-status / data-status-kind / data-method / data-has-body; container nodes mirror data-node-type + data-expanded; scalars mirror data-scalar-type; tree wrapper mirrors data-default-collapsed; child `<li>` mirrors data-key; response-header row mirrors data-header-name). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 51 new test cases in api-response-viewer.test.tsx (7 getStatusCodeKind + 1 getStatusCodeBadgeClass + 1 getJsonNodeType + 3 formatJson + 7 buildCurlCommand + 2 copyToClipboard + 1 constants + 29 component); 51/51 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.433 | UI: log-stream viewer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.451 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/log-stream.tsx` ships `<LogStream>` -- auto-scrolling log viewer. Each entry rendered with a level chip, time stamp, optional component/source tag, and a message body that is ANSI-color-parsed + search-highlighted. Level filters, free-text search, time-range pair, and pause/resume controls let adopters triage live streams without leaving the panel. API: `entries: LogEntry[]` (id/timestamp/level/message/component?/source?); `levels?` (default all 6); `enabledLevels?` (controlled) + `defaultEnabledLevels?` + `onEnabledLevelsChange`; `query?` (controlled) + `defaultQuery?` + `onQueryChange`; `isPaused?` (controlled) + `defaultPaused?` + `onPausedChange`; `timeRange?` (controlled) + `defaultTimeRange?` + `onTimeRangeChange`; `autoScroll?` (default true); `maxHeight?` (default 320); `ariaLabel?` (default 'Log stream'); `emptyState?` (default 'No log entries'); `showSearch?` / `showTimeRange?` / `showClear?` (default true/true/false); `onClear?`. The list scroll container auto-scrolls to bottom whenever the filtered entry count changes -- unless `isPaused` is true. We track lastLengthRef so adopters that re-render the array don't retrigger scroll on no-op rerender. Level chips are `role="switch"` + `aria-checked`; clicking toggles in the enabled set + fires onChange with the ordered subset (canonical = LOG_LEVELS). Search input filters on message + component + source (case-insensitive substring); matches wrapped in `<mark>` via highlightLogMatches. Time-range start + end are `<input type="datetime-local">` fields; clearing a field deletes the corresponding key. Pause button swaps aria-label between "Pause stream" / "Resume stream" + Pause/Play icons. Clear button opt-in via showClear + onClear. Pure helpers exported: `LOG_LEVELS = ['trace','debug','info','warn','error','fatal']`; `getLogLevelRank` / `getLogLevelClass`; `formatLogTimestamp(value)` -- HH:MM:SS.cs, empty for falsy/unparseable, accepts Date/number/string; `inLogTimeRange(ts, range?)` -- undefined / start / end / both bounds; `filterLogEntries(entries, { enabledLevels?, query?, timeRange? })` -- combines all three; `parseAnsi(input): AnsiSegment[]` -- consumes 30..37 / 40..47 / 90..97 / 100..107 (fg/bg standard + bright), 1/2/3/4 (bold/dim/italic/underline), 22/23/24 (resets), 39/49 (fg/bg resets), 0 / bare ESC[m (full reset); unknown codes are no-ops so parser never throws; `highlightLogMatches(text, query?)` -- regex-special-escaped, case-insensitive. ARIA: region root + aria-label; level toggle role=switch + aria-checked; search aria-label="Filter log entries"; time range inputs aria-label; pause aria-label swaps; clear aria-label. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `log-stream` / `-controls` / `-level-filter` / `-level-toggle` / `-search` / `-search-input` / `-time-range` / `-time-range-start-label` / `-time-range-start` / `-time-range-end-label` / `-time-range-end` / `-pause` / `-clear` / `-list` / `-empty` / `-entries` / `-entry` / `-entry-time` / `-entry-level` / `-entry-component` / `-entry-message` / `-entry-segment` / `-entry-source` / `-mark`; root mirrors data-paused / -entry-count / -filtered-count / -auto-scroll; level toggle mirrors data-level / -enabled; entry mirrors data-entry-id / -level). forwardRef forwarded to the list scroll container. 54 new test cases in log-stream.test.tsx (1 LOG_LEVELS + 1 getLogLevelRank + 1 getLogLevelClass + 3 formatLogTimestamp + 4 inLogTimeRange + 5 filterLogEntries + 8 parseAnsi + 3 highlightLogMatches + 28 component); 54/54 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): server-side log subscription (host owns fetch/SSE/WebSocket and passes entries), virtualisation for very long streams (host wraps in `<VirtualizedList>` past a few thousand entries), color-256 / truecolor ANSI parsing (only standard 16-color palette; truecolor sequences parse as resets), persisting filter state across reloads (host owns persistence via controlled props). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-log-stream. Worker auto-w415. Bump 1.11.451. |
| 11.434 | UI: env-badge primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.452 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/env-badge.tsx` ships `<EnvBadge>` -- environment indicator chip (production/staging/development/preview/test/local) with color-coded kind class, optional click-to-switch popover that lists available environments, and a sub-component `EnvBadge.Banner` that ships a full-width strip suitable for the top of the app chrome (`role="banner"`). API: `env: string`; `label?` overrides resolved label; `description?`; `options?: EnvBadgeOption[]` (env/label?/description?) + `onSwitch(env)`; `size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'` (default 'md'); `ariaLabel?`; `icon?` overrides default per-kind icon; `showLabel?` (default true). `EnvBadge.Banner` extends with `bannerClassName?` + `align?: 'left'|'center'|'right'` (default 'left'). Chip renders with resolved env label, per-kind icon, per-kind color class. Becomes interactive when both `options` and `onSwitch` are supplied: chip becomes `<button>` with `aria-haspopup="listbox"` + `aria-expanded`; clicking opens listbox of configured environments. Listbox options `role="option"` + `aria-selected` mirror current env; clicking fires `onSwitch(env)` and closes the popover. Escape + outside mousedown close. `description` renders inline (non-interactive only; interactive flows surface descriptions inside per-option rows). `EnvBadge.Banner` wraps chip in full-width `role="banner"` strip with per-kind background class and optional inline description. Pure helpers exported: `ENV_KINDS = ['production','staging','development','preview','test','local','unknown']`; `getEnvKind(env)` -- aliases common spellings: production (prod/live/release), staging (stage/uat/qa), development (dev), preview (pr), test (testing/ci), local (localhost); trims + case-insensitive; unknown -> 'unknown'; `getEnvLabel(env)` -> human label; `getEnvBadgeClass` / `getEnvBannerClass` -> Tailwind class for resolved kind; `isProductionEnv(env)` -- gate destructive UI on prod. ARIA: root `role="status"` + aria-label (default "<Label> environment"); interactive trigger `aria-haspopup="listbox"` + `aria-expanded`; popover `role="listbox"` + aria-label; per-option `role="option"` + `aria-selected`; banner `role="banner"` + aria-label (default "<Label> environment banner"). Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `env-badge` / `-icon` / `-label` / `-trigger` / `-description` / `-popover` / `-option` / `-option-icon` / `-option-label` / `-option-description` / `env-banner` / `env-banner-description`; root mirrors `data-env` (raw) + `data-env-kind` (resolved) + `data-size` + `data-interactive` + `data-open`; per-option mirrors `data-env` + `data-env-kind` + `data-current`; banner mirrors `data-env` + `data-env-kind` + `data-align`). forwardRef forwarded to root region (badge) and banner root respectively. 47 new test cases in env-badge.test.tsx (1 ENV_KINDS + 5 getEnvKind + 2 getEnvLabel + 2 getEnvBadgeClass/getEnvBannerClass + 2 isProductionEnv + 26 EnvBadge component + 9 EnvBanner sub-component); 47/47 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.435 | UI: user-card primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.453 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/user-card.tsx` ships `<UserCard>` -- avatar + name + role display with an opt-in hover-card popover that shows an extended profile (bio, email, location, joined-at, link list). Name row exposes an online-status dot in the bottom-right of the avatar. Both the inline chip and the popover are keyboard-reachable + screen-reader-accessible. API: `name` (required); `role?`; `avatarSrc?` + `avatarAlt?`; `status?: 'online'|'away'|'busy'|'offline'|'unknown'` (default 'unknown') + `statusLabel?`; `profile?: { email?, bio?, location?, joinedAt?, links? }`; `open?` (controlled) + `defaultOpen?` + `onOpenChange`; `hoverDelay?` (default 150ms); `size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'` (default 'md'); `href?` + `onClick?`; `showRole?` / `showStatus?` / `showHoverCard?` (all default true); `ariaLabel?`. Avatar renders either avatarSrc or fallback chip with user initials (computed from first + last word of name). Status dot anchors to bottom-right with `ring-2 ring-card` outline; carries `aria-label="Status: <Label>"`. Trigger swaps between `<span>` (default), `<button>` (onClick only) or `<a>` (href) so adopters can drop the chip into different call sites without changing structure. Hover-card popover opens on mouse-enter/focus + closes on mouse-leave/blur with symmetric `hoverDelay`; re-entering trigger or popover cancels close timer so it doesn't flicker. Controlled `open` always wins. Popover renders only when `profile` supplied + `showHoverCard=true`. Popover content: header (avatar + name + role + status label), optional bio paragraph, detail list (email/location/joined-at) with per-row icons, optional link list with external-link hint (target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer for external:true). Email link uses mailto:. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_USER_CARD_HOVER_DELAY=150`; `getInitials(name)` -- empty for empty / first char for single word / first+last for multi-word / whitespace collapse; `getStatusLabel` / `getStatusDotClass` per status; `formatJoinedDate(value)` -- YYYY-MM-DD or empty for falsy/unparseable, accepts Date/number/string. ARIA: region root + aria-label="<name> card"; trigger aria-describedby points at popover id when hover card enabled; status dot aria-label="Status: <Label>"; popover role=tooltip + id="user-card-popover-<name-with-dashes>" + aria-label="<name> profile". Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `user-card` / `-trigger` / `-avatar-wrapper` / `-avatar` / `-avatar-fallback` / `-status-dot` / `-text` / `-name` / `-role` / `-popover` / `-popover-header` / `-popover-avatar-wrapper` / `-popover-avatar` / `-popover-avatar-fallback` / `-popover-status-dot` / `-popover-name` / `-popover-role` / `-popover-status-label` / `-popover-bio` / `-popover-details` / `-popover-email` / `-popover-location` / `-popover-joined` / `-popover-links` / `-popover-link`; root mirrors `data-status` / -size / -open / -interactive; status dots mirror `data-status`). forwardRef forwarded to the root region. 42 new test cases in user-card.test.tsx (5 getInitials + 1 getStatusLabel + 1 getStatusDotClass + 4 formatJoinedDate + 1 constants + 30 component); fake-timer driven hover tests verify open-on-enter / close-on-leave + symmetric delay; 42/42 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. | 11.436 | UI: kbd-shortcut-recorder primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.454 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/kbd-shortcut-recorder.tsx` ships `<KbdShortcutRecorder>` -- input-like surface that records the next key combo the user types while focused. Recorded combo renders as a row of `<kbd>` pills using the platform-aware formatter from `<KeyboardShortcutsOverlay>` (11.429). Reset button clears binding back to a configurable `resetValue` (default ''). Optional `collisions` array + `onCollision` callback let hosts surface conflicts with existing bindings before commit. API: `value?` (controlled) + `defaultValue?` + `onChange` + `onRecord`; `collisions?: readonly string[]` + `onCollision(value, collidesWith)`; `platform?: KeyboardPlatform` (default 'auto'); `placeholder?`; `disabled?`; `showReset?` (default true) + `resetValue?` (default ''); `recordOnFocus?` (default true); `helperText?` + `errorText?`; `showIcon?` (default true); `ariaLabel?`. Renders as `<button role="textbox" aria-readonly>` so SRs announce as read-only text input while the underlying element stays keyboard-reachable + click-toggleable. Focus toggles recording (default `recordOnFocus=true`); blur stops; click toggles independently of focus. Escape cancels without commit. Bare modifier presses are swallowed -- shortcut needs a non-modifier key. Recorded combos canonical-ordered: modifier tokens forced into `mod > ctrl > alt > shift` order and lowercased; non-modifier key preserves original casing (`Enter`, `F5`, `ArrowUp`). Aliases collapse: cmd/meta -> mod, option/opt -> alt, control -> ctrl. Collision detection compares in canonical form so `shift+mod+k` and `mod+shift+k` are detected; commit blocked + `onCollision(value, collidesWith)` fires. role=alert banner renders below the input when current rendered value collides. Reset button (right of input) clears back to resetValue; hidden when empty or showReset=false. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_KBD_RECORDER_RESET=''`; `normalizeShortcutOrder(tokens)` -- lowercases + reorders modifiers; preserves key casing; collapses aliases; `recordShortcutFromEvent(event, platform?)` -- drops bare-modifier presses + non-mappable exotic keys; recognises every key.length=1 plus arrows/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown/Tab/Enter/Escape/Space/Backspace/Delete/F1..F12; `hasShortcutCollision(value, collisions)` returns matching collision string or null; `formatRecordedShortcut(value, platform?)` delegates to the v1.11.447 `formatShortcut` helper. ARIA: group root + aria-label; input role=textbox + aria-readonly + aria-disabled; error role=alert; reset aria-label="Reset shortcut". Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `kbd-shortcut-recorder` / `-row` / `-input` / `-icon` / `-keys` / `-key` / `-placeholder` / `-reset` / `-error` / `-helper`; root mirrors `data-recording` / `data-disabled` / `data-empty` / `data-has-collision`). forwardRef forwarded to input button. 47 new test cases in kbd-shortcut-recorder.test.tsx (6 normalizeShortcutOrder + 9 recordShortcutFromEvent + 4 hasShortcutCollision + 2 formatRecordedShortcut + 1 constants + 25 component); 47/47 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-action conflict resolution (host owns collisions set + decides whether to surface prompt), multi-binding capture (host wraps several recorders for multi-bind actions), persisting bindings across reloads (host owns storage), editing non-keyboard chord primitives like `mouse:left+drag` (keyboard-only by design). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-kbd-recorder. Worker auto-w418. Bump 1.11.454. |
| 11.437 | UI: text-diff primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.455 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/text-diff.tsx` ships `<TextDiff>` -- word-level inline diff with add/remove highlights and an opt-in line-by-line mode. "Copy unified diff" affordance writes a standard `--- a / +++ b / @@ ...` patch to the clipboard so adopters can paste into their review tool of choice. API: `before` + `after` (required); `mode?: 'inline-word'|'line'` (controlled) + `defaultMode?` (default 'inline-word') + `onModeChange`; `showCopyDiff?` (default true) + `onCopyDiff`; `ariaLabel?` (default 'Text diff'); `beforeLabel?` (default 'a') + `afterLabel?` (default 'b'); `contextLines?` (default 3). Inline mode renders the diff as a flat run of `<span>` tokens with per-token classes: green-with-bg for inserts, red-with-bg-and-strikethrough for deletes, plain text for equals; each token carries `data-token-type`. Line mode renders a numbered list of `<li>` rows with leading sign column (`+`/`-`/space), before-line number column, after-line number column, and per-line text body; insert/delete rows colour-coded. Mode toggle is a segmented control (role=radiogroup of two role=radio buttons). Toolbar summary chips show `+<insertCount>`/`-<deleteCount>` derived from word-level ops. Copy button writes `toUnifiedDiff` result to `navigator.clipboard` and fires `onCopyDiff`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_TEXT_DIFF_MODE='inline-word'` / `DEFAULT_TEXT_DIFF_CONTEXT_LINES=3`; `tokenizeWords(text)` -- splits on whitespace + keeps separators so rendered diff preserves spacing; `diffWords(before, after)` -- generic LCS over word tokens; `diffLines(before, after)` -- generic LCS over lines + attaches beforeLine/afterLine cursors per op; `toUnifiedDiff(before, after, { beforeLabel?, afterLabel?, contextLines? })` -- standard `---/+++` patch header + per-hunk `@@ -m,n +m,n @@` ranges + per-line +/-/space signs; identical inputs return just the headers (no hunks); `copyTextToClipboard(text)` -- swallows rejection. ARIA: region root + aria-label; mode toggle role=radiogroup + aria-checked per-button; copy aria-label="Copy unified diff". Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `text-diff` / `-toolbar` / `-mode-toggle` / `-mode-inline` / `-mode-line` / `-summary` / `-summary-insert` / `-summary-delete` / `-copy` / `-inline` / `-token` / `-lines` / `-line` / `-line-sign` / `-line-number` / `-line-number-after` / `-line-text`; root mirrors `data-mode` / `data-insert-count` / `data-delete-count`; inline tokens mirror `data-token-type`; line rows mirror `data-line-type` / `data-before-line` / `data-after-line`; mode buttons mirror `data-active`). forwardRef forwarded to the root. 39 new test cases in text-diff.test.tsx (3 tokenizeWords + 6 diffWords + 2 diffLines + 4 toUnifiedDiff + 2 copyTextToClipboard + 2 constants + 20 component); 39/39 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-character diff (host wraps with custom tokenizer for per-glyph granularity), three-way merge / conflict markers (host wraps with merge-specific primitive), syntax-aware highlighting inside diff body (host composes with code editor), patch application (host reads `toUnifiedDiff` output + ships its own apply/revert). | 11.438 | UI: chart-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.456 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartBar>` -- pure-SVG bar chart with horizontal + vertical orientations, per-bar color slot, axis labels, opt-in hover tooltip, and CSS-driven mount animation. API: `data: readonly ChartBarSeries[]` (id/label/value/color?); `orientation?: 'horizontal'|'vertical'` (default 'vertical'); `width?` (default 480) + `height?` (default 280) + `padding?` (default 32); `axisLabel?: { x?, y? }`; `formatValue?: (n) => string`; `showGrid?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `animate?` (all default true); `ariaLabel?` (default 'Bar chart'); `onBarClick?(series)`; `tickCount?` (default 4); `maxOverride?`. Renders `<svg>` with configurable viewBox; bars are per-series `<g>` groups containing `<rect>` + `<text>` axis label. Vertical: bar height scales to value, category labels beneath x-axis; horizontal: bar width scales, category labels left of y-axis. Grid lines + tick labels at every tick value (default 5 including 0 and max). Per-series `color` overrides default palette color (`DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_PALETTE`) picked by series index. Hover/focus on a bar shows absolutely-positioned tooltip with label + formatted value; mouse-leave/blur hides; `showTooltip=false` suppresses tooltip layer. `animate=true` applies `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` so fade-in honours `prefers-reduced-motion`. `onBarClick` makes each bar clickable + focusable. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_WIDTH=480` / `DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_HEIGHT=280` / `DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_PADDING=32` / `DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_TICK_COUNT=4` / `DEFAULT_CHART_BAR_PALETTE` (8-color palette); `getDefaultBarColor(index)` cycles through palette (NaN/negative -> palette[0]); `getChartBarMax(data, override?)` returns highest positive value (floors at 1 when no positive values; non-finite ignored; override wins); `getChartBarScale(max, length)` -- pure linear mapping; non-finite/negative input -> 0; safe defaults for zero max/length; `formatChartBarTick(value, formatter?)` -- integer pass-through; trims float trailing zeros (2dp); formatter override fully controls label; NaN -> '0'; `getChartBarTicks(max, count?)` returns count+1 evenly-spaced ticks; safe for max=0 / negative count. ARIA: region `role="region"` + aria-label; svg `role="img"` + aria-label; bars `role="graphics-symbol"` + `aria-label="<label>: <value>"` + tabIndex=0; tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-bar` / `-svg` / `-axis-x` / `-axis-y` / `-grid` / `-tick-label` / `-bar` / `-rect` / `-label` / `-tooltip` / `-tooltip-label` / `-tooltip-value` / `-axis-x-label` / `-axis-y-label`; root mirrors `data-orientation` / `data-bar-count` / `data-animate`; bars mirror `data-bar-id` + `data-hovered`; grid lines mirror `data-tick-value`). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 47 new test cases in chart-bar.test.tsx (2 getDefaultBarColor + 4 getChartBarMax + 3 getChartBarScale + 4 formatChartBarTick + 3 getChartBarTicks + 2 constants + 29 component); 47/47 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): multi-series / stacked / grouped bars (single-series by design; host composes multiple instances), server-side data subscription (host owns network + passes refreshed data), pixel-perfect tick algorithms like d3-scale's `nice()` (built-in ticks divide max into even slices), pan / zoom (host wraps with `<ScrollArea>`). | 11.439 | UI: chart-line primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.457 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line.tsx` ships `<ChartLine>` -- pure-SVG line chart with axis grid, hover dot indicator, multi-series support, smooth-curve toggle, and null-aware gap handling so missing data points break the line cleanly instead of being interpolated through. API: `series: ChartLineSeries[]` (id/label/data/color?); each data point has `{ x: number, y: number | null }`; `width?` (default 520) + `height?` (default 280) + `padding?` (default 36); `axisLabel?: { x?, y? }`; `smooth?` (default false); `showGrid?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `animate?` (all default true except showDots default false); `formatX?` + `formatY?`; `tickCount?` (default 4); `xDomain?` / `yDomain?`. Computes bounds from non-null data points; empty falls back to (0,1); single point expands by +1; explicit domain overrides win. Linear scales map data->pixel via `getLinearScale`; null y excluded from rendered line (visible gap). Multi-series: each entry renders its own path; default color from shared 8-color palette re-exported as `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PALETTE` so `<ChartLine>` and `<ChartBar>` stay visually consistent. `smooth=true` builds Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-bezier path; `smooth=false` renders `M/L` polyline. `showDots=true` renders `<circle>` at every non-null data point. Hover layer: mousemove resolves fractional x position back to data-space, picks nearest point per series via `findNearestPointIndex`, renders vertical rule + per-series hover dots. Tooltip overlay lists per-series row (color swatch + label + formatted value or 'n/a' when null). `showTooltip=false` / `showGrid=false` / `showAxisTicks=false` opt-outs each shed their respective layers. `animate=true` applies `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` so reduced-motion users do not see mount animation. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_WIDTH=520` / `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_HEIGHT=280` / `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PADDING=36` / `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_TICK_COUNT=4` / `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PALETTE` (re-exported); `getChartLineBounds(series, xDomain?, yDomain?)`; `getLinearScale(min, max, length)` -- NaN -> 0, zero-range collapses to unit scale; `buildLinePath(points, smooth?)` -- splits into runs of consecutive non-null points + emits separate sub-paths per run; all-null returns empty; single-point smooth emits move-to; two-point smooth degrades to straight; `findNearestPointIndex(data, xValue)` -- smallest |dx| with non-finite skipped; `getChartLineTicks` / `formatChartLineTick`. ARIA: region root + role=img svg; per-series path `role="graphics-symbol"` + aria-label=<series.label>; tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-line` / `-svg` / `-axis-x` / `-axis-y` / `-grid-y` / `-grid-x` / `-tick-y` / `-tick-x` / `-series` / `-path` / `-dot` / `-hover-layer` / `-hover-rule` / `-hover-dot` / `-tooltip` / `-tooltip-row` / `-tooltip-swatch` / `-tooltip-label` / `-tooltip-value` / `-axis-x-label` / `-axis-y-label`; root mirrors `data-series-count` / `data-smooth` / `data-animate`; series mirror `data-series-id` + `data-series-color`; hover dots + tooltip rows mirror `data-series-id`; grid mirrors `data-tick-value`). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 52 new test cases in chart-line.test.tsx (5 getChartLineBounds + 4 getLinearScale + 7 buildLinePath + 2 findNearestPointIndex + 3 getChartLineTicks + 4 formatChartLineTick + 1 constants + 26 component); 52/52 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): area fill / stacked area variants (host wraps with path overlay), annotation lines / band highlights (host adds custom SVG children), brush / range select (host wraps in brush primitive), tick algorithms like d3-scale's `nice()` (built-in ticks divide range evenly). | 11.440 | UI: chart-pie primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.458 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-pie.tsx` ships `<ChartPie>` -- pure-SVG pie / donut chart. Hovering a slice expands it outward by a small offset, a legend lists every slice with its color + percentage, optional per-slice percent labels sit on top of the arc, and the donut variant renders a configurable total readout in the centre. The root carries an `aria-describedby` reference to a visually-hidden text region that summarises every slice for screen readers. API: `data: readonly ChartPieSlice[]` (id/label/value/color?); `width?` (default 320) + `height?` (default 240); `innerRadius?` (>0 -> donut) + `outerRadius?` (auto-fit when omitted); `showLegend?` (default true) + `showPercentLabels?` (default false) + `showTotal?` (default true); `totalLabel?`; `formatValue?` + `formatPercent?`; `animate?` (default true); `ariaLabel?` (default 'Pie chart') + `ariaDescription?`; `onSliceClick(slice)`; `startAngle?` (radians; default -PI/2); `hoverExpand?` (default 6 px); `legendPlacement?: 'right'|'bottom'`; `legendFormat?`; `emptyState?` (default 'No data'). Computes percent + arc range per slice from a positive total; non-positive / NaN values dropped before layout. Slices start at `startAngle` and sweep clockwise. Hover expands the active slice by `hoverExpand` (recomputes arc with larger outer radius); mouse-leave/blur collapses. Donut mode kicks in when `innerRadius>0`: pie wedge `M/L/A/Z`; donut annular segment `M/A/L/A/Z`. Donut centre readout: total formatted via `formatValue` sits at geometric centre with optional `totalLabel` below. Legend renders one row per slice with color swatch + label + percent; `legendFormat` overrides the body. ARIA description rendered as `sr-only <p>` alongside the SVG; `ariaDescription` override replaces default comma-joined summary. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_PIE_WIDTH=320` / `DEFAULT_CHART_PIE_HEIGHT=240` / `DEFAULT_CHART_PIE_HOVER_EXPAND=6`; `getPieTotal(data)` -- sums positive finite values (NaN/Infinity/negatives dropped); `computePieSlices(data, startAngle?)` -- returns ComputedSlice per entry with startAngle/endAngle/midAngle/percent/value; empty/zero-total -> empty array; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)`; `arcPath(cx, cy, innerR, outerR, startAngle, endAngle)` -- handles pie wedges + annular segments + full-circle/annulus split into two semicircles; `formatPiePercent(percent, formatter?)` -- one decimal under 10%, zero decimals at/above 10%, 100% at >= 99.95. ARIA: region root + aria-label + aria-describedby; svg role=img + aria-label; per-slice group `role="graphics-symbol"` + `aria-label="<label>: <percent>"` + tabIndex=0. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-pie` / `-canvas` / `-svg` / `-aria-desc` / `-empty` / `-slice` / `-arc` / `-label` / `-center` / `-center-total` / `-center-label` / `-legend` / `-legend-item` / `-legend-swatch` / `-legend-label` / `-legend-percent`; root mirrors `data-slice-count` / `data-donut` / `data-animate`; slices mirror `data-slice-id` + `data-hovered`; legend rows mirror `data-slice-id`; legend wrapper mirrors `data-placement`). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 53 new test cases in chart-pie.test.tsx (3 getPieTotal + 6 computePieSlices + 2 polarToCartesian + 4 arcPath + 5 formatPiePercent + 1 constants + 32 component); 53/53 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): nested/sunburst hierarchies (host wraps multi-ring layer), slice connector lines for outside labels (host adds custom SVG children), 3D shading (intentionally flat vector for accessibility + legibility), animated slice rotation beyond mount fade (host wraps in motion primitive). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-chart-pie. Worker auto-w422. Bump 1.11.458. |
| 11.441 | UI: chart-area primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.459 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-area.tsx` ships `<ChartArea>` -- pure-SVG area chart with multi-series support, an `overlaid` (each series fills from baseline 0) and `stacked` (cumulative-sum baseline) mode toggle, hover tooltip listing every series at the cursor, axis grid + optional tick labels, and a smooth-curve toggle. API: `series: ChartAreaSeries[]` (id/label/data/color?); each data point has `{x, y}`; `mode?: 'overlaid'|'stacked'` (default 'overlaid'); `width?` (default 520) + `height?` (default 280) + `padding?` (default 36); `axisLabel?: { x?, y? }`; `smooth?` (default false); `showGrid?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showLines?` / `animate?` (all default true); `fillOpacity?` (default 0.35); `formatX?` + `formatY?`; `tickCount?` (default 4); `xDomain?` / `yDomain?`. `buildAreaStack` reshapes the input series for the configured mode: overlaid -> y0=0+y1=value per point; stacked -> cumulative baseline tracked per-x (each series stacks on top of the previous, negatives clamp to 0 so cumulative sums never regress). Bounds derive from the stacked top: overlaid uses single-series max, stacked uses cumulative top. `smooth=true` builds the top edge via Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-bezier; smooth=false renders M/L polyline. Bottom edge always traces back along per-point baseline (y0). `showLines=true` (default) draws top edge as a separate stroke path; showLines=false removes the stroke. Hover: mousemove resolves cursor's fractional x position back to data-space, picks nearest point per series via `findNearestAreaIndex`, renders vertical rule + per-series hover dot. Tooltip overlay lists each series at the hovered x with color swatch + label + formatted value. animate=true applies `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per series group. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_WIDTH=520` / `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_HEIGHT=280` / `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_PADDING=36` / `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_TICK_COUNT=4` / `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_FILL_OPACITY=0.35` / `DEFAULT_CHART_AREA_MODE='overlaid'`; `buildAreaStack(series, mode)` -- NaN -> 0; stacked negatives clamp to 0; `getChartAreaBounds(stack, xDomain?, yDomain?)` -- yMin=0 by default (yDomain wins); empty -> (0,1); single-x -> xMin+1; `buildAreaPath(points, smooth?)` -- closed shape: top edge L->R + bottom edge R->L + Z; single-point renders degenerate vertical so path stays valid; `findNearestAreaIndex(data, xValue)` -- smallest |dx|, non-finite skipped. Re-uses `getLinearScale` + `getChartLineTicks` + `formatChartLineTick` from v1.11.457 `<ChartLine>` so axis behaviour stays in lock-step. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + per-series path role=graphics-symbol + aria-label. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-area` / `-svg` / `-axis-x` / `-axis-y` / `-grid-y` / `-grid-x` / `-tick-y` / `-tick-x` / `-series` / `-fill` / `-line` / `-hover-layer` / `-hover-rule` / `-hover-dot` / `-tooltip` / `-tooltip-row` / `-tooltip-swatch` / `-tooltip-label` / `-tooltip-value` / `-axis-x-label` / `-axis-y-label`; root mirrors data-mode / -series-count / -smooth / -animate; series groups mirror data-series-id + data-series-color; hover dots + tooltip rows mirror data-series-id; grid mirrors data-tick-value). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 44 new test cases in chart-area.test.tsx (5 buildAreaStack + 5 getChartAreaBounds + 4 buildAreaPath + 2 findNearestAreaIndex + 2 constants + 26 component); 44/44 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): stream/streamgraph ordering (host wraps with custom layout), annotation lines / band highlights (host adds custom SVG children), brush / range select (host wraps in brush primitive), tick algorithms like d3-scale's `nice()` (built-in ticks divide range evenly). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-chart-area. Worker auto-w423. Bump 1.11.459. |
| 11.442 | UI: chart-heatmap primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.460 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-heatmap.tsx` ships `<ChartHeatmap>` -- calendar-style heatmap (GitHub-contributions layout). Each column is an ISO week; each row is a day-of-week starting at the configured `weekStartsOn`. Cells are coloured along a 5-step quantile scale (no-data / q1 / q2 / q3 / q4) so adopters can read intensity at a glance. Day-hover shows a tooltip and an optional click handler exposes the resolved `Date` + cell payload. API: `data: readonly ChartHeatmapCell[]` (date/value/label?); `startDate?` / `endDate?` (derives from min/max date in data when omitted); `cellSize?` (default 12) + `cellGap?` (default 2); `colorScale?` (default GitHub greens, 5 tiers) + `emptyColor?` (default translucent grey); `showWeekdayLabels?` / `showMonthLabels?` / `showLegend?` (all default true); `formatValue?` + `formatDate?`; `onCellClick(cell)`; `ariaLabel?` (default 'Activity heatmap'); `weekStartsOn?: 0 | 1` (default 0 Sun); `legendLowLabel?` / `legendHighLabel?` (default 'Less' / 'More'). `getHeatmapWeeks` walks every ISO week from `startOfWeek(startDate)` to `startOfWeek(endDate)` and emits one column per week with 7 cells per row; cells outside the requested range are `null` so column shape stays stable. Cells colour by quantile via `getHeatmapBucket(value, max, scale.length - 1)`; zero/negative map to bucket 0 (empty colour). Hover flips `data-hovered`, highlights the cell border, opens a tooltip with formatted date + value (or `label` when supplied). `onCellClick` fires with the resolved cell. Month labels emit at the first column where the month changes; weekday labels render in a thin gutter to the left of the grid; both opt-out via flags. All date math runs in UTC so cells never drift across DST / timezones. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_HEATMAP_CELL_SIZE=12` / `DEFAULT_HEATMAP_CELL_GAP=2` / `DEFAULT_HEATMAP_EMPTY_COLOR` / `DEFAULT_HEATMAP_COLOR_SCALE` (5 GitHub greens); `formatIsoDate(value)` accepts Date/string/number; unparseable -> ''; `bucketHeatmapData(data)`; `getHeatmapMax`; `getHeatmapBucket(value, max, bucketCount?)` -- non-finite/non-positive -> 0; `getHeatmapColor(value, max, scale?)` -- bucket count derives from scale.length - 1; `getHeatmapWeeks(data, options?)` -- explicit start/end overrides, weekStartsOn 0|1, out-of-range cells null. ARIA: region root + role=img svg; per-cell `<rect>` role=graphics-symbol + aria-label="<date>: <value>" + tabIndex=0; tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-heatmap` / `-svg` / `-month` / `-weekday` / `-cell` / `-legend` / `-legend-low` / `-legend-swatch` / `-legend-high` / `-tooltip` / `-tooltip-date` / `-tooltip-value`; root mirrors `data-cell-count` / `data-week-count` / `data-week-starts-on`; cells mirror `data-iso` + `data-bucket` + `data-value` + `data-hovered`; legend swatches mirror `data-bucket`; tooltip mirrors `data-iso`). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 50 new test cases in chart-heatmap.test.tsx (3 formatIsoDate + 2 bucketHeatmapData + 3 getHeatmapMax + 3 getHeatmapBucket + 3 getHeatmapColor + 6 getHeatmapWeeks + 3 constants + 27 component); 50/50 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): multiple-year heatmaps as a single grid (host wraps per-year instances side by side), range selection / brush (host wraps in brush primitive), server-side data subscription (host owns network), per-cell custom shapes (rounded squares; host composes with custom SVG layer for other markers). | 11.443 | UI: chart-sparkline primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.461 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-sparkline.tsx` ships `<ChartSparkline>` -- minimal inline trend line for table cells / stat cards. Pure SVG, no axes, no tooltip layer. Optional area fill, last-point dot, and high/low markers. Accessible name configurable (default 'Trend'); auto-generated description summarises first/last/min/max for screen readers. API: `data: readonly number[]`; `width?` (default 80) + `height?` (default 24); `color?` (default '#3b82f6'); `fill?` (default false) + `fillOpacity?` (default 0.2); `strokeWidth?` (default 1.5); `showLastDot?` / `showHighLow?` / `smooth?` (all default false); `ariaLabel?` (default 'Trend') + `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `baseline?` (area-fill baseline in data-space). Renders `<span role="img">` with inline SVG sized to width x height; collapses to inline-flow context so adopters drop the chart inside `<td>` / `<span>` / stat-card slots without breaking layout. Auto-generated ARIA description: 'Trend from <first> to <last>, min <min>, max <max>.' with `formatValue` shaping numbers. smooth=true uses Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-bezier; <3 points degrades to straight M/L polyline. fill=true paints closed area below the line; baseline defaults to bottom of chart; data-space baseline override available. showLastDot renders final-point dot; showHighLow renders high+low markers (low suppressed when high and low resolve to same index, e.g. constant series). Empty data -> empty SVG + 'No data' description. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_SPARKLINE_WIDTH=80` / `DEFAULT_SPARKLINE_HEIGHT=24` / `DEFAULT_SPARKLINE_STROKE_WIDTH=1.5` / `DEFAULT_SPARKLINE_FILL_OPACITY=0.2` / `DEFAULT_SPARKLINE_COLOR='#3b82f6'`; `getSparklineBounds(data)` -- constant series expands by +/-0.5 so line stays visible; empty / non-finite -> (0,1); `getSparklinePoints(data, width, height, bounds?)` -- single point snaps to centre; `buildSparklinePath(points, smooth?)` + `buildSparklineAreaPath(points, baselineY, smooth?)` -- share Catmull-Rom smoother; area closes with Z; `findSparklineExtremes(data)` -- skips non-finite, returns first index achieving extreme (deterministic). ARIA: span role=img + aria-label; sr-only description with auto-summary; svg aria-hidden=true (decorative; role lives on root span). Data attrs throughout (data-section per node: `chart-sparkline` / `-aria-desc` / `-svg` / `-area` / `-line` / `-high` / `-low` / `-last`; root mirrors `data-point-count` / `data-fill` / `data-smooth`; high/low/last circles mirror `data-index`). forwardRef forwarded to root span. 38 new test cases in chart-sparkline.test.tsx (4 getSparklineBounds + 4 getSparklinePoints + 4 buildSparklinePath + 2 buildSparklineAreaPath + 3 findSparklineExtremes + 1 constants + 20 component); 38/38 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. New `web/src/components/ui/chart-scatter.tsx` ships `<ChartScatter>` -- pure-SVG scatter / bubble plot. Multi-series with per-series colour + shape (circle / square / triangle / diamond), hover tooltip with series label + x / y / size lines, optional bubble-size mapping, click handler, axis grid + ticks, optional legend with right / bottom placement, motion-safe mount animation. API: `series: ChartScatterSeries[]` ({id,label,data,color?,shape?}) where `ChartScatterPoint = {x,y,size?,label?}`; `width?` (default 520) / `height?` (default 280) / `padding?` (default 36); `axisLabel?: {x?,y?}`; `showGrid?` (default true) / `showTooltip?` (default true) / `showAxisTicks?` (default true) / `showLegend?` (default true) / `animate?` (default true); `dotSize?` (default 6) / `minDotSize?` (default 3) / `maxDotSize?` (default 18); `formatX?` / `formatY?` / `formatSize?`; `tickCount?` (default 4); `xDomain?` / `yDomain?`; `onPointClick({series,point,seriesIndex,pointIndex})`; `legendPlacement?: 'right' \| 'bottom'`; `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Scatter plot'). | 11.445 | UI: chart-radar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.463 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radar.tsx` ships `<ChartRadar>` -- pure-SVG radar / spider chart. Each axis is a labelled dimension; each series draws a filled polygon connecting per-axis values. The polar grid is rendered as N concentric polygons plus one radial spoke per axis (default N=4). Hover / focus on a data point enlarges the dot and opens a tooltip with series + axis + formatted value rows. Legend renders right (default) or bottom. ARIA description auto-summarises every series across every axis. API: `axes: ChartRadarAxis[]` ({id,label,max?}) + `series: ChartRadarSeries[]` ({id,label,data,color?,fillOpacity?}) where data.length === axes.length; `size?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 48); `levels?` (default 4); `maxValue?`; `showGrid?` / `showAxisLabels?` / `showLegend?` / `showTooltip?` / `showPoints?` / `animate?` (all default true); `pointSize?` (default 3) / `strokeWidth?` (default 1.5); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Radar chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `onPointClick({series, axis, value, seriesIndex, axisIndex})`; `legendPlacement?: 'right' \| 'bottom'`. First axis sits at 12 o'clock; subsequent axes go clockwise. Axis labels position outside chart radius with textAnchor chosen from the axis angle so they never overlap the polygon edge. Outermost grid level draws darker so it reads as a chart border. Re-uses `getDefaultBarColor` from `<ChartBar>`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADAR_SIZE/PADDING/LEVELS/FILL_OPACITY/POINT_SIZE/STROKE_WIDTH`; `getRadarAxisAngle(axisIndex, total)` (axis 0 -> -pi/2, total=0 short-circuits to 0); `getRadarPoint(value, max, angle, cx, cy, radius)` (clamps non-finite/negative/over-max into chart bounds; max <= 0 collapses to centre); `getRadarMax(axes, series, override?)` (override > axis.max > data max; falls back to 1); `buildRadarGridLevelPoints(axisCount, ratio, cx, cy, radius)` + `buildRadarSeriesPoints(series, axes, max, cx, cy, radius)` (fixed format `x.xx,y.yy` tokens space-joined for SVG polygon points); `findRadarPointHit(positions, sx, sy, maxDistance=18)` for downstream keyboard/marquee select; `describeRadarChart(axes, series, formatValue?)` for the default ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-point role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-radar / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid-level / -spoke / -axis-label / -series / -polygon / -point / -tooltip / -tooltip-series / -tooltip-axis / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label; root mirrors data-axis-count / -series-count / -animate; series mirror data-series-id/color; points mirror data-series-id / -axis-id / -axis-index / -hovered). 58 vitest cases (3 axis angle + 6 radar point + 5 radar max + 3 grid level points + 3 series points + 3 nearest hit + 3 describe + 1 constants + 31 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.445-ui-chart-radar.md): multi-axis logarithmic scale (host normalises), polygon clipping/shading between series (host composes), drag-to-reorder axes (host owns axis order), animated polygon morphing (snap-only v1; mount fade-in only). | 11.446 | UI: chart-bullet primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.464 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-bullet.tsx` ships `<ChartBullet>` -- pure-SVG bullet chart in the Stephen Few sense. Visualises a single primary measure against a target plus a stack of qualitative range bands (3 default tiers Low/Medium/High at 33% / 66% / 100% of chart max). Horizontal or vertical orientation. Carries `role="progressbar"` so assistive tech reads measure as % of chart max via the standard ARIA fields: `aria-valuenow` (value), `aria-valuemin=0`, `aria-valuemax` (resolved max), `aria-valuetext` ('value of target target' when target present, else 'value'). API: `value: number`; `target?: number`; `ranges?: ChartBulletRange[]` ({max, label?, color?}); `max?` (override); `label?` / `subLabel?` (optional header); `width?` (default 360) / `height?` (default 48); `orientation?: 'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` (default horizontal); `measureColor?` (default '#1f2937') / `targetColor?` (default '#ef4444'); `showAxisTicks?` (default true) + `tickCount?` (default 5); `formatValue?`; `ariaLabel?` (default: label or 'Bullet chart'); `className?`; `measureThickness?` (0..1 of bar height, default 0.4); `animate?` (default true). Qualitative ranges paint largest-to-smallest so smaller bands layer on top of larger bands; missing ranges -> 3 default tiers with the default neutral palette ('#e5e7eb' / '#cbd5e1' / '#94a3b8'). Measure bar drawn at measureThickness of bar height, vertically centred; horizontal grows left->right, vertical grows bottom->top. Target marker draws perpendicular (vertical line on horizontal, horizontal line on vertical), hidden when target undefined / non-finite. Tick labels evenly-spaced, honour formatValue; showAxisTicks=false suppresses. Optional header: label + sub-label on the left, formatted value (plus / target) on the right; both labels missing collapses the header. motion-safe:animate-fade-in applied to SVG; animate=false removes it. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_BULLET_WIDTH/HEIGHT/MEASURE_COLOR/TARGET_COLOR/TICK_COUNT/MEASURE_THICKNESS/RANGE_COLORS`; `getBulletMax(value, target?, ranges?, override?)` -- override > value/target/range.max; falls back to 1; `getDefaultBulletRanges(max)` -- 3 tiers at 33/66/100, empty for non-positive max; `getBulletRatio(value, max)` -- clamps to [0,1]; non-finite / negative / zero-max -> 0; `getBulletTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive of endpoints; zero-max -> [0]; min count 2; `sortBulletRangesAscending` -- non-mutating ascending copy. ARIA: root role=progressbar + aria-label/valuenow/valuemin=0/valuemax/valuetext; SVG aria-hidden=true (decorative). Data attrs throughout (chart-bullet / -header / -label / -sublabel / -value / -target-text / -svg / -range / -measure / -target / -tick; root mirrors data-orientation / -animate / -value / -target / -max / -ratio; range rects mirror data-range-label / -range-max / -range-ratio; measure mirrors data-value / -ratio; target line mirrors data-target / -target-ratio; ticks mirror data-tick-value). 50 vitest cases (6 getBulletMax + 4 getDefaultBulletRanges + 5 getBulletRatio + 4 getBulletTicks + 3 sortBulletRangesAscending + 1 constants + 27 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.446-ui-chart-bullet.md): stacked/grouped bullet variants (host stacks instances vertically for KPI dashboards), hover tooltips (host wraps with `<Tooltip>`), animated value transitions on data change (snap-only v1; mount fade-in only), negative / signed values (host normalises into [0, max] before passing). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.464. |
| 11.447 | UI: chart-funnel primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.465 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-funnel.tsx` ships `<ChartFunnel>` -- pure-SVG conversion funnel. Each stage paints as a trapezoid whose width is proportional to its value, narrowing toward the bottom for the classic funnel silhouette. Drop-off labels between consecutive stages quantify users lost; hover opens a tooltip with stage label + formatted value + % of top stage + % conversion from previous (omitted on the first stage). Default colour gradient flows from '#bfdbfe' at the top to '#1d4ed8' at the bottom; per-stage colour and gradient endpoints both overridable. API: `stages: ChartFunnelStage[]` ({id, label, value, color?}); `width?` (default 360) / `height?` (default 320) / `stageGap?` (default 4); `showDropoff?` / `showValues?` / `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Funnel chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?`; `onStageClick({stage, index, dropoff, conversion, ofTop})`; `gradient?: {from?, to?}`. Geometry: each stage's slice width is `(width - 16) * value / max` at its top; bottom continues into the next stage's top width; final stage tapers to half its top width by default so the visual still funnels. Mount animation motion-safe:animate-fade-in per stage group. ARIA description auto-summary: 'Funnel with N stages. <stage> <value> (<ofTop%> of top). ...'; empty -> 'No data'. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_FUNNEL_WIDTH/HEIGHT/STAGE_GAP/GRADIENT_FROM/GRADIENT_TO`; `getFunnelMax(stages)` -- max of values; fallback 1; `getFunnelRatio(value, max)` -- clamps to [0,1]; non-finite/non-positive/zero-max -> 0; `getStageDropoff(prev, curr)` -- prev - curr when positive; first stage / non-finite / over-prev / non-positive guards -> 0; `getStageConversion(prev, curr)` -- curr/prev in [0,1]; first stage -> 1; non-positive guards -> 0; `getStageOfTop(top, value)` -- value/top in [0,1]; non-positive/non-finite -> 0; over-top clamps to 1; `interpolateColor(from, to, t)` -- hex (incl #rgb shorthand) lerp; parse failure -> from; t clamped to [0,1]; `buildFunnelPath(topW, bottomW, top, height, cx)` -- closed quadrilateral SVG path; negative widths clamp to zero; `describeFunnelChart(stages, formatValue?, formatPercent?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-slice role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-funnel / -aria-desc / -svg / -stage / -slice / -label / -value / -dropoff / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-of-top / -tooltip-conversion; root mirrors data-stage-count / -animate; stage groups mirror data-stage-id / -stage-index / -stage-color / -hovered; drop-off text mirrors data-dropoff / -conversion). 60 vitest cases (2 getFunnelMax + 3 getFunnelRatio + 5 getStageDropoff + 4 getStageConversion + 4 getStageOfTop + 6 interpolateColor + 2 buildFunnelPath + 3 describeFunnelChart + 1 constants + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.447-ui-chart-funnel.md): multi-funnel comparison (host renders side-by-side), animated value transitions on data change (snap v1; mount fade only), horizontal funnel orientation (host wraps with transform), time-series funnel slicing (host owns pipeline). | 11.448 | UI: chart-treemap primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.466 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-treemap.tsx` ships `<ChartTreemap>` -- pure-SVG hierarchical treemap with a squarified layout (Bruls / Huijsen / van Wijk 1999). Each node renders as a rectangle whose area is proportional to its value; the squarified algorithm keeps aspect ratios close to 1 so labels stay legible. Click-to-drill descends into the hovered node; the drill path is fully controllable and emits `onDrillChange` so adopters can wire breadcrumbs or back buttons. Default colour-by-value gradient flows '#bfdbfe' -> '#1d4ed8' across the current level's value range; per-node `color` and gradient endpoints overridable. API: `data: ChartTreemapNode` ({id, label, value?, children?, color?}); `width?` (default 480) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 2); `showLabels?` / `showValues?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Treemap') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `gradient?: {from?, to?}`; `onNodeClick({node, path, value, rect})`; `drillPath?` (controlled) + `defaultDrillPath?` (uncontrolled initial) + `onDrillChange(path)`. Drill semantics: clicking a parent pushes its id onto the path; leaf clicks do not drill. In-cell labels + values only render when the cell is >40px wide and >18px tall so cramped cells stay readable. Tooltip on hover: label + formatted value + drill hint (only for parents). Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_TREEMAP_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GRADIENT_FROM/GRADIENT_TO`; `getNodeValue(node)` -- explicit value beats children sum; non-positive -> 0; `findNodeByPath(root, path)` -- descends, returns {node, resolved}; unknown ids stop the walk; `worstAspectRatio(areas, length)` -- squarified worst-ratio formula; +Inf for empty/zero-length/non-positive min; `squarifyTreemap(items, rect)` -- partitions rect into proportional cells; drops non-positive values; `getTreemapColor(value, min, max, from, to)` -- gradient interpolation via shared `interpolateColor` from chart-funnel; collapsed range -> to; non-finite -> from; `describeTreemap(root, path, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-cell role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-treemap / -aria-desc / -svg / -cell / -rect / -label / -value / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-drill-hint; root mirrors data-node-id / -depth / -child-count / -animate; cells mirror data-node-id / -value / -color / -hovered / -has-children). 56 vitest cases (5 getNodeValue + 5 findNodeByPath + 3 worstAspectRatio + 7 squarifyTreemap (incl. invariants: cells fit in bounds, total area equals rect area, areas proportional to values) + 5 getTreemapColor + 3 describeTreemap + 1 constants + 27 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.448-ui-chart-treemap.md): animated reflow on data change (snap v1; mount fade only), multi-level breadcrumb UI (host renders separate `<Breadcrumb>`), search/filter inside the chart (host filters tree before passing), negative/signed values (host normalises; primitive drops non-positive during layout). | 11.449 | UI: chart-sankey primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.467 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-sankey.tsx` ships `<ChartSankey>` -- pure-SVG Sankey diagram. Nodes arrange in vertical columns (layers) according to longest path from a source node; flows between nodes paint as smooth cubic bezier ribbons whose width is proportional to flow value. Hovering a node highlights its upstream + downstream paths so adopters can read conversion / energy / cost flow at a glance. API: `nodes: ChartSankeyNode[]` ({id, label, color?, category?}) + `links: ChartSankeyLink[]` ({source, target, value, color?}); `width?` (default 600) / `height?` (default 320) / `nodeWidth?` (default 14) / `nodePadding?` (default 10); `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `showValues?` / `animate?` / `highlightOnHover?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Sankey diagram') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `onNodeClick({node, value})` + `onLinkClick({link, source, target})`. Layer assignment via topological pass: sources at layer 0; subsequent layers max(layer(u)+1) over incoming; cycle-safe (unresolved nodes park at max+1). Node height proportional to max(sum-inflow, sum-outflow); padding budget subtracted from column height before scaling; all columns share scale. Links rendered as closed cubic bezier ribbons (`buildSankeyLinkPath`) with constant thickness = max(source-side, target-side) projection so the ribbon never disappears at the narrow side. Hover: hovered node + upstream + downstream nodes/links highlight; others fade to 0.35 node-opacity, 0.12 link-opacity; `highlightOnHover=false` disables fade. Tooltips: node tooltip on node hover (label + value); link tooltip on link hover when no node hovered (source -> target + value). Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_SANKEY_WIDTH/HEIGHT/NODE_WIDTH/NODE_PADDING/NODE_COLOR/LINK_COLOR`; `getSankeyNodeLayers(nodes, links)` -- cycle-safe map; `getSankeyNodeValue(nodeId, links)` -- max(in, out) sum; ignores non-finite/non-positive link values; `findUpstreamNodes(nodeId, links)` + `findDownstreamNodes(nodeId, links)` -- visited-set guarded; excludes the queried node; `buildSankeyLinkPath(x1, x2, sourceY, targetY, thickness)` -- closed M + 2C + L + Z path; `describeSankeyChart(nodes, links, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-node-rect role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0; per-link role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltips role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-sankey / -aria-desc / -svg / -node / -node-rect / -label / -link / -node-tooltip / -link-tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -link-tooltip-label / -link-tooltip-value; root mirrors data-node-count / -link-count / -animate; node groups mirror data-node-id / -layer / -hovered / -highlighted; links mirror data-source-id / -target-id / -link-index / -hovered / -highlighted). 51 vitest cases (5 getSankeyNodeLayers + 5 getSankeyNodeValue + 4 findUpstreamNodes + 3 findDownstreamNodes + 1 buildSankeyLinkPath + 3 describeSankeyChart + 1 constants + 29 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.450 | UI: chart-waterfall primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.468 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-waterfall.tsx` ships `<ChartWaterfall>` -- pure-SVG waterfall bar chart. Each `delta` bar shows a positive or negative change relative to the running total; `total` bars draw from zero to the cumulative running total (starting balance, subtotals, final). Thin dashed connector lines link the top of each bar to the bottom of the next so adopters can read the cumulative flow at a glance. Positive deltas paint green ('#16a34a'), negative red ('#dc2626'), totals neutral ('#475569') by default; all colours overridable. Per-bar tooltip surfaces delta + running total (total row omitted for totals). API: `bars: ChartWaterfallBar[]` ({id, label, value, type?: 'delta'\|'total', color?}); `width?` (default 480) / `height?` (default 280) / `padding?` (default 36) / `tickCount?` (default 5) / `barGap?` (default 6); `showLabels?` / `showValues?` / `showConnectors?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showZeroLine?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Waterfall chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `positiveColor?` / `negativeColor?` / `totalColor?`; `onBarClick({bar, index, start, end})`. computeWaterfallSteps walks the bar list and emits {start, end, delta, isTotal, runningTotal}: delta bars increment running total; total bars reset running to value. Bounds always include zero; collapsed range auto-expands. Zero line rendered only when range straddles zero. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_WATERFALL_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/TOTAL_COLOR/BAR_GAP`; `computeWaterfallSteps(bars)` -- delta NaN -> 0; total NaN -> running; `getWaterfallBounds(steps)` -- chart-wide min/max; empty fallback (0,1); collapsed expands; `getWaterfallBarColor(step, p, n, t)` -- per-bar override > total > +/- delta > zero=neutral; `getWaterfallTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> [min]; min count 2; `describeWaterfallChart(bars, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary with sign per delta. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-bar role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-waterfall / -aria-desc / -svg / -axis-y / -tick / -tick-label / -zero-line / -connector / -bar / -rect / -label / -value / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-delta / -tooltip-running; root mirrors data-bar-count / -animate; bar groups mirror data-bar-id / -bar-index / -bar-type / -bar-color / -bar-direction / -bar-start / -bar-end / -bar-delta / -hovered; connectors mirror data-from-index / -to-index). 56 vitest cases (7 computeWaterfallSteps + 4 getWaterfallBounds + 5 getWaterfallBarColor + 5 getWaterfallTicks + 3 describeWaterfallChart + 1 constants + 31 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.451 | UI: chart-candlestick primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.469 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-candlestick.tsx` ships `<ChartCandlestick>` -- pure-SVG OHLC candlestick chart. Each candle paints a solid body from open->close and a thin wick from low to high. Bullish (close > open) -> up colour ('#16a34a'); bearish (close < open) -> down colour ('#dc2626'); doji (close == open or non-finite) -> hairline body at neutral ('#475569'). Hovering a candle opens a tooltip with all four OHLC values + formatted date plus optional volume row when present. Per-candle click handler. API: `data: ChartCandlestickPoint[]` ({date: string|number, open, high, low, close, volume?}); `width?` (default 640) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 36); `upColor?` / `downColor?` / `dojiColor?` / `wickColor?` (default: candle colour); `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showGrid?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Candlestick chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatDate?`; `tickCount?` (default 5); `candleWidth?` / `candleGap?` (default 2); `onCandleClick({point, index, direction})`. Body height clamped to min 1 px so a doji renders as a hairline; wick = thin vertical line from low to high through body centre. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_CANDLESTICK_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/UP_COLOR/DOWN_COLOR/DOJI_COLOR/TICK_COUNT/CANDLE_GAP/MIN_BODY_HEIGHT`; `getCandlestickBounds(data)` -- min(low) / max(high); non-finite ignored; empty (0,1); collapsed +/- 0.5; `getCandlestickDirection(open, close)` -- up/down/doji; non-finite -> doji; `getCandleColor(direction, up, down, doji)` -- colour picker; `getCandlestickTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; min count 2; `formatCandleDate(date, formatter?)` -- string passthrough; epoch -> YYYY-MM-DD; non-finite epoch -> String(value); `describeCandlestickChart(data, formatValue?, formatDate?)` -- ARIA summary 'Candlestick chart, N sessions, M bullish. <first date> open <open> -> <last date> close <close>.'. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-body role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-body aria-label '<date> OHLC: open <o>, high <h>, low <l>, close <c>'. | 11.452 | UI: chart-radial-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.470 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radial-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartRadialBar>` -- pure-SVG concentric radial bar chart. Each series gets a dedicated ring at its own radius; an arc inside the ring is drawn proportional to the value (0 -> max). A background "track" arc behind each bar provides completion context. The center of the chart hosts an optional label slot (`centerLabel`) for an aggregate value or legend node. Hover / focus on an arc opens a tooltip with the series label + value + % of max. Default arc sweep -90 deg (12 o'clock) -> 270 deg (full circle); both endpoints configurable for half-donut or gauge variants. API: `series: ChartRadialBarSeries[]` ({id, label, value, color?}); `width?` (default 320) / `height?` (default 320); `maxValue?`; `startAngle?` (default -90) / `endAngle?` (default 270); `barWidth?` (default 14) / `barGap?` (default 4); `trackColor?` (default '#e2e8f0'); `showCenterLabel?` (default true) + `centerLabel?: ReactNode`; `showLabels?` / `showValues?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `animate?` (all default true); `tickCount?` (default 4); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Radial bar chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?`; `onSeriesClick({series, index, value, ratio})`. Rings stack outward-to-inward so the first series sits at the outermost ring. Filled arc spans startAngle ... startAngle + (endAngle - startAngle) * ratio. Centre slot uses 128x64 `<foreignObject>` at the chart centre. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADIAL_BAR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/START_ANGLE/END_ANGLE/BAR_WIDTH/BAR_GAP/TRACK_COLOR/TICK_COUNT`; `getRadialBarMax(series, override?)` -- override > 0 wins; then data max; fallback 1; `getRadialBarRatio(value, max)` -- clamp [0,1]; non-positive/non-finite/zero-max -> 0; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, radius, deg)` -- SVG conventions (0=E, -90=N, 90=S); `buildRadialArcPath(cx, cy, innerR, outerR, startAngle, endAngle)` -- closed annular arc (2 A + 1 L); largeArc when |sweep|>180; zero outer/sweep -> ''; `getRadialTickPositions(startAngle, endAngle, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; min count 2; non-finite -> []; `describeRadialBarChart(series, max, formatValue?, formatPercent?)` -- ARIA summary; `getDefaultRadialBarColor(index)` -- 8-colour palette cycle; negative -> [0]. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-arc role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-arc aria-label '<label>: <value> (<pct>)'. | 11.453 | UI: chart-stream primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.471 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-stream.tsx` ships `<ChartStream>` -- pure-SVG stream graph (stacked-area variant with a centered baseline). At every x position the chart sums per-series values and centers the stack vertically around a horizontal baseline so the silhouette grows symmetrically up + down. Each series fills its own band; hovering a band highlights it and dims the others. Smooth interpolation uses a Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-Bezier pass on both upper + lower edges; two-point bands degrade cleanly to straight polylines. API: `series: ChartStreamSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], color?}); `xLabels?: string[]`; `width?` (default 540) / `height?` (default 240) / `padding?` (default 24); `smooth?` (default true); `showLegend?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisLabels?` / `highlightOnHover?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Stream graph') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatXLabel?(label, index)`; `legendPlacement?: 'right' \| 'bottom'` (default 'bottom'); `onSeriesClick({series, index, total})`. Series order matters: first series sits at the middle of the stack; later series stack outward symmetrically. Layer N lower edge meets layer N+1 upper edge cleanly. Non-finite / non-positive values clamped to 0 so the stream never inverts. Hover highlight dims other bands to 0.25 fill-opacity (configurable). Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_STREAM_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING`; `getStreamTotalAt(series, index)` -- ignores non-finite/non-positive; empty -> 0; `getStreamMax(series)` -- largest column sum; empty/zero-length/all-non-finite -> 1; `computeStreamLayout(series, innerW, innerH, padX, padY)` -- per-series points with {x, upperY, lowerY}; centered baseline; `buildStreamPath(points, smooth)` -- closed band; smooth uses Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-Bezier on both edges; < 3 pts degrades to polyline; `describeStreamChart(series, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-band role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip. Data attrs throughout (chart-stream / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -layer / -band / -xlabel / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-total / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label; root mirrors data-layer-count / -sample-count / -smooth / -animate; layer groups mirror data-series-id / -series-index / -series-color / -hovered). 50 vitest cases (3 getStreamTotalAt + 4 getStreamMax + 5 computeStreamLayout (incl. invariants: layers tile cleanly, stack centered) + 5 buildStreamPath + 3 describeStreamChart + 1 constants + 29 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.454 | UI: chart-network primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.472 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-network.tsx` ships `<ChartNetwork>` -- pure-SVG force-directed network graph. Nodes are placed by a deterministic physics simulation (Coulomb repulsion + edge spring + center gravity) that runs `iterations` steps on mount or data change. Edges paint as thin lines between nodes with thickness scaling to edge weight. Drag a node to reposition; pinned nodes stay put while the layout re-runs around them. Mouse-wheel zooms; drag the background to pan. Built-in zoom controls (+, -, 1:1) in the top-right corner. Hover opens a tooltip with node label + degree + optional group; per-node and per-edge click callbacks fire with full payloads. API: `nodes: ChartNetworkNode[]` ({id, label, group?, weight?, color?, x?, y?, fixed?}) + `edges: ChartNetworkEdge[]` ({source, target, weight?, label?, color?}); `width?` (default 600) / `height?` (default 400); `iterations?` (default 80); `repulsion?` (800) / `springLength?` (50) / `springStrength?` (0.05) / `gravity?` (0.005) / `damping?` (0.85); `defaultNodeRadius?` (8) / `defaultNodeColor?` ('#2563eb') / `defaultEdgeColor?` ('#94a3b8'); `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `showZoomControls?` / `enableDrag?` / `enableZoom?` / `enablePan?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Network graph') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `onNodeClick({node, degree})` + `onEdgeClick({edge, source, target})`. Initial layout: nodes with explicit (x,y) keep position; others land on a golden-angle spiral centered on canvas. Simulation guards against NaN by jittering identical positions. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_NETWORK_WIDTH/HEIGHT/ITERATIONS/REPULSION/SPRING_LENGTH/SPRING_STRENGTH/GRAVITY/DAMPING/NODE_RADIUS/NODE_COLOR/EDGE_COLOR`; `seedNetworkPositions(nodes, width, height)` -- deterministic golden-angle spiral seed; preserves explicit coords + fixed flag; `stepForceSimulation(nodes, edges, params)` -- pure single step; pinned stationary; no input mutation; NaN-jitter guard; `runForceLayout(nodes, edges, params, iterations)` -- full deterministic layout; iter=0 returns seed; `getNetworkBounds(nodes)` -- min/max; empty/non-finite fallback {0,0,1,1}; `computeNodeDegree(nodeId, edges)` -- incident-edge count; isolated -> 0; `findNodeAtPoint(nodes, x, y, radius)` -- closest within radius or null; centermost at radius=0; `getNodeRadius(node, defaultRadius)` -- sqrt(weight) scaling; floor 2; fallback for missing/invalid weight; `describeNetworkChart(nodes, edges, formatValue?)` -- top-5 by degree summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-node-circle role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0; per-edge-line role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltips role=tooltip.
