| 11.489 | UI: chart-radial-stacked-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.507 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radial-stacked-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartRadialStackedBar>` -- pure-SVG **radial stacked bar** chart. Each category is a concentric ring around the centre; within each ring, the configured series stack **angularly** so the full 2pi of the ring is divided proportionally by each series's value within that category. Distinct from `<ChartRadialBar>` (11.452) which paints one arc per series with value encoding arc length, `<ChartPolarArea>` (11.478) which uses equal-angle wedges with radius encoding value, and `<ChartStackedBar>` (11.468) which is the linear stacked variant: this primitive is the rings-of-stacks variant where each ring shows the categorical breakdown across the visible series. Layout (`computeRadialStackedBarLayout`): one ring per category stacking outward from `innerRadius` to `outerRadius` with `ringGap` between consecutive rings; `ringThickness = (outerRadius - innerRadius - gaps) / N` where N is the category count. Within each ring, visible series fill the full 2pi minus per-segment `padAngle`s; each segment occupies an arc proportional to `value / categoryTotal`. Non-positive / non-finite values produce no segment (skipped from the ring entirely). Hidden series (controlled via `hiddenSeries` + `onHiddenSeriesChange` or uncontrolled via `defaultHiddenSeries`) drop their segments everywhere; the remaining series reproportion to fill the ring. Per-series `color` always wins; otherwise the 10-color palette maps each `seriesIndex` so the same series uses the same colour across every ring. Default `startAngle = -pi/2` so the first series in each ring starts at 12 o'clock. Center disc shows the grand total of all visible segments; an optional `centerLabel` caption renders above the value when supplied. Ring labels render at the ring's midradius for non-empty rings (toggleable via `showRingLabels`). Hover/focus on a segment sets the hovered key (`categoryId::seriesId`) and opens a tooltip with the category + series labels, the formatted value, and the share within the category. Per-segment click handler fires with `{segment}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per segment (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `categories: readonly ChartRadialStackedBarCategory[]` ({id, label, values: readonly number[]}) / `series: readonly ChartRadialStackedBarSeries[]` ({id, label, color?}) / `width?` (380) / `height?` (380) / `padding?` (32) / `innerRadius?` (36) / `ringGap?` (6) / `padAngle?` (0.01) / `startAngle?` (-pi/2) / `fillOpacity?` (0.85) / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showRingLabels?` (true) / `showCenterTotal?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Radial stacked bar chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `centerLabel?` / `onSegmentClick?({segment})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADIAL_STACKED_BAR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/INNER_RADIUS/RING_GAP/PAD_ANGLE/START_ANGLE/FILL_OPACITY/PALETTE`; `getRadialStackedBarDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)` -- standard SVG y-down; `getRadialStackedBarCategoryTotal(values, hiddenIndices)` -- sum of visible positive-finite values; `computeRadialStackedBarLayout({categories, series, hiddenSeries, cx, cy, innerRadius, outerRadius, ringGap, padAngle, startAngle, fallbackColor})` -- canonical layout returning `{ rings, visibleSeriesCount, totalsByCategory, ringThickness, outerRadius }`; each ring is `{ id, index, label, innerRadius, outerRadius, total, segments }`; each segment is `{ categoryId, categoryIndex, seriesId, seriesIndex, value, shareWithinCategory, startAngle, endAngle, midAngle, innerRadius, outerRadius, color, path }`; empty / non-positive outer / outer<=inner -> empty rings; `describeRadialStackedBarChart(categories, series, hidden, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Radial stacked bar chart with N rings and V visible series. Total <grand>."; empty / all-hidden / zero grand total -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-radial-stacked-bar-aria-desc"` span; per-segment `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<categoryLabel> / <seriesLabel>: <value> (<percent> of <categoryLabel>)"`; legend `<button aria-pressed>` per series + per-series `aria-label="Toggle <label>"`. data-section on every node (chart-radial-stacked-bar / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -rings / -ring / -ring-label / -segment / -path / -center / -center-label / -center-value / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-share / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-category-count, data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-segment-count, data-grand-total, data-ring-thickness, data-animate; ring groups mirror data-ring-id, data-ring-index, data-ring-total, data-ring-inner-radius, data-ring-outer-radius; segment groups mirror data-category-id, data-series-id, data-series-index, data-segment-value, data-segment-share, data-segment-color, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-series-id, data-series-hidden. 49 vitest cases (1 constants + 1 getRadialStackedBarDefaultColor + 1 polarToCartesian + 3 getRadialStackedBarCategoryTotal + 13 computeRadialStackedBarLayout (incl. invariants: per-ring stack sums to 2pi, share = value/categoryTotal, non-positive drops, hidden drops, padAngle gaps) + 3 describeRadialStackedBarChart + 27 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.489-ui-chart-radial-stacked-bar.md): 100%-rescaled rings (each ring already spans 2pi by design); mixed orientation per ring (every ring shares start angle + pad angle); animated transitions on data / hidden-series changes (snap v1; mount fade only); per-series ordering different per ring (host re-orders the input array if needed). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.507. |
| 11.490 | UI: chart-radial-line primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.508 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radial-line.tsx` ships `<ChartRadialLine>` -- pure-SVG **radial line / spiral plot** for cyclic / periodic time-series data. Two modes: `cyclic` (default; angle encodes position-in-cycle 0..2pi over `cycleLength` samples; radius encodes value; line closes back to start so the cycle is visually obvious -- ideal for hour-of-day / day-of-week / month-of-year periodicity) and `spiral` (angle accumulates continuously over multiple cycles so cycle 1 sample 0 sits at `startAngle + 2pi`, cycle 2 sample 0 at `startAngle + 4pi`, etc.; radius walks outward over the full sample range with weighted combination of value ratio + sample position so even flat input still spirals while values modulate locally; ideal for showing both within-cycle phase and long-term trend across many cycles). Distinct from `<ChartRadialBar>` (11.452, concentric arc bars), `<ChartPolarArea>` (11.478, equal-angle wedges), `<ChartRadar>` (11.445, multi-axis polygon), and `<ChartRadialStackedBar>` (11.489, rings of stacks): this primitive is the polar line variant for periodic data. Layout (`computeRadialLineLayout`): `radiusForValue` for cyclic = `innerRadius + (value/maxValue) * (outerRadius - innerRadius)`; for spiral = `innerRadius + (0.4 * valueRatio + 0.6 * spiralRatio) * radialSpan`. `angleFor` for cyclic = `startAngle + (positionInCycle / cycleLength) * 2pi` (wraps); for spiral = `startAngle + (sampleIndex / cycleLength) * 2pi` (accumulates). Non-finite values break the painted line (path emits a new `M`) and the offending point collapses to inner radius. `closeCyclic=true` (cyclic mode only) appends a line back to the first finite point + a closing `Z` so the cycle is sealed; also exposed as `fillPath` when `showFill=true`. Axis spokes + axis labels: one per `cycleLength` step around the perimeter; labels default to sample index, supply `axisLabels` (length = cycleLength) for human-readable text; `formatAxis` rewrites further. Rings: one concentric dashed ring per non-zero tick value. Hidden series (controlled via `hiddenSeries` + `onHiddenSeriesChange` or uncontrolled via `defaultHiddenSeries`) drop from the output entirely. Hover/focus on a point sets the hovered key (`seriesId::sampleIndex`) and opens a tooltip with series label, position (axis label or `position N`, plus `cycle K` in spiral mode), and formatted value. Per-point click handler fires with `{point, series}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per series group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartRadialLineSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly number[], color?}) / `mode?` ('cyclic'\|'spiral'; default 'cyclic') / `cycleLength: number` (required) / `axisLabels?` / `width?` (380) / `height?` (380) / `padding?` (32) / `innerRadius?` (24) / `startAngle?` (-pi/2) / `maxValue?` / `tickCount?` (4) / `strokeWidth?` (1.6) / `pointRadius?` (3) / `fillOpacity?` (0.15) / `gridColor?` ('#e2e8f0') / `axisColor?` ('#cbd5e1') / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `closeCyclic?` (true) / `showFill?` (false) / `showPoints?` (false) / `showRings?` (true) / `showAxisLabels?` (true) / `showSpokes?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Radial line chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatAxis?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onPointClick?({point, series})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADIAL_LINE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/INNER_RADIUS/START_ANGLE/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/POINT_RADIUS/FILL_OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getRadialLineDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)` -- standard SVG y-down; `getRadialLineCyclicAngle(pos, cycleLength, startAngle)` -- canonical cyclic angle; `getRadialLineMaxValue(series, hidden)` -- largest visible positive value; empty / all-hidden -> 1 fallback; `getRadialLineSampleCount(series, hidden)` -- longest visible data length; `getRadialLineTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced 0..max; non-positive -> [0]; `computeRadialLineLayout({series, hidden, mode, cycleLength, axisLabels?, cx, cy, innerRadius, outerRadius, startAngle, maxValueOverride?, tickCount, closeCyclic})` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, axisAngles, rings, maxValue, cycleLength, totalCycles, innerRadius, outerRadius }`; empty / non-positive radius / non-positive cycle -> empty; `describeRadialLineChart(series, hidden, mode, cycleLength, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Radial line chart (<mode>) with N series, cycle length L, K cycles of data, peak value <peak>."; empty / all-hidden / non-positive cycle -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-radial-line-aria-desc"` span; per-line `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<label>: <N> samples"`; per-point `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<label> at position <P>: <value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-radial-line / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -rings / -ring / -spokes / -spoke / -axis-labels / -axis-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -fill / -point / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-position / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-mode, data-cycle-length, data-total-cycles, data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-point-count, data-max-value, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count; points mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-point-cycle, data-point-position, data-point-value, data-hovered; rings mirror data-ring-value, data-ring-radius; spokes mirror data-axis-index, data-axis-angle. 61 vitest cases (1 constants + 1 getRadialLineDefaultColor + 1 polarToCartesian + 3 getRadialLineCyclicAngle + 3 getRadialLineMaxValue + 2 getRadialLineSampleCount + 3 getRadialLineTicks + 14 computeRadialLineLayout (incl. cyclic-vs-spiral invariants: cyclic angle at index 0 = startAngle, position wraps modulo, spiral radius increases with sample position, spiral angles accumulate cycle 1 = startAngle + 2pi) + 3 describeRadialLineChart + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.490-ui-chart-radial-line.md): brushing / range selection along the perimeter (v1 is read-only); smooth Catmull-Rom / cardinal interpolation (straight segments only); polar log scale (v1 is linear value -> ratio); animated transitions on data / mode change (snap v1; mount fade only). | 11.491 | UI: chart-radial-area primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.509 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radial-area.tsx` ships `<ChartRadialArea>` -- pure-SVG **radial area** chart variant where each series is a **closed polygon with a filled interior** in polar coordinates. Two stack modes: **overlay** (default; every series fills from centre out to its value-radius; overlapping fills use `fillOpacity` so multiple series stay legible on top of each other) and **stacked** (per-sample cumulative sums stack radially; each layer paints an annular band between previous cumulative and its own; peak total maps to outerRadius). Two curves: **linear** (default; straight polygon edges between samples) and **cardinal** (closed cubic-bezier smoothing for the classic D3 radial-area look). Distinct from `<ChartRadialLine>` (11.490) which is line-emphasized for cyclic/spiral data with no stacked mode, `<ChartRadar>` (11.445) which is multi-axis polygon for categorical dimensions, `<ChartPolarArea>` (11.478) which uses equal-angle wedges with radius encoding value, and `<ChartRadialStackedBar>` (11.489) which stacks *angularly* within each category ring. Layout (`computeRadialAreaLayout`): `radiusFor(value) = innerRadius + (value / maxValue) * (outerRadius - innerRadius)`, clamped [0, 1]. Overlay: every layer's `innerRadius` is chart's inner radius; `outerRadius` is `radiusFor(value)`. Stacked: per-sample cumulative sums computed left-to-right across visible series; each layer occupies the annulus from `radiusFor(cumulativeBefore)` to `radiusFor(cumulativeAfter)`; hidden series pause the cumulative cursor. Non-finite / non-positive values clamp to 0 so the layer never inverts. Path building (`buildRadialAreaClosedPath`): overlay (inner ring collapses to a point) emits a single closed M..Z ring for each series; stacked (distinct inner ring) emits two closed rings (outer + reversed inner) with `fillRule="evenodd"` so the SVG paints only the annulus. `linear` uses straight L between samples; `cardinal` uses Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-Bezier on the closed loop. Axis spokes + axis labels one per `cycleLength` step around the perimeter; labels default to sample index; `axisLabels` prop + `formatAxis` rewrite. Rings: one concentric dashed ring per non-zero tick value. Hidden series (controlled `hiddenSeries` + `onHiddenSeriesChange` or uncontrolled `defaultHiddenSeries`) drop from layout; cumulative cursor pauses for hidden layers in stacked mode. Hover/focus on a series group sets the hovered id, dims every other series to opacity 0.4, and opens a tooltip with the series label, sum of finite sample values, and sample count. Per-series click handler fires with `{series}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per series group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartRadialAreaSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly number[], color?}) / `cycleLength: number` (required) / `stackMode?` ('overlay'\|'stacked'; default 'overlay') / `curve?` ('linear'\|'cardinal'; default 'linear') / `axisLabels?` / `width?` (380) / `height?` (380) / `padding?` (32) / `innerRadius?` (24) / `startAngle?` (-pi/2) / `maxValue?` / `tickCount?` (4) / `strokeWidth?` (1.2) / `fillOpacity?` (0.55) / `gridColor?` ('#e2e8f0') / `axisColor?` ('#cbd5e1') / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showOutline?` (true) / `showRings?` (true) / `showAxisLabels?` (true) / `showSpokes?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Radial area chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatAxis?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onSeriesClick?({series})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADIAL_AREA_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/INNER_RADIUS/START_ANGLE/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/FILL_OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/STACK_MODE/CURVE/PALETTE`; `getRadialAreaDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)`; `getRadialAreaAngle(pos, cycleLength, startAngle)`; `getRadialAreaSampleCount(series, hidden)` -- longest visible data length; `getRadialAreaMaxValue(series, hidden, stackMode)` -- overlay = largest single value; stacked = largest column sum; empty / all-hidden -> 1; `getRadialAreaTicks(max, count?)` -- non-positive -> [0]; `buildRadialAreaClosedPath(outerPoints, innerPoints, curve)` -- canonical closed path builder; overlay returns single closed ring; stacked returns two closed rings for even-odd fill; cardinal emits C commands; `computeRadialAreaLayout({series, hidden, cycleLength, stackMode, curve, axisLabels?, cx, cy, innerRadius, outerRadius, startAngle, maxValueOverride?, tickCount})` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, axisAngles, rings, maxValue, cycleLength, innerRadius, outerRadius, stackMode }`; empty / non-positive radius / non-positive cycle -> empty; `describeRadialAreaChart(series, hidden, stackMode, cycleLength, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Radial area chart (<stackMode>) with N series, cycle length L, peak value <peak>."; empty / all-hidden / non-positive cycle -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-radial-area-aria-desc"` span; per-outline `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<label>: <N> samples"`. data-section on every node (chart-radial-area / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -rings / -ring / -spokes / -spoke / -axis-labels / -axis-label / -series / -series-group / -fill / -outline / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-total / -tooltip-samples / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-stack-mode, data-curve, data-cycle-length, data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-max-value, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-hovered. 61 vitest cases (1 constants + 1 getRadialAreaDefaultColor + 1 polarToCartesian + 3 getRadialAreaAngle + 2 getRadialAreaSampleCount + 4 getRadialAreaMaxValue + 2 getRadialAreaTicks + 4 buildRadialAreaClosedPath + 13 computeRadialAreaLayout (incl. invariants: overlay starts at innerRadius, stacked layer N inner = layer N-1 outer, stacked peak total maps to outerRadius, non-finite clamp, cardinal emits C) + 2 describeRadialAreaChart + 28 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.491-ui-chart-radial-area.md): brushing along the perimeter (v1 is read-only); polar log scale (linear only); animated transitions on data / stackMode change (snap v1; mount fade only); negative values stacked below baseline (clamps to 0 instead). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.509. |
| 11.492 | UI: chart-strip primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.510 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-strip.tsx` ships `<ChartStrip>` -- pure-SVG one-dimensional **strip plot** (also known as a 1D scatter or strip chart). Each data point gets a small mark (tick line by default or filled circle) placed along a single value axis. Multiple groups stack into parallel lanes; an optional deterministic jitter offsets coincident points in the orthogonal direction so dense regions remain readable. Distinct from `<ChartScatter>` which paints 2D xy points (both axes encode), `<ChartBubble>` (11.470) which is 2D xy with size encoding, `<ChartDotPlot>` which stacks dots vertically by bin to show frequency (Wilkinson dot plot), `<ChartBoxplot>` (11.455) which renders a 5-number summary rather than raw points, `<ChartHistogram>` (11.473) which paints binned counts, `<ChartViolin>` which paints KDE-shaped density envelopes, `<ChartRidge>` (11.474) which stacks density curves across lanes, and `<ChartCalendarHeatmap>` (11.471) which is a 2D day grid coloured by value. Value axis: range auto-derived from finite visible values (collapsed range expands +/- 0.5; empty -> (0..1)); explicit `valueMin` / `valueMax` clamp out-of-range points to the nearest endpoint instead of dropping them. `horizontal` maps the value axis to x (left -> right); `vertical` maps it to y (bottom -> top). Lanes: total inner height (or width, for vertical) is divided into N equal lanes separated by `laneGap` px; lane labels render at the lane's leading edge. Jitter: `getStripJitter(seed, groupIndex, pointIndex)` returns a deterministic value in `[-1, 1]` using a mulberry32-style mixer (`s = seed ^ gi*0x9e3779b1 ^ pi*0x85ebca6b`); final offset = `jitter * (laneHeight/2) * getStripJitter(...)`. Identical input always produces identical output so points never reshuffle across re-renders. Marks: `'tick'` = vertical (horizontal orientation) / horizontal (vertical orientation) line segment of length `markSize` (default 14); `'dot'` = filled circle of radius `markSize` (default 3). Hover/focus on a mark dims every other mark to opacity 0.35 and opens a tooltip with the group label and formatted value. Per-mark click handler fires with `{group, point}`. Legend buttons toggle group visibility (uncontrolled + controlled via `hiddenGroups` / `onHiddenGroupsChange`). Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `groups: readonly ChartStripGroup[]` ({id, label, values: readonly number[], color?}) / `orientation?` ('horizontal'\|'vertical'; default 'horizontal') / `mark?` ('tick'\|'dot'; default 'tick') / `jitter?` (0) / `jitterSeed?` (1) / `valueMin?` / `valueMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `laneGap?` (8) / `tickCount?` (5) / `markSize?` / `markOpacity?` (0.65) / `strokeWidth?` (1.2) / `gridColor?` ('#e2e8f0') / `axisColor?` ('#cbd5e1') / `hiddenGroups?` / `defaultHiddenGroups?` / `onHiddenGroupsChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showLaneLabels?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Strip plot') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatGroup?` / `valueLabel?` / `onPointClick?({group, point})` / `onGroupToggle?({group, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_STRIP_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/LANE_GAP/TICK_COUNT/MARK_TICK_SIZE/MARK_DOT_SIZE/MARK_OPACITY/STROKE_WIDTH/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/ORIENTATION/MARK/JITTER/JITTER_SEED/PALETTE`; `getStripDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; invalid index -> color 0; `getStripFiniteValues(values)` -- drops non-finite; non-array -> []; `getStripBounds(groups, hidden?)` -- min/max across visible finite values; empty -> (0..1); collapsed +/- 0.5; `getStripTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `getStripJitter(seed, gi, pi)` -- deterministic [-1, 1] mulberry32-style mix; `computeStripLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ groups, ticks, valueMin, valueMax, orientation, mark, innerWidth, innerHeight, laneHeight }`; degenerate canvas / empty groups / all-hidden -> empty; clamps out-of-range values to range endpoints; jitter offsets bounded by `laneHeight/2`; `describeStripChart(groups, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Strip plot of N values across M groups, range <min> to <max>."; empty / no finite values -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-strip-aria-desc"` span; per-mark `<line|circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<group label>: <formatted value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-strip / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -value-label / -lane-labels / -lane-label / -groups / -group / -mark / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-orientation, data-mark, data-jitter, data-group-count, data-visible-group-count, data-finite-count, data-animate; group mirrors data-group-id, data-group-index, data-group-color, data-group-point-count, data-group-finite-count; mark mirrors data-mark-kind, data-group-id, data-point-index, data-value, data-jitter-offset, data-hovered. 67 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getStripDefaultColor + 2 getStripFiniteValues + 5 getStripBounds + 4 getStripTicks + 3 getStripJitter + 12 computeStripLayout + 4 describeStripChart + 34 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.492-ui-chart-strip.md): half-eye / mean-bar overlays (host stacks a `<ChartBoxplot>`); beeswarm-style non-overlapping layout (v1 is random jitter, not force-directed); external selection / highlight by id (hover/focus only); log-scale value axis (linear only; host pre-logs); pre-aggregated `{value, count}` input (v1 always one mark per value). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w474. Bump 1.11.510. |
| 11.493 | UI: chart-beeswarm primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.511 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-beeswarm.tsx` ships `<ChartBeeswarm>` -- pure-SVG **beeswarm plot** with force-directed, deterministic, non-overlapping circle placement around a per-group lane. Sibling of `<ChartStrip>` (11.492) but strictly non-overlapping: a greedy packer (D3 / Sergio Pegoraro algorithm) walks points in `(value, originalIndex)` order and for each new point considers `laneCenter` plus the two tangent y values offered by every previously placed point whose along distance is below the spacing threshold (`spacing = 2*radius + gap`); then picks the candidate closest to `laneCenter` that does not collide with any placed point (`dx^2 + dy^2 >= spacing^2 - eps`). Output is fully deterministic; identical input always produces identical layout (no randomness, no animation reshuffle). Distinct from `<ChartStrip>` (random/seeded jitter, allows overlaps), `<ChartScatter>` (2D xy), `<ChartBubble>` (11.470; 2D xy + size), `<ChartDotPlot>` (Wilkinson stacked at fixed bins), `<ChartBoxplot>` (11.455; 5-number summary), `<ChartHistogram>` (11.473; binned counts), `<ChartViolin>` (KDE envelope), `<ChartRidge>` (11.474; stacked density curves). Value axis: range auto-derived from finite visible values (collapsed range expands +/- 0.5; empty -> (0..1)); explicit `valueMin` / `valueMax` clamp out-of-range points to the nearest endpoint instead of dropping them. `horizontal` maps the value axis to x (left -> right); `vertical` maps it to y (bottom -> top). Lanes: total inner height (or width, for vertical) is divided into N equal lanes separated by `laneGap` px; lane labels render at the lane's leading edge. Marks: filled circles of radius `radius` (default 3) with `gap` (default 1) extra spacing. Hover/focus on a circle dims every other circle to opacity 0.3 and opens a tooltip with the group label and formatted value. Per-mark click handler fires with `{group, point}`. Legend buttons toggle group visibility (uncontrolled + controlled via `hiddenGroups` / `onHiddenGroupsChange`). Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `groups: readonly ChartBeeswarmGroup[]` ({id, label, values: readonly number[], color?}) / `orientation?` ('horizontal'\|'vertical'; default 'horizontal') / `radius?` (3) / `gap?` (1) / `valueMin?` / `valueMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `laneGap?` (16) / `tickCount?` (5) / `markOpacity?` (0.85) / `strokeWidth?` (1) / `gridColor?` ('#e2e8f0') / `axisColor?` ('#cbd5e1') / `hiddenGroups?` / `defaultHiddenGroups?` / `onHiddenGroupsChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showLaneLabels?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Beeswarm plot') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatGroup?` / `valueLabel?` / `onPointClick?({group, point})` / `onGroupToggle?({group, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_BEESWARM_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/LANE_GAP/TICK_COUNT/RADIUS/GAP/OPACITY/STROKE_WIDTH/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/ORIENTATION/PALETTE`; `getBeeswarmDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; invalid index -> color 0; `getBeeswarmFiniteValues(values)` -- drops non-finite; non-array -> []; `getBeeswarmBounds(groups, hidden?)` -- min/max across visible finite values; empty -> (0..1); collapsed +/- 0.5; `getBeeswarmTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `packBeeswarmGroup(items, laneCenter, radius, gap)` -- canonical non-overlapping packer; items = `{index, value, along}`, output = same shape + `across`; deterministic; output sorted by original index ascending; minimum center-to-center distance >= `2*radius + gap`; spacing=0 -> all points at laneCenter; `computeBeeswarmLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ groups, ticks, valueMin, valueMax, orientation, innerWidth, innerHeight, laneHeight, radius, gap }`; degenerate canvas / empty groups / all-hidden -> empty; clamps out-of-range values to range endpoints; tracks per-group `swarmExtent` (max |across - laneCenter|); `describeBeeswarmChart(groups, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Beeswarm plot of N values across M groups, range <min> to <max>."; empty / no finite values -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-beeswarm-aria-desc"` span; per-mark `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<group label>: <formatted value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-beeswarm / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -value-label / -lane-labels / -lane-label / -groups / -group / -mark / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-orientation, data-radius, data-gap, data-group-count, data-visible-group-count, data-finite-count, data-animate; group mirrors data-group-id, data-group-index, data-group-color, data-group-point-count, data-group-finite-count, data-group-swarm-extent; mark mirrors data-group-id, data-point-index, data-value, data-along, data-across, data-hovered. 67 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getBeeswarmDefaultColor + 2 getBeeswarmFiniteValues + 4 getBeeswarmBounds + 3 getBeeswarmTicks + 8 packBeeswarmGroup invariants (single point, well-separated, overlap displacement, determinism, dense collisions, zero spacing, sorted output, symmetric balance) + 11 computeBeeswarmLayout invariants (incl. non-overlap among packed points, swarmExtent recorded, tick positions inside canvas) + 4 describeBeeswarmChart + 32 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.493-ui-chart-beeswarm.md): force-directed velocity simulation per frame (v1 is one-shot greedy placement); pre-aggregated `{value, count}` input (v1 always one mark per raw value); log-scale value axis (linear only); external selection by id (hover/focus only); continuous category axis (lane is per-group, not numeric). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w475. Bump 1.11.511. |
| 11.494 | UI: chart-lollipop primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.512 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-lollipop.tsx` ships `<ChartLollipop>` -- pure-SVG **lollipop chart** with one thin stick (line from baseline to value position) and one circle head (at the value position) per category. Optimised for sparse categorical data where a bar would feel visually heavy: replaces the rectangle bar with a 1.5px stick + 5px circle so the value position is unambiguous while keeping ink minimal. Distinct from `<ChartBar>` which paints rectangle bars across the full bandWidth, `<ChartDotPlot>` which stacks dots showing frequency at fixed bins (Wilkinson), `<ChartScatter>` / `<ChartBubble>` (11.470) which are 2D xy with both axes encoding values, `<ChartStrip>` (11.492) / `<ChartBeeswarm>` (11.493) which are distribution viewers with many points per group, and `<ChartSlope>` (11.476) which connects two values per category. Vertical (default) and horizontal orientations swap the value/category axes. Configurable `baseline` (default 0) shifts the stick origin; `getLollipopBounds` always expands the range to include the baseline so the stick is visible. `sortOrder='asc'|'desc'` reorders by value (ties broken by original index); default preserves input order. Range auto-derived from items + baseline; collapsed expands +/- 0.5; explicit `valueMin`/`valueMax` clamp out-of-range values to range endpoints instead of dropping them. `valueLabel` / `categoryLabel` axis titles render outside the inner box; `showCategoryLabels` paints per-item category text under (vertical) or beside (horizontal) the band; `showValueLabels` paints per-item value text near the head (positioned above/below based on `isAboveBaseline`). Hover/focus on a head dims every other lollipop to opacity 0.35 and opens a tooltip with the category label and formatted value. Per-item click handler fires with `{item, layout}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `items: readonly ChartLollipopItem[]` ({id, label, value, color?}) / `orientation?` ('vertical'\|'horizontal'; default 'vertical') / `baseline?` (0) / `sortOrder?` ('asc'\|'desc') / `valueMin?` / `valueMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `headRadius?` (5) / `stickWidth?` (1.5) / `markOpacity?` (0.95) / `gridColor?` ('#e2e8f0') / `axisColor?` ('#cbd5e1') / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showBaseline?` (true) / `showCategoryLabels?` (true) / `showValueLabels?` (false) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Lollipop chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatCategory?` / `valueLabel?` / `categoryLabel?` / `onItemClick?({item, layout})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LOLLIPOP_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/HEAD_RADIUS/STICK_WIDTH/BASELINE/OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/ORIENTATION/PALETTE`; `getLollipopDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; invalid index -> color 0; `getLollipopFiniteItems(items)` -- drops items with non-finite values / non-string ids; non-array -> []; `getLollipopBounds(items, baseline?)` -- includes baseline so the stick is visible; empty -> (baseline +/- 0.5); collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLollipopTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `sortLollipopItems(items, order?)` -- returns `{item, originalIndex}` pairs; preserves original index; ties broken by original index ascending; no order -> preserves input order; `computeLollipopLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ items, ticks, valueMin, valueMax, baseline, orientation, innerWidth, innerHeight, bandWidth }`; per-item `{ id, label, value, color, index, originalIndex, centerX, centerY, headX, headY, baselineX, baselineY, stickX1, stickY1, stickX2, stickY2, isAboveBaseline }`; degenerate canvas / empty / no finite -> empty; sticks start at baseline pixel and end at head pixel; `describeLollipopChart(items, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Lollipop chart with N categories. Range <min> (<minLabel>) to <max> (<maxLabel>)."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-lollipop-aria-desc"` span; per-head `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<category label>: <formatted value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-lollipop / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -value-label / -category-label / -baseline / -items / -item / -stick / -head / -value-text / -category-text / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value); root mirrors data-orientation, data-baseline, data-category-count, data-finite-count, data-sort-order, data-animate; item groups mirror data-item-id, data-item-index, data-item-original-index, data-item-color, data-item-value, data-above-baseline, data-hovered; stick/head/value-text/category-text mirror data-item-id. 64 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getLollipopDefaultColor + 3 getLollipopFiniteItems + 5 getLollipopBounds + 3 getLollipopTicks + 4 sortLollipopItems + 12 computeLollipopLayout (incl. baseline inclusion, stick endpoints, sort + originalIndex preservation, above-baseline flag, custom baseline) + 4 describeLollipopChart + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.494-ui-chart-lollipop.md): dumbbell / range lollipop (two heads per category connected by a segment; future `<ChartDumbbell>`); multi-series grouped lollipops (one value per category v1); log-scale value axis (linear only); continuous category axis (categories discrete; value axis is the numeric axis); animated transitions on value/sortOrder changes (snap v1; mount fade only). | 11.495 | UI: chart-cleveland-dot primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.513 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-cleveland-dot.tsx` ships `<ChartClevelandDot>` -- pure-SVG **Cleveland dot plot** (also known as dumbbell chart). Each category has two values rendered as a pair of filled circles on the same row (horizontal) or column (vertical), joined by a thin connector segment whose length encodes the magnitude of the gap. Named after William Cleveland's preferred visual form for paired-value comparisons across many categories. Distinct from `<ChartLollipop>` (11.494) which paints one head + stick from a fixed baseline (Cleveland has TWO heads, independent values, no baseline), `<ChartSlope>` (11.476) which draws two values per item BETWEEN two separate left/right axes (rank-change emphasis; Cleveland uses a single shared value axis), `<ChartBar>` (one value per category as a rectangle), `<ChartDotPlot>` (Wilkinson stacked dots showing frequency), `<ChartStrip>` (11.492) / `<ChartBeeswarm>` (11.493) (distribution viewers), and `<ChartScatter>` / `<ChartBubble>` (11.470) (2D xy). Value axis: range auto-derived from both endpoints across all finite items (collapsed range expands +/- 0.5; empty -> (0..1)); explicit `valueMin` / `valueMax` clamp out-of-range values to range endpoints. `horizontal` (default) maps the value axis to x with categories stacked vertically (Cleveland's preferred form for long category lists); `vertical` maps the value axis to y with categories side by side. Category axis: N items share the inner length evenly (`bandWidth = innerLength / N`). `sortBy = 'before'|'after'|'delta'|'absDelta'` plus `sortOrder = 'asc'|'desc'` reorders items by any column; ties broken by original index; default preserves input order. Dots: two filled circles per item of radius `dotRadius` (default 5); `before` defaults to cyan, `after` defaults to blue, per-item `beforeColor` / `afterColor` override. Connector: thin line from before-dot center to after-dot center, `connectorWidth` (default 1.5). Direction classifier `getClevelandDotDirection(before, after, epsilon?)` returns 'up'|'down'|'flat'; non-finite -> 'flat'; `epsilon` widens the flat band so tiny deltas register as flat (default 0). When `useDeltaColors=true` the connector colours by direction (positive=green, negative=red, neutral=grey); when false (default) the connector is always neutral so the direction signal lives only in the dot positions. Hover/focus on either dot dims every other category to opacity 0.35 and opens a tooltip with the category label, both formatted values, the signed delta, and the direction symbol. Per-dot click handler fires with `{item, layout, series}` where `series` is `'before'` or `'after'`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `items: readonly ChartClevelandDotItem[]` ({id, label, before, after, beforeColor?, afterColor?}) / `orientation?` ('horizontal'\|'vertical'; default 'horizontal') / `beforeLabel?` ('Before') / `afterLabel?` ('After') / `beforeColor?` ('#0891b2') / `afterColor?` ('#2563eb') / `positiveColor?` ('#16a34a') / `negativeColor?` ('#dc2626') / `neutralColor?` ('#94a3b8') / `useDeltaColors?` (false) / `epsilon?` (0) / `sortBy?` / `sortOrder?` / `valueMin?` / `valueMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (360) / `padding?` (48) / `tickCount?` (5) / `dotRadius?` (5) / `connectorWidth?` (1.5) / `markOpacity?` (0.95) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showCategoryLabels?` (true) / `showValueLabels?` (false) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Cleveland dot plot') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatCategory?` / `valueLabel?` / `onItemClick?({item, layout, series})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_CLEVELAND_DOT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/DOT_RADIUS/CONNECTOR_WIDTH/OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/BEFORE_COLOR/AFTER_COLOR/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/NEUTRAL_COLOR/ORIENTATION`; `getClevelandDotDirection(before, after, epsilon?)` -- direction classifier; non-finite -> flat; `getClevelandDotFiniteItems(items)` -- drops items with non-finite before OR after, non-string ids; non-array -> []; `getClevelandDotBounds(items)` -- min/max across both endpoints; empty -> (0..1); collapsed +/- 0.5; `getClevelandDotTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `sortClevelandDotItems(items, sortBy?, order?)` -- returns `{item, originalIndex}` pairs; preserves original index; ties broken by original index ascending; no sortBy -> preserves input order; `computeClevelandDotLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ items, ticks, valueMin, valueMax, orientation, innerWidth, innerHeight, bandWidth, upCount, downCount, flatCount }`; per-item `{ id, label, index, originalIndex, before, after, delta, direction, beforeColor, afterColor, connectorColor, beforeX, beforeY, afterX, afterY, rowCenter }`; degenerate canvas / empty / no finite -> empty; before+after share the same row pixel in horizontal mode (or column in vertical); `describeClevelandDotChart(items, beforeLabel, afterLabel, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Cleveland dot plot comparing <before> to <after> across N categor[y|ies]: U up, D down, F flat. Value range <min> to <max>."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-cleveland-dot-aria-desc"` span; per-dot `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<category>: <beforeLabel> <before> -> <afterLabel> <after> (<direction>) (<series label>)"`. data-section on every node (chart-cleveland-dot / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -value-label / -category-labels / -category-text / -items / -item / -connector / -dot / -value-texts / -value-text / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-before / -tooltip-after / -tooltip-delta / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-orientation, data-category-count, data-finite-count, data-up-count, data-down-count, data-flat-count, data-use-delta-colors, data-sort-by, data-sort-order, data-animate; item groups mirror data-item-id, data-item-index, data-item-original-index, data-item-direction, data-item-before, data-item-after, data-item-delta, data-connector-color, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series (before/after); legend items mirror data-series. 67 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getClevelandDotDirection + 3 getClevelandDotFiniteItems + 3 getClevelandDotBounds + 3 getClevelandDotTicks + 6 sortClevelandDotItems + 14 computeClevelandDotLayout (incl. same-row endpoints horizontal, same-column endpoints vertical, direction recording, up/down/flat counts, connector colour neutral vs delta-colored, per-item color override, non-finite drop, delta recording) + 5 describeClevelandDotChart + 32 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.495-ui-chart-cleveland-dot.md): more than two values per category (use `<ChartParallel>`); highlighted subsets via external selection (hover/focus only); animated transitions on data / sort changes (snap v1; mount fade only); log-scale value axis (linear only); continuous category axis (categories discrete). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w477. Bump 1.11.513. |
| 11.496 | UI: chart-tornado primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.514 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-tornado.tsx` ships `<ChartTornado>` -- pure-SVG **tornado / butterfly chart** for paired magnitude comparison. Each category renders two bars growing in opposite directions from a central axis: `left` value extends leftward, `right` value extends rightward. Classic shape for population pyramids (male/female counts by age band), pros/cons matrices, this-vs-that comparisons across many rows. Distinct from `<ChartClevelandDot>` (11.495) which paints two dots + connector on a single shared value axis (Cleveland emphasizes the gap and dot positions; tornado emphasizes the two magnitudes as proportional bar lengths growing outward), `<ChartBar>` which paints one value per category in one direction, `<ChartStackedBar>` which stacks sub-series within a single bar, `<ChartLollipop>` (11.494) which paints one stick + head from a fixed baseline, and `<ChartFunnel>` which paints progressive narrowing showing stages (tornado has no stage / flow semantics, just paired magnitudes). Two scale modes: **shared** (default; `max = max(all left values, all right values)` so the same ruler applies to both halves -- best when units match and direct magnitude comparison is the goal) and **independent** (each side has its own max; best when units differ greatly between the two columns). Explicit `valueMax` overrides both halves for stable cross-chart comparison. Center axis at `padding + innerWidth/2` (horizontal) or `padding + innerHeight/2` (vertical); `centerGap` (default 4 px) reserves an empty band on each side so bars never touch the center axis. Left half spans `[padding, centerLine - centerGap]`; right half spans `[centerLine + centerGap, padding + innerWidth]`. N items share the inner category-axis length evenly with `bandGap` (default 4) between adjacent rows; `barThickness` defaults to `0.7 * bandWidth` (min 2 px) -- explicit prop wins. Bars: left bar width = `(left/leftMax) * leftHalfWidth`, anchored at the right edge of the left half (grows toward `padding`); right bar width = `(right/rightMax) * rightHalfWidth`, anchored at `rightSideStart` (grows toward the inner right edge). Negative or non-finite values clamp to 0 width. Vertical orientation swaps roles: bars extend up and down from a horizontal center axis; categories tile along the x axis. Five sort keys: `'left'` / `'right'` / `'sum'` (l+r) / `'diff'` (r-l, signed) / `'absDiff'`; ties broken by original index; default preserves input order. Hover/focus on a bar dims every other bar (and the other side of the same item) to opacity 0.3 while the hovered side stays at `barOpacity`; tooltip shows the category label, both formatted values (the hovered side bolded), and the signed diff. Per-bar click handler fires with `{item, layout, side}` where `side` is `'left'` or `'right'`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `items: readonly ChartTornadoItem[]` ({id, label, left, right, leftColor?, rightColor?}) / `orientation?` ('horizontal'\|'vertical'; default 'horizontal') / `scaleMode?` ('shared'\|'independent'; default 'shared') / `leftLabel?` ('Left') / `rightLabel?` ('Right') / `leftColor?` ('#dc2626') / `rightColor?` ('#2563eb') / `sortBy?` ('left'\|'right'\|'sum'\|'diff'\|'absDiff') / `sortOrder?` / `valueMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (360) / `padding?` (48) / `centerGap?` (4) / `bandGap?` (4) / `barThickness?` / `tickCount?` (5) / `barOpacity?` (0.9) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `centerLineColor?` ('#94a3b8') / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showCenterLine?` (true) / `showCategoryLabels?` (true) / `showValueLabels?` (false) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Tornado chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatCategory?` / `valueLabel?` / `onItemClick?({item, layout, side})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_TORNADO_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/CENTER_GAP/TICK_COUNT/BAND_GAP/BAR_OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/CENTER_LINE_COLOR/LEFT_COLOR/RIGHT_COLOR/ORIENTATION/SCALE_MODE`; `getTornadoFiniteItems(items)` -- drops items with non-finite left OR right or non-string ids; non-array -> []; `getTornadoMaxValue(items, side, mode)` -- max across both sides when shared; per-side max when independent; negative clamps to 0; empty -> 1; `getTornadoTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced 0..max; non-positive max -> fallback [0, 1]; `sortTornadoItems(items, sortBy?, order?)` -- returns `{item, originalIndex}` pairs; preserves original index after sort; ties broken by original index ascending; no sortBy -> preserves input order; `computeTornadoLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ items, leftTicks, rightTicks, leftMax, rightMax, orientation, scaleMode, innerWidth, innerHeight, bandWidth, barThickness, centerLine, leftSideStart, leftSideEnd, rightSideStart, rightSideEnd }`; per-item `{ id, label, index, originalIndex, left, right, diff, sum, leftColor, rightColor, leftX, leftY, leftWidth, leftHeight, rightX, rightY, rightWidth, rightHeight, rowCenter }`; degenerate canvas / empty / no finite -> empty; bars symmetric around center axis horizontally + vertically; explicit valueMax overrides auto; explicit barThickness overrides 0.7*bandWidth default; `describeTornadoChart(items, leftLabel, rightLabel, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Tornado chart comparing <left> and <right> across N categor[y|ies]. Peak <left> <leftMax>, peak <right> <rightMax>."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-tornado-aria-desc"` span; per-bar `<rect role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<category>: <sideLabel> <value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-tornado / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -value-label / -center-line / -category-labels / -category-text / -items / -item / -bar / -value-texts / -value-text / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-left / -tooltip-right / -tooltip-diff / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-orientation, data-scale-mode, data-category-count, data-finite-count, data-left-max, data-right-max, data-sort-by, data-sort-order, data-animate; item groups mirror data-item-id, data-item-index, data-item-original-index, data-item-left, data-item-right, data-item-diff, data-item-sum, data-hovered; bars mirror data-item-id, data-side (left/right); grid lines mirror data-side, data-tick-value; ticks mirror data-side, data-tick-value; legend items mirror data-side. 65 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getTornadoFiniteItems + 4 getTornadoMaxValue + 2 getTornadoTicks + 7 sortTornadoItems + 13 computeTornadoLayout (incl. left half placement, right half placement, same-row positioning, shared scale, independent scale, negative clamp to 0, sortBy + sortOrder, explicit barThickness, diff + sum recording, per-item color override, explicit valueMax wins, centerGap, vertical inversion) + 5 describeTornadoChart + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.496-ui-chart-tornado.md): negative values painted below an internal baseline (v1 clamps to 0; host normalises to magnitudes); animated transitions on data / sort / scaleMode (snap v1; mount fade only); log-scale value axis (linear only); more than two values per category (use `<ChartParallel>`); diverging palette interpolation across the difference (v1 uses two flat colours). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w478. Bump 1.11.514. |
| 11.497 | UI: chart-line-step primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.515 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-step.tsx` ships `<ChartLineStep>` -- pure-SVG step-line chart with the full family of step interpolation types selectable per render: `'before'` (vh / step left; the new y applies at the *previous* x), `'after'` (hv / step right; the previous y persists until the new x -- default), and `'center'` (hvh / step at midpoint between the two x values). Distinct from the legacy `<ChartStep>` primitive (which paints a single hardcoded step variant suited for staircase-style cumulative data); chart-line-step exposes the step type as a first-class prop and adds the `center` mode that chart-step does not support. Distinct from `<ChartLine>` (continuous straight or smooth segments between points, no horizontal-vertical decomposition), `<ChartArea>` (filled area below the curve), `<ChartStream>` / `<ChartStreamgraph>` (stacked stream layers with curve interpolation), `<ChartScatter>` (2D points without connecting line). Canonical exported builder `buildStepLinePath(points, stepType)`: input is *pixel-space* points; output is SVG path with `M` / `H` / `V` commands (3 decimal places). After: emits `H curr.x V curr.y` per segment. Before: emits `V curr.y H curr.x` per segment. Center: emits `H midX V curr.y H curr.x` per segment where `midX = (prev.x + curr.x) / 2`. Empty input -> empty path; single point -> a lone `M` (degenerate). Multi-series with per-series colour via 10-color palette + per-series override. `getLineStepBounds` auto-derives `(xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax)` from every finite point across visible series; collapsed axes expand `+/- 0.5`; empty -> unit square `(0..1, 0..1)`; explicit `xMin` / `xMax` / `yMin` / `yMax` props override per axis. Hover/focus on a dot opens a tooltip showing series label + formatted `x` (via `formatX`) + formatted `y` (via `formatValue`) and dims every other dot to opacity 0.3 plus dims every other series stroke to opacity 0.3 (the hovered series stays at full opacity). Per-dot click handler fires with `{series, point}`. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled via `hiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`, uncontrolled via `defaultHiddenSeries`). `onSeriesToggle({series, hidden})` fires on legend click. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineStepSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly {x, y}[], color?}) / `stepType?` ('before'\|'after'\|'center'; default 'after') / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `dotRadius?` (3) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showDots?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Step line chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_STEP_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/TYPE/PALETTE`; `getLineStepDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; invalid index -> color 0; `getLineStepFinitePoints(points)` -- drops points with non-finite x or y; non-array -> []; `getLineStepBounds(series, hidden?)` -- per-axis bounds across visible series; empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLineStepTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `buildStepLinePath(points, stepType)` -- canonical SVG path builder; emits M then H/V per step type; empty -> ''; single -> M only; `computeLineStepLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, stepType, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series `{ id, label, index, color, points, finiteCount, totalCount, path }`; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty; drops non-finite points but keeps totalCount; preserves originalIndex through hidden-series filter; `describeLineStepChart(series, hidden?, stepType?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Step line chart (<stepType>) with N series and K points. x range <xMin> to <xMax>, y range <yMin> to <yMax>."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-step-aria-desc"` span; per-path `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: step line with K points"`; per-dot `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: x=<x>, y=<y>"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-step / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-step-type, data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; grid lines + ticks mirror data-axis (x/y), data-tick-value; legend items mirror data-series-id, data-hidden. 61 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getLineStepDefaultColor + 2 getLineStepFinitePoints + 4 getLineStepBounds + 3 getLineStepTicks + 6 buildStepLinePath (empty, single point, after H-then-V, before V-then-H, center H-V-H, multi-segment) + 9 computeLineStepLayout (incl. paths differ across step types, hidden series filter preserves index, drops non-finite but keeps totalCount) + 4 describeLineStepChart + 30 component (incl. distinct paths per step type, controlled+uncontrolled hidden, hover dim, focus tooltip)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.497-ui-chart-line-step.md): smooth curve interpolation (cardinal / catmullRom / linear; use `<ChartLine>` or `<ChartStreamgraph>`); filled area below the step (use `<ChartArea>`); log-scale axes (linear only); animated transitions on data / stepType change (snap v1; mount fade only); per-point marker shapes (circle only).
