| 11.730 | UI: chart-line-pivot-fibonacci primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.748 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-pivot-fibonacci.tsx` ships `<ChartLinePivotFibonacci>` -- a pure-SVG SINGLE-PANEL line chart with **Fibonacci pivot level** overlays at 0.382 / 0.618 / 1.0 of the prior bar range. Each bar carries a pivot point `pp = (prevHigh + prevLow + prevClose) / 3` and three pairs of resistance / support levels offset by Fibonacci ratios of the PRIOR bar's range `range = prevHigh - prevLow`: `R1 = pp + 0.382 * range`, `R2 = pp + 0.618 * range`, `R3 = pp + 1.0 * range`, and the symmetric S levels. The first bar has no prior and carries null on every level. Each defined bar's seven levels render as bar-wide horizontal stub segments so the chart reads as a STEP FUNCTION of pivot levels for the close to interact with. `classifyLinePivotFibonacciZone(close, levels)` marks a bar by which band the close sits in: `above-r2` / `r1-to-r2` / `pp-to-r1` / `s1-to-pp` / `s2-to-s1` / `below-s2` / `none`. The implementation has three exact-style anchors. The CONSTANT-SERIES ANCHOR: prev `H = L = C = 5` -> `range = 0`, `pp = 5`. Every R/S level is `5 + ratio * 0 = 5` (multiplication by 0 is bit-exact). Every level reads exactly 5 (`toBe(5)`). The WORKED INTEGER ANCHOR: prev `H = 12, L = 6, C = 9` -> `range = 6` bit-exact, `pp = 27/3 = 9` bit-exact. At the 1.0 ratio: `R3 = 9 + 6 = 15` bit-exact, `S3 = 9 - 6 = 3` bit-exact. At 0.382 and 0.618 the products are transcendental in binary so the levels are asserted with `toBeCloseTo(_, 12)`. The MIRROR IDENTITY: `Sk = 2 * PP - Rk` for k = 1, 2, 3 within ULP. The STRICT ORDER `R3 > R2 > R1 > PP > S1 > S2 > S3` for any positive range. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLineBollinger>` / `<ChartLineKeltner>` -- those are symmetric bands around a rolling MEAN; the Fibonacci pivot projects forward from a SINGLE PRIOR bar's HLC, refreshing every bar. vs `<ChartLineVolatilityStop>` -- the Volatility Stop is a DIRECTIONAL trailing stop that flips on a cross; the Fibonacci pivot is a static set of horizontal levels per bar. vs other pivot variants (Camarilla, Woodie, Classic) -- those use different offset coefficients on the same prior-bar reference; the Fibonacci variant uses the golden-ratio fractions 0.382 / 0.618 plus a 1.0 outer level. The defining trait: the first single-bar projection primitive in the family, refreshing all seven levels every bar from the prior HLC. API: `data` (`{x, high, low, close}[]`); `ratios` (partial; default `{level1: 0.382, level2: 0.618, level3: 1}`, per-key fallback for non-finite / negative); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags (`showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots`/`showPp`/`showLevel1`/`showLevel2`/`showLevel3`/`showMarkers`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`)/controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`pp`/`r1`/`s1`/`r2`/`s2`/`r3`/`s3`)/callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PIVOT_FIBONACCI_*`; `ChartLinePivotFibonacciZone` type (six bands + `none`); `ChartLinePivotFibonacciSeriesId` type (`price`|`pp`|`r1`|`s1`|`r2`|`s2`|`r3`|`s3`); `ChartLinePivotFibonacciLevels` interface (`{pp, r1, s1, r2, s2, r3, s3, range}` all nullable); `getLinePivotFibonacciFinitePoints` (keeps finite x/high/low/close + `high >= low`); `normalizeLinePivotFibonacciRatios(ratios, fallback)` (per-key fallback; accepts zero); `computeLinePivotFibonacciLevels(prev, ratios)` (null prev or non-finite -> nulls); `computeLinePivotFibonacci(bars, ratios)` (per-bar levels; bar 0 nulls); `classifyLinePivotFibonacciZone(close, levels)` (six zones, the `>=` boundary at PP -> `pp-to-r1`); `runLinePivotFibonacci(points, options?)` (returns full `{series, ratios, levels, samples, ppFinal, aboveCount, belowCount, betweenCount, ok}`); each sample `{index, x, high, low, close, levels, zone}`; `computeLinePivotFibonacciLayout({data, ratios, ...})` -- single panel with the close line, seven level stub segments per defined bar (each segment spans `stepX` wide and sits at the level's y), one marker per defined-zone bar coloured by zone band; `describeLinePivotFibonacciChart` (ARIA summary mentioning the ratios, the pivot formula, the warm-up first bar, the count of bars above/below/between, and the final pivot). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"`, sr-only aria-desc span; close line + dots + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-pivot-fibonacci / -aria-desc / -svg / -empty / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -tick-label / -price-path / -dots / -dot / -segments / -segment / -markers / -marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-close / -tooltip-r3 / -tooltip-r2 / -tooltip-r1 / -tooltip-pp / -tooltip-s1 / -tooltip-zone / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats / -badge / -badge-icon / -badge-config). Root mirrors `data-ratio-level1`, `data-ratio-level2`, `data-ratio-level3`, `data-pp-final`, `data-above-count`, `data-below-count`, `data-between-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; segments expose `data-series-id` and `data-value`; markers expose `data-zone` and `data-close`. The PP segment renders at full opacity in the pp colour; R1/R2/R3 in resistance red with decreasing opacity for the outer levels; S1/S2/S3 in support green. Tooltip shows x, close, R3/R2/R1/PP/S1 readings, zone. Config badge `FIBPIVOT <level1>/<level2>/<level3>`. Legend has Close + PP + R1/S1 + R2/S2 + R3/S3 toggle items. 71 vitest cases (getLinePivotFibonacciFinitePoints 4; normalizeLinePivotFibonacciRatios 4 incl. **per-key fallback** + **accepts zero**; computeLinePivotFibonacciLevels 10 incl. **null prev** + **non-finite prev** + **the worked anchor pp=9 range=6 bit-exact** + **R3 = 15 bit-exact** + **S3 = 3 bit-exact** + **R1 close to 9 + 0.382 * 6 to 12 places** + **R2 close to 9 + 0.618 * 6** + **mirror identity within ULP** + **constant series -> all levels = 5 bit-exact** + **strict order R3 > R2 > R1 > PP > S1 > S2 > S3**; computeLinePivotFibonacci 5; classifyLinePivotFibonacciZone 8 incl. **the at-PP `>=` rule (pp-to-r1)**; runLinePivotFibonacci 10; computeLinePivotFibonacciLayout 10 incl. **28 segments for WORKED (4 defined bars * 7 levels)**; describeLinePivotFibonacciChart 5; component 15 incl. **28 segments rendered** + **showPp=false hides PP** + **showLevel3=false hides R3 and S3** + config badge `FIBPIVOT 0.382/0.618/1`) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files (conditional spreads honour `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` guarded via `!` on `levels[i]!` and `bars[i-1] ?? null`). Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w712. Bump 1.11.748. |
| 11.731 | UI: chart-line-pivot-demark primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.749 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-pivot-demark.tsx` ships `<ChartLinePivotDemark>` -- a pure-SVG SINGLE-PANEL line chart with **DeMark pivot** level overlays from the prior bar's open, close, and direction. Each bar carries three levels (PP/R1/S1) projected from the PRIOR bar via the DIRECTION-DEPENDENT X seed: bullish `X = 2*H + L + C`, bearish `X = H + 2*L + C`, neutral `X = H + L + 2*C`, then `PP = X/4`, `R1 = X/2 - L`, `S1 = X/2 - H`. The first bar has no prior and carries null on every level. Each defined bar's three levels render as bar-wide horizontal stub segments. `classifyLinePivotDemarkZone(close, levels)` marks `above-r1` / `pp-to-r1` / `s1-to-pp` / `below-s1` / `none` (the at-PP `>=` rule lands in `pp-to-r1`). The implementation has four exact-style anchors all integer-rational. The CONSTANT-SERIES ANCHOR: prev `O=H=L=C=5` -> direction = neutral, `X = 5+5+10 = 20`, every level reads 5 bit-exact. The BULLISH ANCHOR: prev `O=10, H=14, L=8, C=12` (C > O) -> `X = 2*14 + 8 + 12 = 48`, `PP = 12`, `R1 = 24 - 8 = 16`, `S1 = 24 - 14 = 10`, all bit-exact integer. The BEARISH ANCHOR: prev `O=12, H=14, L=8, C=10` (C < O) -> `X = 14 + 2*8 + 10 = 40`, `PP = 10`, `R1 = 20 - 8 = 12`, `S1 = 20 - 14 = 6`, all bit-exact integer. The NEUTRAL ANCHOR: prev `O=10, H=14, L=8, C=10` (C == O) -> `X = 14 + 8 + 2*10 = 42`, `PP = 10.5`, `R1 = 21 - 8 = 13`, `S1 = 21 - 14 = 7`, all bit-exact (1/2 is dyadic in IEEE 754). The STRICT ORDER `R1 > PP > S1` for any non-degenerate prior. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLinePivotFibonacci>` -- the Fibonacci pivot uses a fixed `pp = (H+L+C)/3` plus three Fibonacci-ratio offsets of the range; the DeMark pivot's X seed is DIRECTION-DEPENDENT, doubling whichever extreme matches the direction so the projection naturally tilts toward the prior bar's bias. vs Camarilla / Woodie / Classic pivots -- those use fixed coefficients independent of direction. vs `<ChartLineVolatilityStop>` -- the Volatility Stop is a DIRECTIONAL trailing stop that flips on a cross; the DeMark pivot is a static set of horizontal levels per bar projected from the prior. The defining trait: the first DIRECTION-AWARE prior-bar projection in the family -- bullish bias tilts X toward double-H, bearish toward double-L, neutral toward double-C. API: `data` (`{x, open, high, low, close}[]`); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags (`showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots`/`showPp`/`showR1`/`showS1`/`showMarkers`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`)/controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`pp`/`r1`/`s1`)/callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PIVOT_DEMARK_*`; `ChartLinePivotDemarkDirection` type (`bullish`|`bearish`|`neutral`); `ChartLinePivotDemarkZone` type (4 bands + `none`); `ChartLinePivotDemarkSeriesId` type (`price`|`pp`|`r1`|`s1`); `ChartLinePivotDemarkLevels` interface (`{direction, x, pp, r1, s1}` all nullable); `getLinePivotDemarkFinitePoints` (keeps finite OHLC + `high >= low`); `computeLinePivotDemarkDirection(bar)`; `computeLinePivotDemarkX(bar)` (returns `{direction, x}`); `computeLinePivotDemarkLevels(prev)` (returns `{direction, x, pp, r1, s1}`; null prev or non-finite -> nulls); `computeLinePivotDemark(bars)` (per-bar levels; bar 0 nulls); `classifyLinePivotDemarkZone(close, levels)`; `runLinePivotDemark(points)` (returns full `{series, levels, samples, ppFinal, aboveCount, belowCount, betweenCount, ok}`); each sample `{index, x, open, high, low, close, levels, zone}`; `computeLinePivotDemarkLayout({data, ...})` -- single panel with the close line, three level stub segments per defined bar, one marker per defined-zone bar coloured by zone band; `describeLinePivotDemarkChart` (ARIA summary mentioning the direction-dependent X formula, the pivot formula, the warm-up first bar, the count of bars above/below/between). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"`, sr-only aria-desc span; close line + dots + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-pivot-demark / -aria-desc / -svg / -empty / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -tick-label / -price-path / -dots / -dot / -segments / -segment / -markers / -marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-close / -tooltip-direction / -tooltip-r1 / -tooltip-pp / -tooltip-s1 / -tooltip-zone / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats / -badge / -badge-icon / -badge-config). Root mirrors `data-pp-final`, `data-above-count`, `data-below-count`, `data-between-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; segments expose `data-series-id` and `data-value`; markers expose `data-zone` and `data-close`. Tooltip shows x, close, prior direction (Bullish/Bearish/Neutral/n/a), R1, PP, S1, zone. Config badge `DEMARK PIVOT`. Legend has Close + PP + R1 + S1 toggle items. 70 vitest cases (getLinePivotDemarkFinitePoints 4; computeLinePivotDemarkDirection 3 incl. **bullish/bearish/neutral**; computeLinePivotDemarkX 3 incl. **the three direction-dependent X anchors bit-exact**; computeLinePivotDemarkLevels 7 incl. **all three worked anchors bit-exact** + **constant -> 5** + **strict R1 > PP > S1**; computeLinePivotDemark 4; classifyLinePivotDemarkZone 8 incl. **the at-PP `>=` rule** + at-S1; runLinePivotDemark 10; computeLinePivotDemarkLayout 10 incl. **12 segments for WORKED (4 defined bars * 3 levels)**; describeLinePivotDemarkChart 5; component 16 incl. **12 segments rendered** + **showPp=false hides PP** + **showR1=false hides R1** + config badge `DEMARK PIVOT`) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files (conditional spreads honour `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` guarded via `!` on `levels[i]!` and `bars[i-1] ?? null`). | 11.732 | UI: chart-line-pivot-woodie primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.750 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-pivot-woodie.tsx` ships `<ChartLinePivotWoodie>` -- a pure-SVG single-panel line chart with **Woodie pivot** level overlays. Woodie doubles the close in the pivot point so the levels lean toward the prior close. From the prior bar `(H, L, C)`: `range = H - L`, `PP = (H + L + 2*C) / 4`, `R1 = 2*PP - L`, `S1 = 2*PP - H`, `R2 = PP + range`, `S2 = PP - range`. Five step-function level lines per defined bar; the first bar has no prior and is null on every level. Three exact-style anchors all integer-rational: constant series -> every level = constant bit-exact; worked anchor A `(H=12, L=8, C=10)` -> `PP=10, R1=12, S1=8, R2=14, S2=6` integer-exact; worked anchor B `(H=14, L=6, C=12)` -> `PP=11, R1=16, S1=8, R2=19, S2=3` integer-exact. Strict order `R2 > R1 > PP > S1 > S2`. Two algebraic identities bit-exact: `R2 + S2 = 2*PP` (PP-symmetric pair) and `R1 + S1 = 4*PP - H - L`. Plus `R2 - PP = range`, `PP - S2 = range`. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLinePivotFibonacci>` -- Fibonacci uses single-weighted close; Woodie doubles it. vs `<ChartLinePivotDemark>` -- DeMark X is direction-dependent; Woodie is direction-agnostic. vs classic floor pivot -- Classic uses `(H+L+C)/3`; Woodie uses `(H+L+2C)/4` so a strong close pulls the pivot harder. The defining trait: the only pivot variant where the prior close gets a double weight in PP, making the levels TRACK CLOSE more than the range. API: `data` (`{x, high, low, close}[]`); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus toggle flags + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`pp`/`r1`/`s1`/`r2`/`s2`) + callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PIVOT_WOODIE_*`; `ChartLinePivotWoodieZone` type (6 bands + `none`); `ChartLinePivotWoodieSeriesId`; `ChartLinePivotWoodieLevels` interface; `getLinePivotWoodieFinitePoints` (keeps finite OHLC + `high >= low`); `computeLinePivotWoodieLevels(prev)`; `computeLinePivotWoodie(bars)`; `classifyLinePivotWoodieZone(close, levels)` (at-PP `>=` rule); `runLinePivotWoodie`; `computeLinePivotWoodieLayout` (one panel + 5 stub segments per defined bar + marker per zone bar); `describeLinePivotWoodieChart` (ARIA summary). ARIA: root region + img-role SVG + sr-only aria-desc; close line + dots + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node. Root mirrors `data-pp-final`, `data-above-count/-below-count/-between-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; segments expose `data-series-id`/`data-value`; markers `data-zone`/`data-close`. Tooltip shows x + close + R2 + R1 + PP + S1 + zone. Config badge `WOODIE PIVOT`. Legend: Close + PP + R1/S1 + R2/S2. 68 vitest cases (getLinePivotWoodieFinitePoints 4; computeLinePivotWoodieLevels 8 incl. **both worked anchors bit-exact** + **constant -> 5** + **strict order** + **R2+S2=2*PP** + **R1+S1=4*PP-H-L** + **R2-PP=range and PP-S2=range**; computeLinePivotWoodie 5; classifyLinePivotWoodieZone 10; runLinePivotWoodie 9; computeLinePivotWoodieLayout 10 incl. **20 segments for WORKED**; describeLinePivotWoodieChart 5; component 17 incl. **showPp=false** + **showLevel2=false**) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean (`exactOptionalPropertyTypes` + `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` guarded). Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w714. Bump 1.11.750. |
| 11.733 | UI: chart-line-pivot-classic primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.751 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-pivot-classic.tsx` ships `<ChartLinePivotClassic>` -- a pure-SVG single-panel line chart with **Classic Floor Pivot** overlays for the pivot, S1, S2, R1, R2 lines. From the PRIOR bar `(H, L, C)`: `range = H - L`, `PP = (H + L + C) / 3` (close weighted once), `R1 = 2*PP - L`, `S1 = 2*PP - H`, `R2 = PP + range`, `S2 = PP - range`. Five step-function level lines per defined bar; the first bar has no prior and carries null on every level. `classifyLinePivotClassicZone(close, levels)` marks `above-r2` / `r1-to-r2` / `pp-to-r1` / `s1-to-pp` / `s2-to-s1` / `below-s2` / `none` (at-PP `>=` rule). Three exact-style anchors all integer-rational: constant `H=L=C=K` -> every level = K bit-exact; worked anchor A `(H=12, L=8, C=10)` -> sum 30, `PP=10`, `range=4`, `R1=12, S1=8, R2=14, S2=6` integer-exact; worked anchor B `(H=15, L=6, C=9)` -> sum 30, `PP=10`, `range=9`, `R1=14, S1=5, R2=19, S2=1` integer-exact. Strict order `R2 > R1 > PP > S1 > S2`. Algebraic identities bit-exact: `R2 + S2 = 2*PP` (R2/S2 PP-symmetric) and `R1 + S1 = 4*PP - H - L`. Direct Classic-vs-Woodie sanity check on `(H=10, L=8, C=11)`: Classic `PP = 29/3 ~= 9.67`, Woodie would give 10. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLinePivotWoodie>` -- Classic uses `(H+L+C)/3` (close weighted ONCE); Woodie uses `(H+L+2C)/4` (close DOUBLED). Same R/S formulas otherwise. vs `<ChartLinePivotFibonacci>` -- Fibonacci uses the same `(H+L+C)/3` PP but offsets R/S by Fibonacci ratios of the range instead of the R1/S1 lever-arm formula. vs `<ChartLinePivotDemark>` -- DeMark's X seed is direction-dependent; Classic weighs OHL equally. The defining trait: the BASELINE pivot variant in the family, with the simplest 3-way average PP and the symmetric `2*PP - L / 2*PP - H` R1/S1 plus `PP +/- range` R2/S2 formulas. API: `data` (`{x, high, low, close}[]`); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus toggle flags (incl. `showPp`/`showLevel1`/`showLevel2`) + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`pp`/`r1`/`s1`/`r2`/`s2`) + callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PIVOT_CLASSIC_*`; `ChartLinePivotClassicZone` (6 bands + `none`); `ChartLinePivotClassicSeriesId`; `ChartLinePivotClassicLevels`; `getLinePivotClassicFinitePoints` (keeps finite OHLC + `high >= low`); `computeLinePivotClassicLevels(prev)`; `computeLinePivotClassic(bars)`; `classifyLinePivotClassicZone(close, levels)`; `runLinePivotClassic`; `computeLinePivotClassicLayout` (one panel + 5 stub segments per defined bar + marker per zone bar); `describeLinePivotClassicChart` (ARIA summary). | 11.734 | UI: chart-line-aroon-up primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.752 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-aroon-up.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAroonUp>` -- a pure-SVG two-panel chart with an **Aroon Up** panel from the distance to the most recent high scaled to the lookback window. For each bar `i`, the window `[i - period .. i]` is scanned for the highest high; the most-recent bar wins on a tie (strict `>`). The reading is `aroonUp = 100 * (period - barsSinceHigh) / period`, bounded `[0, 100]` with reference lines at 70 (strong uptrend) and 30 (weak). Pure rational arithmetic, no transcendentals -- integer fixtures compute to exact integer values. Three bit-exact anchors: rising series `[1..10]` -> highest is the current bar -> `aroonUp = 100` at every defined bar; falling `[10..1]` -> highest is the oldest -> `aroonUp = 0`; constant `[5 x 10]` -> ties resolve to most-recent -> `aroonUp = 100`. The WORKED PEAK FIXTURE highs `[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2]` at period 4 hits exactly `[null x4, 100, 100, 75, 50, 25, 0]` -- the high peaks at bar 5, then ages out in 25-point steps. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLineAroonOsc>` -- the Oscillator is `Aroon Up - Aroon Down` in `[-100, 100]`; this primitive isolates the Aroon Up half in `[0, 100]` with its own threshold band. vs `<ChartLineRsi>` -- the RSI measures bar-to-bar price changes; Aroon Up measures the RECENCY of the highest high. vs `<ChartLineStochastic>` -- the Stochastic ranks the current close inside the lookback's range; Aroon Up ranks the TIME of the high. The defining trait: a one-sided recency percent of the highest high, with the most-recent-tie rule that pins a constant series to 100. API: `data` (`{x, high}[]`); `period` (default 25, integer >= 1); `thresholdHigh` (default 70) and `thresholdLow` (default 30) both in `[0, 100]`; standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `pricePanelRatio`/`gap`/`strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`aroonUp`) + callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_AROON_UP_*`; `CHART_LINE_AROON_UP_MIN/MAX = 0/100`; `ChartLineAroonUpZone` (`strong`|`mid`|`weak`|`none`); `getLineAroonUpFinitePoints` (keeps finite x + high); `normalizeLineAroonUpPeriod`; `normalizeLineAroonUpThreshold` (in `[0, 100]`); `computeLineAroonUp(bars, period)` (warm-up null; most-recent-tie rule); `classifyLineAroonUpZone(value, thresholdHigh, thresholdLow)` (at-or-above high -> strong, at-or-below low -> weak); `runLineAroonUp` (returns full `{series, period, thresholdHigh, thresholdLow, aroonUp, samples, aroonUpFinal, strongCount, midCount, weakCount, ok}`); `computeLineAroonUpLayout` (two panels stacked, Aroon panel fixed `[-5, 105]`, threshold lines + markers); `describeLineAroonUpChart` (ARIA summary). ARIA: root region + img-role SVG + sr-only aria-desc; high line + dots + aroon line + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node. Root mirrors `data-period`, `data-threshold-high/-low`, `data-aroon-up-final`, `data-strong-count/-mid-count/-weak-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; grid/axis/panel-label nodes carry `data-panel="price"|"aroon"`; threshold lines `data-direction="high"|"low"`; markers `data-zone`/`data-aroon-up`. Tooltip shows x + high + Aroon Up + zone. Config badge `AROON UP <period>`. Legend: High + Aroon Up. 67 vitest cases (getLineAroonUpFinitePoints 4; normalizeLineAroonUpPeriod 4; normalizeLineAroonUpThreshold 5 incl. **accepts 0 and 100**; computeLineAroonUp 8 incl. **rising -> 100 bit-exact** + **falling -> 0 bit-exact** + **constant -> 100 bit-exact** + **worked peak fixture toEqual** + `[0, 100]` bound; classifyLineAroonUpZone 5 incl. **at-or-above high -> strong** + **at-or-below low -> weak**; runLineAroonUp 12; computeLineAroonUpLayout 10; describeLineAroonUpChart 5; component 14 incl. **threshold lines x 2 by default** + **showThresholdLines=false hides both**) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.735 | UI: chart-line-aroon-down primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.753 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-aroon-down.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAroonDown>` -- a pure-SVG two-panel chart with an **Aroon Down** panel from the distance to the most recent low scaled to the lookback window. Mirror of Aroon Up but for the LOWEST LOW. For each bar `i`, the window `[i - period .. i]` is scanned for the lowest low; the most-recent bar wins on a tie (strict `<`). `aroonDown = 100 * (period - barsSinceLow) / period`, bounded `[0, 100]` with reference lines at 70 (strong downtrend) and 30 (weak). Pure rational arithmetic, no transcendentals -- integer fixtures compute to exact integer values. Three bit-exact anchors: rising `[1..10]` -> lowest is the OLDEST -> `aroonDown = 0`; falling `[10..1]` -> every bar makes a new low -> `aroonDown = 100`; constant `[5 x 10]` -> ties resolve to most-recent -> `aroonDown = 100`. The WORKED VALLEY FIXTURE lows `[6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5]` at period 4 hits exactly `[null x4, 100, 100, 75, 50, 25, 0]` -- the low bottoms at bar 5, then ages out in 25-point steps. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLineAroonUp>` -- mirror primitive scanning for the HIGHEST high; this scans for the LOWEST low. Same `[0, 100]` band and threshold conventions, but the meaning of "strong" flips: a high Aroon Down reading means a fresh low (strong DOWNTREND), not a fresh high. vs `<ChartLineAroonOsc>` -- the Oscillator is `Aroon Up - Aroon Down` in `[-100, 100]`; this isolates the Aroon Down half. vs `<ChartLineRsi>` -- the RSI measures bar-to-bar price changes; Aroon Down measures the RECENCY of the lowest low. The defining trait: a one-sided recency percent of the lowest low, with the most-recent-tie rule. API: `data` (`{x, low}[]`); `period` (default 25, integer >= 1); `thresholdHigh` (default 70) and `thresholdLow` (default 30) both in `[0, 100]`; standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `pricePanelRatio`/`gap`/`strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`aroonDown`) + callbacks. | 11.736 | UI: chart-line-stoch-momentum-index primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.754 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-stoch-momentum-index.tsx` ships `<ChartLineStochMomentumIndex>` -- a pure-SVG DUAL-PANEL line chart with a **Stochastic Momentum Index** panel (William Blau) from the double-smoothed midpoint distance scaled by the half-range. For each bar with a filled lookback: `HH = max(high)`, `LL = min(low)`, `midpoint = (HH + LL) / 2`, `halfRange = (HH - LL) / 2`, `distance = close - midpoint`. The distance and the halfRange are each smoothed twice with EMAs of lengths `smooth1` and `smooth2`, then divided: `SMI = 100 * smoothed(distance) / smoothed(halfRange)`. A zero smoothed halfRange (constant series) leaves the bar null. Bounded `[-100, 100]`: +100 at a new high, -100 at a new low, 0 at the midpoint. Three exact-style anchors survive the EMA arithmetic by construction. The CONSTANT-SERIES ANCHOR: `H=L=C=5` -> halfRange = 0 -> smoothed halfRange = 0 -> SMI null at every defined bar. The CENTERED ANCHOR: `H=10, L=0, C=5` at every bar -> `distance = 5 - 5 = 0` exact, `halfRange = 5` exact. The EMA of a constant zero is zero (zero arithmetic) and the EMA of a constant 5 is 5; SMI = `100 * 0 / 5 = 0` bit-exact at every defined bar. The ALL-HIGH ANCHOR: `H = 10 + i, L = 0, C = 10 + i` -> current bar is always the highest -> `distance = halfRange` at every bar. The two legs feed identical values into the EMAs so the ratio is exactly 1 and SMI = 100 bit-exact. The ALL-LOW ANCHOR mirrors to -100 bit-exact. `[-100, 100]` bound on a varied wave. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLineStochastic>` -- the standard Stochastic measures `100 * (close - LL) / (HH - LL)` in `[0, 100]`; SMI uses the close-to-MIDPOINT distance over the HALF-range, double-smoothed, in `[-100, 100]`. SMI is centred on zero with symmetric overbought / oversold zones. vs `<ChartLineRsi>` -- the RSI is a bar-to-bar change rate; SMI is a level-versus-range reading like the Stochastic but centred and smoothed. vs `<ChartLineErgodic>` -- the Ergodic Oscillator is a triple-smoothed momentum ratio; SMI is a level-position reading. The defining trait: a CENTRED double-smoothed Stochastic that turns the standard `[0, 100]` reading into a `[-100, 100]` reading with the bar's position relative to the midpoint (not the low). API: `data` (`{x, high, low, close}[]`); `period` (default 10, integer >= 1); `smooth1`/`smooth2` (default 3); `threshold` (default 40, in `(0, 100]`); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `pricePanelRatio`/`gap`/`strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`smi`) + callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_STOCH_MOMENTUM_INDEX_*`; `CHART_LINE_STOCH_MOMENTUM_INDEX_EPSILON = 1e-12`; `ChartLineStochMomentumIndexZone` (`overbought`|`neutral`|`oversold`|`none`); `getLineStochMomentumIndexFinitePoints` (keeps finite OHLC + `high >= low`); `normalizeLineStochMomentumIndexPeriod`/`Smooth`/`Threshold`; `computeLineStochMomentumIndexEma(values, length)` (alpha = 2/(N+1), null propagation, seed at first defined value); `computeLineStochMomentumIndexLegs(bars, period)` (per-bar `{distance, halfRange}`; warm-up null); `computeLineStochMomentumIndex(bars, period, smooth1, smooth2)` (the double-smoothed SMI; null when smoothed halfRange below epsilon); `classifyLineStochMomentumIndexZone(value, threshold)` (at-or-above threshold -> overbought, at-or-below -threshold -> oversold); `runLineStochMomentumIndex` (returns full `{series, period, smooth1, smooth2, threshold, smi, samples, smiFinal, overboughtCount, oversoldCount, neutralCount, ok}`); `computeLineStochMomentumIndexLayout` (two panels stacked, SMI panel fixed `[-110, 110]`, zero line + threshold lines + markers); `describeLineStochMomentumIndexChart` (ARIA summary mentioning the indicator, midpoint, period, smoothings, bound, zone counts). ARIA: root region + img-role SVG + sr-only aria-desc; close line + dots + smi line + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node. Root mirrors `data-period`, `data-smooth1`, `data-smooth2`, `data-threshold`, `data-smi-final`, `data-overbought-count/-oversold-count/-neutral-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; grid/axis/panel-label nodes carry `data-panel="price"|"smi"`; threshold lines `data-direction="upper"|"lower"`; markers `data-zone`/`data-smi`. Tooltip shows x + close + H/L + SMI + zone. Config badge `SMI <period>/<smooth1>/<smooth2>`. Legend: Close + SMI. 78 vitest cases (getLineStochMomentumIndexFinitePoints 4; normalizeLineStochMomentumIndexPeriod 4; normalizeLineStochMomentumIndexSmooth 3; normalizeLineStochMomentumIndexThreshold 4; computeLineStochMomentumIndexEma 4 incl. **constant -> constant** + **zero -> zero** + **null propagation**; computeLineStochMomentumIndexLegs 4 incl. **CENTERED bit-exact** + **CONST_FLAT bit-exact**; computeLineStochMomentumIndex 7 incl. **CONST -> null** + **CENTERED -> 0 bit-exact** + **ALL-HIGH -> 100 bit-exact** + **ALL-LOW -> -100 bit-exact** + `[-100, 100]` bound + epsilon exposed; classifyLineStochMomentumIndexZone 5; runLineStochMomentumIndex 14; computeLineStochMomentumIndexLayout 10; describeLineStochMomentumIndexChart 5; component 16 incl. **overbought markers on ALL-HIGH** + **oversold markers on ALL-LOW**) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean (`exactOptionalPropertyTypes` + `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` guarded). Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. | 11.737 | UI: chart-line-acceleration-bands primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.755 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-acceleration-bands.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAccelerationBands>` -- a pure-SVG single-panel chart with Price Headley's **Acceleration Bands** envelope overlays from a simple moving average scaled by the high-low range factor. Per bar: `ratio = (H - L) / (H + L)`, `upperFactor = H * (1 + 2*ratio)`, `lowerFactor = L * (1 - 2*ratio)`. Three SMAs over `period`: upper = SMA(upperFactor), middle = SMA(close), lower = SMA(lowerFactor). The first `period - 1` bars are null on every band. Three exact-style anchors with integer fixtures and dyadic ratios: constant `H=L=C=K` -> factor numerator = 0 -> every band = K bit-exact; worked anchor A `(H=10, L=6, C=8)` -> `ratio = 4/16 = 0.25` (dyadic exact) -> `upper = 10*1.5 = 15, middle = 8, lower = 6*0.5 = 3` bit-exact; worked anchor B `(H=12, L=4, C=8)` -> `ratio = 0.5` -> `upper = 12*2 = 24, middle = 8, lower = 4*0 = 0` bit-exact. Distinct from neighbours: vs `<ChartLineBollinger>` -- Bollinger Bands offset the middle SMA by a STANDARD-DEVIATION multiple; Acceleration Bands offset by a HIGH-LOW range factor scaled per bar. Headley's bands widen on volatile bars without a rolling std-dev pass. vs `<ChartLineKeltner>` -- Keltner Channels offset an EMA by an ATR multiple; Acceleration Bands use a per-bar high-low ratio factor and a flat SMA backbone. vs `<ChartLinePivotClassic>` -- pivot bands project from a SINGLE PRIOR bar's HLC; Acceleration Bands project from a ROLLING SMA of factors over `period`. The defining trait: the only band primitive that scales the envelope by a per-bar high-low ratio (not std-dev, not ATR, not prior-bar pivots) and then averages it. API: `data` (`{x, high, low, close}[]`); `period` (default 20, integer >= 1); standard sizing/colour/a11y props plus `strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`tickCount`/toggle flags (`showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots`/`showUpper`/`showMiddle`/`showLower`/`showMarkers`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`) + controlled+uncontrolled `hiddenSeries` (`price`/`upper`/`middle`/`lower`) + callbacks. Pure helpers: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_ACCELERATION_BANDS_*`; `ChartLineAccelerationBandsZone` (4 bands + `none`); `ChartLineAccelerationBandsSeriesId` (`price`|`upper`|`middle`|`lower`); `ChartLineAccelerationBandsLevels` interface (`{upper, middle, lower}` all nullable); `getLineAccelerationBandsFinitePoints` (keeps finite OHLC + `high >= low`); `normalizeLineAccelerationBandsPeriod` (integer >= 1); `computeLineAccelerationBandsFactors(bar)` (returns `{upperFactor, lowerFactor}`; null on null/non-finite/`H + L <= 0`; zero range collapses to `H = L`); `computeLineAccelerationBandsSma(values, period)` (SMA of nullable series; warm-up null; null inside window null-ifies); `computeLineAccelerationBands(bars, period)` (per-bar levels); `classifyLineAccelerationBandsZone(close, levels)` (close > upper -> above-upper; close >= middle -> middle-to-upper; close >= lower -> lower-to-middle; else below-lower); `runLineAccelerationBands` (returns full `{series, period, levels, samples, middleFinal, aboveCount, betweenCount, belowCount, ok}`); `computeLineAccelerationBandsLayout` (single panel + 3 stub segments per defined bar + marker per zone bar); `describeLineAccelerationBandsChart` (ARIA summary). ARIA: root region + img-role SVG + sr-only aria-desc; close line + dots + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node. Root mirrors `data-period`, `data-middle-final`, `data-above-count/-between-count/-below-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`, `data-empty`; segments expose `data-series-id`/`data-value`; markers `data-zone`/`data-close`. Upper rendered red, middle violet, lower green. Tooltip shows x + close + upper + middle + lower + zone. Config badge `ACCEL <period>`. Legend: Close + Upper + Middle + Lower. 74 vitest cases (getLineAccelerationBandsFinitePoints 4; normalizeLineAccelerationBandsPeriod 4; computeLineAccelerationBandsFactors 6 incl. **null prev/non-finite/`H+L<=0`/zero range -> H=L** + **anchor A 15/3 bit-exact** + **anchor B 24/0 bit-exact**; computeLineAccelerationBandsSma 5 incl. **constant -> constant** + **`[1..5]` window 3 -> `[null, null, 2, 3, 4]` bit-exact** + **null propagation**; computeLineAccelerationBands 7 incl. **CONST -> 5/5/5 bit-exact** + **anchor A -> 15/8/3 bit-exact** + **anchor B -> 24/8/0 bit-exact** + **upper >= middle >= lower on wave**; classifyLineAccelerationBandsZone 8 incl. **>= rule at middle / lower**; runLineAccelerationBands 10; computeLineAccelerationBandsLayout 11 incl. **18 segments for ANCHOR_A (6 defined bars * 3 bands)**; describeLineAccelerationBandsChart 5; component 16 incl. **showUpper=false** + **showLower=false** + config badge `ACCEL 5`) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.738 | UI: chart-line-tsf primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.756 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineTsf>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with a Time Series Forecast overlay -- per bar i (lookback period), run OLS over the most recent `period` closes against `j = 0..period-1`, then project the regression line one bar forward: `TSF[i] = intercept + slope * period`. First `period - 1` bars null. Helpers: computeLineTsfRegression (returns {slope,intercept}|null), computeLineTsf, classifyLineTsfTrend (slope sign -> up/down/flat/none), runLineTsf, computeLineTsfLayout, describeLineTsfChart, getLineTsfFinitePoints, normalizeLineTsfPeriod. 71 vitest cases covering: LSQ linear-ramp identity (`close = j + c` -> slope=1, intercept=c bit-exact -> for period 4 on [10..19] TSF = [null*3, 14..20] bit-exact, i.e. TSF[i] = close[i+1]); FALLING mirror; CONST_FLAT (slope=0, TSF=K bit-exact via IEEE 754 `c*0=0`); translation invariance (y -> y+1000 shifts TSF by exactly 1000); the regression line passing through the bar mean at j=(N-1)/2; layout emits one segment between each consecutive defined bar (six on the 10-bar ramp) and one marker per defined bar (seven); component coverage of legend toggle, showTsf=false, onPointClick, ARIA, badge, forwardRef. Component renders price line + segment-coloured TSF (data-trend up/down/flat) + markers, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks throughout. Files: web/src/components/ui/chart-line-tsf.tsx, web/src/components/ui/chart-line-tsf.test.tsx, docs/patches/11.738-ui-chart-line-tsf.md, web/src/components/ui/index.ts (barrel), 4 manifests bumped. |
| 11.739 | UI: chart-line-ehlers-fisher primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.757 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineEhlersFisher>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with an Ehlers Fisher Transform panel. Per bar i (lookback period): hl2=(high+low)/2, HH=max(hl2 over window), LL=min(hl2 over window), ratio = HH==LL ? 0 : (hl2 - LL)/(HH - LL) - 0.5, v[i] = clamp(0.66*ratio + 0.67*v[i-1], -/+0.999), fisher[i] = 0.5*ln((1+v[i])/(1-v[i])) + 0.5*fisher[i-1]. Recurrence seeds at 0. First period-1 bars null. Helpers: computeLineEhlersFisherWindow, computeLineEhlersFisher, classifyLineEhlersFisherZone (overbought/positive/negative/oversold/none), clampLineEhlersFisherNorm, runLineEhlersFisher, computeLineEhlersFisherLayout, describeLineEhlersFisherChart, getLineEhlersFisherFinitePoints, normalizeLineEhlersFisherPeriod, normalizeLineEhlersFisherThreshold. 77 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (high==low==K -> range=0 -> ratio=0 -> norm=0, fisher=0 bit-exact at every defined bar via the seeded recurrence + atanh(0)=0); integer-window identities (RISING: hh=i+10, ll=i-period+1+10 bit-exact; FALLING mirror); RISING vs FALLING antisymmetry (toBeCloseTo(_, 10)); monotonicity (RISING non-decreasing, FALLING non-increasing once warm); clamp bit-exact at +/-CLAMP; translation invariance +1000 leaves fisher unchanged (10dp). Component renders top panel HL2 line + bottom panel Fisher line with zone-coloured markers, zero line, +/- threshold dashed lines, legend toggle, showFisher prop, onPointClick, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.740 | UI: chart-line-projection-bands primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.758 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineProjectionBands>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with Mel Widner Projection Band envelope overlays. Per bar i (lookback period): slope_h = OLS slope of high[i-period+1..i] against j=0..period-1, slope_l = OLS slope of low[...]. For each k in [0..period-1] (j = i-period+1+k): hPrime[k] = high[j] + slope_h*(period-1-k); lPrime[k] = low[j] + slope_l*(period-1-k). upper[i] = max(hPrime[k]); lower[i] = min(lPrime[k]). First period-1 bars null. Helpers: computeLineProjectionBandsSlope, computeLineProjectionBands, classifyLineProjectionBandsZone (above-upper/inside/below-lower/none), runLineProjectionBands, computeLineProjectionBandsLayout, describeLineProjectionBandsChart, getLineProjectionBandsFinitePoints, normalizeLineProjectionBandsPeriod. 70 vitest cases covering: linear-ramp identity (high=low=c+j -> slope=1, hPrime[k] = (c+k+offset) + 1*(period-1-k) = c+i bit-exact -> upper=lower=c+i bit-exact -> for RISING [10..19] period 4: bands = [null*3, 13, 14, ..., 19] bit-exact); FALLING mirror (slope=-1, bands = 19-i bit-exact); CONST_FLAT (slope=0, upper=lower=K bit-exact); integer slope identities ([0,1,2,3]->1, [10,12,14,16]->2, [3,2,1,0]->-1); translation invariance +1000 shifts both bands by exactly 1000 (integer K); upper >= current high and lower <= current low on every series (k=period-1 contributes high[i], low[i]); layout emits two stub segments per defined bar (upper+lower), markers contained in panel; component coverage of legend toggle (hide upper), showLower=false, ARIA, badge, onPointClick, forwardRef. Component renders price line + per-bar upper/lower stub segments, zone-coloured markers, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.741 | UI: chart-line-ulcer-index primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.759 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineUlcerIndex>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Peter Martin Ulcer Index panel. Per bar i (lookback period): for j in [i-period+1..i] -> peak[j] = max(close over [i-period+1..j]); ddPct[j] = 100 * (close[j] - peak[j]) / peak[j]; ulcer[i] = sqrt(mean of ddPct[j]^2). Bounded below by zero. First period-1 bars null; non-finite or non-positive close in the window nulls the bar. Helpers: computeLineUlcerIndex, classifyLineUlcerIndexZone (low/medium/high/none ladder against threshold + 2*threshold), runLineUlcerIndex, computeLineUlcerIndexLayout, describeLineUlcerIndexChart, getLineUlcerIndexFinitePoints, normalizeLineUlcerIndexPeriod, normalizeLineUlcerIndexThreshold. 67 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (close=K -> every drawdown = 0 -> UI = 0 bit-exact); monotone-rising identity (peak[j] = close[j] -> ddPct[j] = 0 -> UI = 0 bit-exact); DRAWDOWN_25 anchor (close=[12,6,12,12] period 4: only j=1 has -50% drawdown, sq=2500, sum/4=625=25^2 -> UI[3] = 25 bit-exact); scaled variant ([4,2,4,4] -> UI=25 bit-exact); scale invariance (*100 leaves UI unchanged via relative drawdowns); non-finite/non-positive close nulls the bar; layout emits one marker per defined bar contained in panel, two non-overlapping panels, ulcerMin=0 exact; component coverage of legend toggle, showUlcer=false, ARIA, badge, onPointClick, forwardRef. | 11.742 | UI: chart-line-relative-vigor primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.760 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineRelativeVigor>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a John Ehlers Relative Vigor Index panel. Per bar i: num_raw = close-open, den_raw = high-low. SWMA(x,i) = (x[i] + 2*x[i-1] + 2*x[i-2] + x[i-3])/6 (1/2/2/1 symmetric weights, divide by 6 cleanly). num_smooth = SWMA(num_raw), den_smooth = SWMA(den_raw). RVI[i] = SMA(num_smooth, period)/SMA(den_smooth, period). Signal[i] = SWMA(RVI). Zero denominator nulls bar. RVI defined at i >= period+2; Signal needs three more bars. Helpers: computeLineRelativeVigorSwma (4-bar 1/2/2/1), computeLineRelativeVigorSma, computeLineRelativeVigor, classifyLineRelativeVigorZone (strong-up/up/flat/down/strong-down/none), runLineRelativeVigor, computeLineRelativeVigorLayout, describeLineRelativeVigorChart, getLineRelativeVigorFinitePoints, normalizeLineRelativeVigorPeriod, normalizeLineRelativeVigorThreshold. 77 vitest cases covering: CONSTANT_UP identity (open=10/close=20/high=20/low=10 -> num=den=10 constant -> SWMA of constant c = (c+2c+2c+c)/6 = 6c/6 = c bit-exact via integer weights -> SMA of constant = c bit-exact -> RVI = 10/10 = 1 bit-exact at every defined bar; signal = 1 too); CONSTANT_DOWN mirror (open=20/close=10 -> RVI = -1 bit-exact); CONST_FLAT (everything = K -> num=den=0 -> denominator below epsilon -> RVI null at every bar); SWMA worked anchor [1,2,3,4] -> (4+2*3+2*2+1)/6 = 15/6 = 2.5 bit-exact; SMA integer-mean anchor [2,4,6,8]/4 = 5 bit-exact; translation invariance +1000 leaves RVI unchanged via zero-mean numerator; component coverage of legend toggle, showSignal=false, ARIA, badge, onPointClick, forwardRef. Component renders top panel close line + bottom panel RVI line + dashed signal line + zone-coloured markers + zero line + +/- threshold dashed lines, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.743 | UI: chart-line-ichimoku-tenkan primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.761 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineIchimokuTenkan>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with an Ichimoku Kinko Hyo Tenkan-sen conversion-line overlay. Per bar i (lookback period, default 9): HH = max(high over [i-period+1..i]); LL = min(low over window); tenkan[i] = (HH + LL) / 2. First period-1 bars null; non-finite high/low in window nulls bar. | 11.745 | UI: chart-line-chande-momentum primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.763 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineChandeMomentum>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Tushar Chande Momentum Oscillator panel. Per bar i (lookback period): for j in [i-period+1..i] -> delta[j] = close[j] - close[j-1]; upSum = sum(max(delta,0)); downSum = sum(max(-delta,0)); CMO[i] = 100 * (upSum - downSum) / (upSum + downSum). Bounded [-100, +100]. First period bars null; zero net move nulls bar. | 11.746 | UI: chart-line-chande-kroll primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.764 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineChandeKroll>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with the Chande-Kroll Stop trailing-stop overlay. Per bar i: TR = max(high-low, abs(high-prevClose), abs(low-prevClose)) (first bar uses high-low); ATR = SMA(TR, atrPeriod); stopHigh = high - mult*ATR; stopLow = low + mult*ATR; longStop = max(stopHigh over stopPeriod window); shortStop = min(stopLow over window). First atrPeriod+stopPeriod-2 bars null on stops. Helpers: computeLineChandeKrollTrueRange, computeLineChandeKrollSma, computeLineChandeKroll, classifyLineChandeKrollZone (above-short/between/below-long/none), runLineChandeKroll, computeLineChandeKrollLayout, describeLineChandeKrollChart, getLineChandeKrollFinitePoints, normalizeLineChandeKrollPeriod, normalizeLineChandeKrollMultiplier. 72 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (high=low=close=K -> TR=0 -> ATR=0 -> both stops = K bit-exact); STEADY_RANGE anchor (high=11, low=9, close=10 -> TR=2 at every bar via high-low dominating -> ATR=2 bit-exact -> longStop=9, shortStop=11 mult=1 bit-exact); wider variant (high=14, low=6, close=10 -> TR=8 -> longStop=6, shortStop=14 bit-exact); multiplier scaling (mult=0 -> stops collapse to high/low; mult=2 -> longStop=7, shortStop=13 bit-exact); TR worked anchor (prev=5, high=10, low=8 -> hl=2, hc=5, lc=3, TR=5 bit-exact); translation invariance +1000 shifts stops by exactly 1000; non-finite OHLC nulls bar; longStop <= shortStop on STEADY_RANGE; layout emits two stub segments per defined bar (long+short); component coverage of legend toggle, showShort=false, ARIA, badge, onPointClick, forwardRef. | 11.747 | UI: chart-line-kaufman-efficiency primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.765 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineKaufmanEfficiency>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Perry Kaufman Efficiency Ratio panel. First period bars null; zero volSum nulls bar. | 11.748 | UI: chart-line-kase-peak primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.766 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineKasePeak>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Cynthia Kase Peak Oscillator panel. KP = difference of two volatility-scaled momentum readings at the two cycle lengths. For each cycle L: mom(L,i) = close[i] - close[i-L]; volAvg(L,i) = mean of abs(close[j]-close[j-1]) over [i-L+1..i]; peakOut(L,i) = mom(L,i) / volAvg(L,i). KP[i] = peakOut(fastLength,i) - peakOut(slowLength,i). Zero volAvg on either leg nulls bar. First max(fast,slow) bars null on KP. Helpers: computeLineKasePeakOut, computeLineKasePeak, classifyLineKasePeakZone (peak-bull/bull/flat/bear/peak-bear/none), runLineKasePeak, computeLineKasePeakLayout, describeLineKasePeakChart, getLineKasePeakFinitePoints, normalizeLineKasePeakLength, normalizeLineKasePeakThreshold. 72 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (close=K -> volAvg=0 -> KP null); monotone-rising identity (close=i+10 -> every delta=+1 -> volAvg(L)=1, mom(L)=L, peakOut(L)=L -> fast=2/slow=4: KP=2-4=-2 bit-exact); monotone-falling identity (peakOut(L)=-L -> KP=+2 bit-exact); antisymmetry KP(RISING) = -KP(FALLING) bit-exact; translation invariance +1000 leaves KP unchanged via delta invariance; scale invariance *100 leaves KP unchanged via ratios; fast==slow -> KP=0 bit-exact; non-finite close nulls bar; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. | 11.749 | UI: chart-line-connors-rsi primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.767 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineConnorsRsi>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Connors RSI panel. CRSI = (RSI(close, lenRsi) + RSI(streak, lenStreak) + PercentRank(returns, lenRank)) / 3. RSI is SMA-Wilder; streak[i] is consecutive up/down count (+k after k ups, -k after k downs, 0 on flat or boundary); PercentRank uses strict-less with denominator = count of valid past returns in window. | 11.751 | UI: chart-line-trix-signal primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.769 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineTrixSignal>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Jack Hutson TRIX + signal panel. | 11.752 | UI: chart-line-adx-trend primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.770 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineAdxTrend>: pure-SVG two-panel chart with a Wilder ADX trend-filter panel (SMA-smoothed variant). Per bar i: upMove = high[i]-high[i-1]; downMove = low[i-1]-low[i]; plusDM = (upMove>downMove && upMove>0) ? upMove : 0; minusDM = mirror; TR = max(high-low, abs(high-prevClose), abs(low-prevClose)). plusS = SMA(plusDM, period); minusS = SMA(minusDM, period); trS = SMA(TR, period). +DI = 100*plusS/trS; -DI = 100*minusS/trS. DX = 100*abs(+DI - -DI)/(+DI + -DI). ADX = SMA(DX, period). Bar null when trS=0 or +DI+-DI=0. Helpers: computeLineAdxTrendSma, computeLineAdxTrend, classifyLineAdxTrendZone (strong/trend/weak/none ladder against threshold and 2*threshold), runLineAdxTrend, computeLineAdxTrendLayout, describeLineAdxTrendChart, getLineAdxTrendFinitePoints, normalizeLineAdxTrendPeriod, normalizeLineAdxTrendThreshold. 66 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (high=low=close=K -> TR=0 -> all DMs=0 -> ADX null at every bar); RISING anchor (high=low=close=i+10, period 4: plusDM=1, minusDM=0, TR=1 -> plusS=1, minusS=0, trS=1 -> +DI=100, -DI=0, DX=100 -> ADX=100 bit-exact once warmed); FALLING mirror (+DI=0, -DI=100, DX=100, ADX=100 bit-exact); ALTERNATING identity (high cycles 10/11, low cycles 9/10 -> steady-state +DI=-DI -> DX=0 -> ADX=0 bit-exact from bar 11+ on 20-bar fixture); translation invariance +1000 leaves ADX unchanged via diff invariance; ADX bounded [0,100] on wave; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders top panel close line + bottom panel ADX line + optional dashed +DI / -DI overlays + zone-coloured markers + zero line + dashed threshold and 2*threshold reference lines, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. Per bar i: upMove = high[i]-high[i-1]; downMove = low[i-1]-low[i]; plusDM = (upMove>downMove && upMove>0) ? upMove : 0; TR = max(high-low, abs(high-prevClose), abs(low-prevClose)). plusS = SMA(plusDM, period); trS = SMA(TR, period). +DI = 100*plusS/trS. Bar null when trS=0. Per bar i: minusDM = (downMove>upMove && downMove>0) ? downMove : 0; TR = max(high-low, abs(high-prevClose), abs(low-prevClose)). minusS = SMA(minusDM, period); trS = SMA(TR, period). -DI = 100*minusS/trS. | 11.755 | UI: chart-line-fisher-stoch primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.773 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineFisherStoch>: pure-SVG two-panel chart applying the inverse hyperbolic tangent (Fisher Transform) to the normalised Stochastic value. Per bar i (lookback period): HH = max(high over window); LL = min(low over window); stochK = (close - LL) / (HH - LL); x = clamp(2*stochK - 1, -CLAMP, +CLAMP) with CLAMP = 0.999; fisher = 0.5 * ln((1+x)/(1-x)) (atanh(x)). Bar null when HH == LL. First period-1 bars null. Helpers: computeLineFisherStoch, clampLineFisherStoch, classifyLineFisherStochZone (peak-bull/bull/flat/bear/peak-bear/none), runLineFisherStoch, computeLineFisherStochLayout, describeLineFisherStochChart, getLineFisherStochFinitePoints, normalizeLineFisherStochPeriod, normalizeLineFisherStochThreshold. 67 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (high==low -> HH==LL -> bar null); AT_MIDPOINT anchor (high=12, low=8, close=10 -> stochK = (10-8)/(12-8) = 0.5 bit-exact dyadic -> x=0 -> atanh(0)=0 -> fisher = 0 bit-exact); AT_HIGH (stochK=1 -> x=+CLAMP -> fisher>0); AT_LOW (stochK=0 -> x=-CLAMP -> fisher<0) with antisymmetric magnitude (toBeCloseTo 10dp); clamp bit-exact at +/-CLAMP; translation invariance +1000 leaves stochK / fisher unchanged via (close+k-LL-k)/(HH+k-LL-k) = stochK; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders top panel close line + bottom panel Fisher Stochastic line + zone-coloured markers + zero line + dashed +/- threshold reference lines, arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.756 | UI: chart-line-tilson-ma primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.774 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineTilsonMa>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with a Tillson T3 moving-average overlay. Cascades six EMAs of close, then recombines the last four with volume-factor-weighted coefficients: c1=-a^3, c2=3a^2+3a^3, c3=-3a-6a^2-3a^3, c4=1+3a+3a^2+a^3 (sum=1 algebraically). T3 = c1*EMA6 + c2*EMA5 + c3*EMA4 + c4*EMA3. EMAs seed at EMA[0]=input[0] with alpha=2/(length+1). Helpers: computeLineTilsonMaEma, computeLineTilsonMaCoefficients, computeLineTilsonMa, classifyLineTilsonMaZone (above/at/below/none), runLineTilsonMa, computeLineTilsonMaLayout, describeLineTilsonMaChart, getLineTilsonMaFinitePoints, normalizeLineTilsonMaPeriod, normalizeLineTilsonMaVolumeFactor. 65 vitest cases covering: EMA-of-constant lemma (EMA of constant = constant bit-exact); coefficient anchors (a=0 -> {0,0,0,1}; a=1 -> {-1,6,-12,8} integer sum 1; a=0.5 -> {-0.125, 1.125, -3.375, 3.375} bit-exact dyadic); CONST_FLAT a=0 anchor (T3 = EMA3 = K bit-exact at every bar); CONST_FLAT a=1 anchor (T3 = K bit-exact via integer coefficients summing to 1); default a=0.7 close to K (toBeCloseTo 10dp); translation invariance +1000 shifts T3 by exactly 1000 (toBeCloseTo 10dp); RISING/FALLING T3 trends with close; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders price line + T3 line + zone-coloured markers (above/at/below the T3), arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.757 | UI: chart-line-jurik-ma primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.775 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineJurikMa>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with a Jurik moving-average overlay (simplified open-source formulation). Three coupled recurrences with adaptive lag-reduction parameterisation: beta = 0.45*(length-1)/(0.45*(length-1)+2); alpha = beta^power; phaseRatio = phase/100 + 1.5. Per bar i >= 1: e0 = (1-alpha)*close + alpha*e0[prev]; e1 = (close-e0)*(1-beta) + beta*e1[prev]; e2 = (e0 + phaseRatio*e1 - jma[prev])*(1-alpha)^2 + alpha^2*e2[prev]; jma = jma[prev] + e2. Seeds at i=0: e0=close[0], e1=0, e2=0, jma=close[0]. Helpers: computeLineJurikMa, classifyLineJurikMaZone (above/at/below/none), runLineJurikMa, computeLineJurikMaLayout, describeLineJurikMaChart, getLineJurikMaFinitePoints, normalizeLineJurikMaLength, normalizeLineJurikMaPhase, normalizeLineJurikMaPower. 63 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (close=K -> e0=K, e1=0, e2=0 stationary fixed point -> JMA=K bit-exact at every bar) for any (length, phase, power) triple -- tested with (2,-100,1), (50,0,2), (200,100,4), (7,50,3); CONST_FLAT_HIGH close=1000 same identity bit-exact; first-bar seed JMA[0]=close[0] bit-exact; translation invariance +1000 shifts JMA by exactly 1000 (toBeCloseTo 10dp); RISING/FALLING JMA trends with close; non-finite close nulls bar and resets recurrence; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders price line + JMA line + zone-coloured markers (above/at/below the JMA), arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.758 | UI: chart-line-tema-cross primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.776 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineTemaCross>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with a Triple-EMA fast-over-slow crossover overlay. Per lookback L: ema1=EMA(close,L); ema2=EMA(ema1,L); ema3=EMA(ema2,L); TEMA = 3*ema1 - 3*ema2 + ema3 (integer coefficients 3,-3,1 sum to 1 exactly). Crosses: upCross at fast[i-1]<=slow[i-1] && fast[i]>slow[i]; downCross mirrored. Helpers: computeLineTemaCrossEma, computeLineTemaCrossTema, classifyLineTemaCrossZone (up-cross/down-cross/above/below/at/none), runLineTemaCross, computeLineTemaCrossLayout, describeLineTemaCrossChart, getLineTemaCrossFinitePoints, normalizeLineTemaCrossLength. 60 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (close=K -> ema1=ema2=ema3=K -> TEMA = 3K - 3K + K = K bit-exact at every bar via integer coefficient cancellation; holds at any length); CONST_FLAT_HIGH close=1000 same identity bit-exact; first-bar seed (TEMA[0] = close[0] bit-exact); translation invariance +1000 shifts TEMA by 1000 (toBeCloseTo 10dp); CONST_FLAT records zero crosses (fast==slow at every bar -> "at" zone); PIVOT fixture (20 rising + 20 falling bars) triggers at least one down-cross post-pivot; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders price line + fast TEMA line + slow TEMA line + cross markers (up-cross/down-cross only), arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. | 11.759 | UI: chart-line-wma-cross primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.777 (2026-05-26). <ChartLineWmaCross>: pure-SVG single-panel chart with a Weighted-MA fast-over-slow crossover overlay. Per lookback L: WMA[i] = sum_{j=1..L} j*close[i-L+j] / sum_{j=1..L} j (recent bar weight L, oldest weight 1). Crosses: upCross at fast[i-1]<=slow[i-1] && fast[i]>slow[i]; downCross mirrored. Helpers: computeLineWmaCrossWma, classifyLineWmaCrossZone (up-cross/down-cross/above/below/at/none), runLineWmaCross, computeLineWmaCrossLayout, describeLineWmaCrossChart, getLineWmaCrossFinitePoints, normalizeLineWmaCrossLength. 61 vitest cases covering: CONST_FLAT identity (close=K -> weighted mean of K's = K bit-exact at every defined bar, at any length); CONST_FLAT_HIGH (K=1000) same identity bit-exact; worked anchor close=[0,1,2,3] period 4 -> (1*0+2*1+3*2+4*3)/10 = 20/10 = 2 bit-exact; RISING_INT identity (close=i+10 period 4 -> WMA[i]=i+9 bit-exact via closed-form c + 2*(L-1)/3 reducing to c+2 exactly for L=4); period-2 worked anchor (10+24)/3 = 34/3 bit-exact rational; translation invariance +1000 shifts WMA by exactly 1000; CONST_FLAT records zero crosses; PIVOT fixture (20 rising + 20 falling bars) triggers at least one cross; layout / component / ARIA / data-section hooks all covered. Component renders price line + fast WMA line + slow WMA line + cross markers (up-cross/down-cross only), arps tokens, role=region/img/graphics-symbol, data-section hooks. Seeds `ss[0]=close[0]`, `ss[1]=close[1]`. Bit-exact CONST_FLAT anchor at K=0; numerically exact stationary state at any K. 98 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). | 11.761 | UI: chart-line-center-of-gravity primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.779 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-center-of-gravity.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Ehlers CG oscillator `CG = -sum((1+j)*close[i-j]) / sum(close[i-j]) + (L+1)/2` over length-bar window. Shift cancels exactly for constant close -> CG=0 bit-exact at any non-zero K (verified K=1,2,7,100,-5 across L=4,10,14). Worked anchors `[1,2,3,4] L=4 -> 0.5` and `[4,3,2,1] L=4 -> -0.5`, antisymmetry, scaling invariance, zero-sum singular window -> null. | 11.762 | UI: chart-line-laguerre-poly primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.780 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-laguerre-poly.tsx pure-SVG single-panel chart with Ehlers Laguerre four-stage cascaded gamma filter `L0=(1-g)c+gL0`, `Lk=-gL_{k-1}+L_{k-1}[i-1]+gLk[i-1]`, `Laguerre=(L0+2L1+2L2+L3)/6`. Seeds L0=L1=L2=L3=close[0]. Anchors: K=0 with any gamma -> 0 bit-exact (verified gamma in {0.1,0.5,0.7,0.8,0.9,0.99}); gamma=0 collapses to (1,2,2,1)/6 weighted average over 4 delayed bars (worked anchor `[10,20,30,40,50] -> Lag[3]=25, Lag[4]=35` bit-exact); gamma=1 freezes cascade at seed; weight sum (1+2+2+1)/6 = 1 IEEE 754 exact. 97 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.763 | UI: chart-line-ad-line primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.781 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-ad-line.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Chaikin AD line `CLV = ((close-low)-(high-close))/(high-low)`, `AD[i] = AD[i-1] + CLV*volume`. Bit-exact anchors: close-at-high -> CLV=1 (5 bars at vol=100 -> 100,200,300,400,500), close-at-low -> CLV=-1, close-at-midpoint -> CLV=0, flat bar (high==low) -> 0 flow, zero-volume -> 0 flow. | 11.764 | UI: chart-line-delta-volume primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.782 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-delta-volume.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Delta Volume oscillator beneath close. Each bar signed by close direction: `sign[i]=sgn(close[i]-close[i-1])`, `delta[i]=sign[i]*volume[i]`. Bit-exact anchors: rising -> +volume, falling -> -volume, unchanged -> 0, seed bar -> 0. Verified rising(5) yields `0,+100,+100,+100,+100` and falling(5) yields `0,-100,-100,-100,-100`. Antisymmetry, scaling, zigzag alternating, and sum-of-deltas `300-100=200` all bit-exact. Dual panel: price on top, delta volume below with zero baseline. 95 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |

Bit-exact anchors: prev`{o:2,h:4,l:2,c:2}` + curr`{o:2,h:4,l:2,c:4}` T=1 -> SI=150 exact; K=0 -> SI=0 exact; T=2 halves to 75; case-B `prev{10,10,10,10}+curr{10,9,2,2}` -> SI=-640 exact; ALL_FLAT (singular R=0) -> null; seed bar -> null. Bit-exact anchors: close-at-high -> CMF=+1 (verified 80 combos `(range,vol,L) in {1,2,5,10,100}x{1,50,100,1000}x{5,14,20,30}`), close-at-low -> CMF=-1, close-at-midpoint -> CMF=0, flat bar (h==l) -> CMF=0, zero-volume window -> null, mixed equal-counts -> CMF=0. | 11.770 | UI: chart-line-chaikin-volatility primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.788 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-chaikin-volatility.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Chaikin Volatility `range = high - low`, `ema = EMA(range, n)`, `CV = 100*(ema[i] - ema[i-n])/ema[i-n]`. Default n=10. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_HL (range=K, K!=0) -> both EMAs drift identically -> ratio = 1 exact -> CV=0 bit-exact past warmup `2*n`. Verified `(range, length) in {1,2,5,10,100}x{3,5,10,14,20}` (25 combos). FLAT_HL (range=0) -> ema=0 -> null at every bar. Expanding range -> positive CV, contracting -> negative CV. Translation invariance under uniform HL shift. Dual panel: price on top, CV below with zero baseline. 92 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.771 | UI: chart-line-elder-thermometer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.789 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-elder-thermometer.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Elder Market Thermometer `thermo = max(|h - priorH|, |l - priorL|)`. Seed bar -> null. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_HL -> thermo=0; rising-by-S yields thermo=S exact (verified S in {0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10, 100}); falling-by-S same (|.| cancels sign); worked asymmetric `(10,8) -> (15,8.5) -> (15.5,2)` yields thermo=5, 6.5 exact; antisymmetry; translation invariance under uniform HL shift; thermo >= 0 always. Hot-threshold classification with default 2. | 11.772 | UI: chart-line-ehlers-dominant-cycle primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.790 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-ehlers-dominant-cycle.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Ehlers Dominant Cycle. 6-tap Hilbert FIR with coefficients `(0.0962, 0, 0.5769, 0, -0.5769, 0, -0.0962)` over close yields detrender; In-phase = detrender[i-3], Quadrature = FIR of detrender; `phase = atan2(Q, I)`, `period = 2*pi / unwrap(dPhase)` clamped to `[minPeriod, maxPeriod]` (defaults 6, 50). Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT -> FIR ~ 0 (within ULPs); both |I|, |Q| < PHASE_EPSILON=1e-10 -> phase undefined -> period=maxPeriod exact. Verified 24 combos `(K, maxP) in {0,1,5,10,100,-3} x {25,40,50,100}`. K=0 -> FIR bit-exact 0. Period stays in `[minP, maxP]` for any input. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.773 | UI: chart-line-hilbert-cycle primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.791 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-hilbert-cycle.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Hilbert Transform cycle. 6-tap Hilbert FIR (Ehlers coefficients `0.0962, 0.5769`) over close yields detrender; In-Phase = detrender[i-3]; Quadrature = FIR over detrender; both SMA-smoothed over smoothLength (default 4). cycle = smoothed Q. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT K=0 -> FIR=0 -> Q=0 -> cycle=0 exact past warmup `11+smoothLength` (verified smoothLength in {1,2,4,6,10}); K!=0 -> cycle ~ 0 to numerical tolerance (12 dp); InPhase exposed as secondary togglable series. Dual panel: price on top, cycle below with zero baseline. 93 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation, sinusoid sanity). | 11.774 | UI: chart-line-cycle-period primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.792 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-cycle-period.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Cycle Period. `detrended = close - SMA(close, smoothLength)`; strict zero-crossing count over lookback window yields period `2*lookback/crossings` clamped to `[minP, maxP]`. Defaults: lookback=30, smoothLength=4, range `[2, 50]`. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT -> detrended=0 -> no crossings -> period=maxPeriod exact past warmup `lookback+smoothLength-1`. Verified 54 combos `(K, lookback, maxP) in {0,1,5,10,100,-3} x {20,30,40} x {25,50,100}`. Rising trend -> constant lag detrended -> no crossings -> maxPeriod. Sinusoid of period P -> in-band reading. Period stays in `[minP, maxP]`. Invalid `maxP <= minP` -> bumped to `minP+1`. Dual panel: price on top, period below with short/long band lines. 97 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation, sinusoid sanity). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.775 | UI: chart-line-sinewave-trend primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.793 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-sinewave-trend.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Ehlers Sinewave Trend. 6-tap Hilbert FIR detrender; In-Phase = detrender[i-3]; Quadrature = FIR of detrender; `phase = atan2(Q, I)`, `sine = sin(phase)`, `leadSine = sin(phase + pi/4)`. Two oscillator lines in bottom panel for early reversal signals: leadSine crossing above sine -> turn up, below -> turn down. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT (close=K) -> FIR ~ 0 (within ULPs); both |I|, |Q| < PHASE_EPSILON=1e-10 -> phase undefined -> sine, leadSine = null past warmup. Verified K in {0,1,5,10,100,-3,0.5}. Both lines bounded in `[-1, +1]` by construction. Dual panel: price on top, sine/leadSine below on `[-1, +1]` axis with zero baseline. 81 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation, sinusoid sanity). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.776 | UI: chart-line-trend-quality primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.794 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-trend-quality.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Trend Quality Index (Kaufman Efficiency Ratio x 100). `netChange = close[i] - close[i-n]`, `sumAbs = sum(|close[j] - close[j-1]|)` over n bars, `TQI = 100 * netChange / sumAbs`. Bounded in `[-100, +100]` by triangle inequality. Lookback default 14, strong threshold default 70. Bit-exact anchors: RISING_BY_S (S>0) -> TQI=+100 across 35 combos `(S, lookback) in {1,2,5,10,100,0.5,0.25} x {3,5,7,14,20}`; FALLING_BY_S -> TQI=-100 same combos; CONST_FLAT -> null (singular sumAbs=0); V-shape (rise then fall to same level) -> TQI=0; worked `[5,10,5] lookback 2 -> TQI=0`. Strong-up/weak/strong-down zone classification. Dual panel: price on top, TQI below on fixed `[-100, +100]` axis with zero baseline and strong bands. 94 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation, zigzag/V-shape sanity). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.777 | UI: chart-line-tsi-signal primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.795 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-tsi-signal.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Blau True Strength Index + signal. `mom = close[i]-close[i-1]`, `TSI = 100*EMA(EMA(mom, long), short)/EMA(EMA(|mom|, long), short)`, `Signal = EMA(TSI, signalLength)`. Defaults: long=25, short=13, signal=13, overbought=+25, oversold=-25. Bit-exact anchors: RISING_BY_S (S>0) -> TSI=+100 (mom and |mom| chain through identical EMA -> ratio = 1 exact); FALLING_BY_S -> TSI=-100; CONST_FLAT -> null (singular). Verified S in {0.25,0.5,1,2,5,10,100}. Signal of constant ±100 settles to ±100 bit-exact. TSI bounded `[-100, +100]`. Dual panel: price on top, TSI/signal below on fixed `[-100, +100]` axis with zero baseline and overbought/oversold bands. 99 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.778 | UI: chart-line-stoch-signal primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.796 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-stoch-signal.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Stochastic Oscillator (%K) + SMA signal line (%D). `%K = 100*(close - lowest) / (highest - lowest)` over kPeriod bars, `%D = SMA(%K, dPeriod)`. Defaults: kPeriod=14, dPeriod=3, overbought=80, oversold=20. Bit-exact anchors: close-at-high -> %K=100 and %D=100 (verified 20 combos `(range, kPeriod) in {1,2,5,10,100} x {5,7,14,21}`); close-at-low -> %K=0 and %D=0 same combos; close-at-midpoint -> %K=50 and %D=50 across dyadic ranges `{2,4,8,16}` x kPeriod `{5,7,14,21}`. CONST_HL -> null (singular HH=LL). %K bounded `[0, 100]`. Dual panel: price on top, %K/%D below on fixed `[0, 100]` axis with overbought/oversold bands. 94 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |

Defaults: lookback=30, smoothLength=4, highThreshold=5, lowThreshold=1. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT -> detrended=0 -> amplitude=0 (verified 72 combos `(K, lookback, smoothLength) in {0,1,5,10,100,-3} x {10,20,30,40} x {2,4,6}`); RISING_BY_S -> SMA settles to constant lag -> detrended=const -> amplitude=0 (verified 20 combos `(S, lookback) in {1,2,5,10,0.5} x {10,20,30,40}`); FALLING_BY_S symmetric -> amplitude=0; non-negative; translation invariance; sinusoid amplitude A -> peak-to-trough <= 2A. | 11.780 | UI: chart-line-bb-percent-b primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.798 -- web/src/components/ui/chart-line-bb-percent-b.tsx pure-SVG dual-panel chart with Bollinger Bands %B. `middle=SMA(close, length)`, `std=sqrt(sum((close-middle)^2)/length)`, `upper=middle+numStd*std`, `lower=middle-numStd*std`, `%B=(close-lower)/(upper-lower)`. Population stdev (Bollinger original). Defaults: length=20, numStd=2. Bit-exact anchors: `[10,12] length=2 numStd=1` -> %B=1 (close=upper); `[12,10] length=2 numStd=1` -> %B=0 (close=lower); alternating `[10,12,...]` cycles `1,0,1,0,...` exact; CONST_FLAT -> std=0 -> null. Translation invariance. Zone classifier: above-upper / above-mid / below-mid / below-lower. Dual panel: price on top, %B below with bands at 0/0.5/1. 88 vitest cases (helpers, layout, ARIA region, legend toggle, tooltip, Enter/Space keyboard activation). Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto merged. |
| 11.781 | UI: chart-line-kc-percent-k primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.799 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineKcPercentK>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive with close on the top panel and a Keltner Channel %K oscillator on the bottom panel. Formula: middle = EMA(close, length); TR = max(high-low, |high-prevClose|, |low-prevClose|); ATR = SMA(TR, length); upper = middle + multiplier*ATR; lower = middle - multiplier*ATR; %K = (close - lower) / (upper - lower). Defaults length=20, multiplier=2. CONST_FLAT (high=low=close=K) -> ATR=0 -> %K=null (singular). Bit-exact anchor: CONST_MID (high=K+r, low=K-r, close=K) yields %K = 4r/8r = 0.5 across (r, length, multiplier) sweeps because EMA(K)=K and ATR=2r. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula and channel-position interpretation; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers / dots / tooltip with close + H/L + %K + zone, config badge, animate flag, upper / mid / lower band guides. 92 vitest cases (finite coercion, length/multiplier normalization, EMA + SMA helpers, computeLineKcPercentK warmup nulls + CONST_MID + CONST_FLAT + translation invariance + non-mutation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweep). | 11.782 | UI: chart-line-vortex-vi-plus primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.800 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineVortexViPlus>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive with close on top and a Vortex Indicator +VI oscillator beneath. Formula: VM+[i] = |high[i] - low[i-1]| (null at bar 0); TR[i] = max(h-l, |h-prevC|, |l-prevC|); +VI[i] = sum(VM+, length) / sum(TR, length). Default length=14. Warmup is `length` bars because the sum window must lie within bars where VM+ is defined (i >= 1). CONST_FLAT (h=l=c) -> sum(TR)=0 -> +VI=null. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_BAR (constant H/L/C with L <= C <= H) -> VM+ = H-L and TR = H-L at every i >= 1, so +VI = length*(H-L) / length*(H-L) = 1 exact. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula and unity-crossing interpretation; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers / dots / tooltip with close + H/L + +VI + zone, unity reference line, config badge. 97 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, VM and TR helpers, rolling sum, computeLineVortexViPlus warmup + CONST_BAR + CONST_FLAT + non-mutation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweep). | 11.783 | UI: chart-line-vortex-vi-minus primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.801 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineVortexViMinus>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive companion to `<ChartLineVortexViPlus>` (11.782/v1.11.800). Close on top, Vortex -VI oscillator beneath. Formula: VM-[i] = |low[i] - high[i-1]| (null at bar 0); TR[i] = max(h-l, |h-prevC|, |l-prevC|); -VI[i] = sum(VM-, length) / sum(TR, length). Default length=14. Warmup is `length` bars because the sum window must lie within bars where VM- is defined (i >= 1). CONST_FLAT (h=l=c) -> sum(TR)=0 -> -VI=null. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_BAR (constant H/L/C with L <= C <= H) -> VM- = |L-H| = H-L and TR = H-L at every i >= 1, so -VI = length*(H-L) / length*(H-L) = 1 exact. Difference from +VI: VM+ uses |high - prevLow| (upward movement), VM- uses |low - prevHigh| (downward); they diverge under bar-to-bar gaps. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula and unity-crossing interpretation; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers / dots / tooltip with close + H/L + -VI + zone, unity reference line, config badge. 97 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, VM and TR helpers, rolling sum, computeLineVortexViMinus warmup + CONST_BAR + CONST_FLAT + non-mutation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweep). | 11.784 | UI: chart-line-donchian-mid primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.802 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineDonchianMid>` -- pure-SVG **single-panel** React primitive (a departure from the recent dual-panel oscillators) that overlays the Donchian Channel midline on the close. Formula: upper = max(high, length); lower = min(low, length); middle = (upper + lower) / 2. Default length=20. Bars 0..length-2 are warmup nulls. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT (h=l=c=K) -> middle = K exactly (midline coincides with close); CONST_BAR (constant H, L with close = (H+L)/2) -> middle = (H+L)/2 = close exactly (bar classifies as `at`); ramped highs/lows -> middle = i - 2 integer arithmetic check. Component renders close + midline + upper/lower channel lines (dashed) + optional filled channel polygon; all four series toggle via legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden). | 11.785 | UI: chart-line-donchian-width primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.803 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineDonchianWidth>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive companion to `<ChartLineDonchianMid>` (11.784). Top panel plots close; bottom panel plots Donchian channel width as a volatility proxy. Formula: upper = max(high, length); lower = min(low, length); width = upper - lower (non-negative). Default length=20. Bars 0..length-2 are warmup nulls. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT (h=l=c=K) -> width = K-K = 0 exactly; CONST_BAR (constant H, L including negative L) -> width = H-L exactly (integer arithmetic, no FP drift); ramped highs/lows (high = i + 2, low = i - 2, length 5) -> width = 8 constant. Zone classifier buckets width by ratio to maxSeen: wide >= 75%, normal 25-75%, narrow < 25%, flat = 0, none = null (with sane fallback when maxSeen = 0). | 11.786 | UI: chart-line-bb-width primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.804 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineBbWidth>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Bollinger Band Width on bottom as a volatility proxy. Formula: middle = SMA(close, length); stdDev = sqrt(sum((close-middle)^2)/length) (population); upper = middle + numStdDev*stdDev; lower = middle - numStdDev*stdDev; width = (upper-lower)/middle * 100. Defaults: length=20, numStdDev=2. Bars 0..length-2 are warmup nulls. middle=0 -> width=null (divide-by-zero guard). -0 from 0/negative_middle normalized to +0 so bit-exact anchor holds for negative K. Bit-exact anchor: CONST close (K != 0) -> stdDev = 0 -> width = 0 exactly past warmup; integration sweep verifies across positive/negative K, length in {3,5,7,14,20}, numStdDev in {1,2,3}. CONST close = 0 is singular -> all-null width. Zone classifier mirrors Donchian width (wide >= 75%, normal 25-75%, narrow < 25%, flat = 0, none = null) with sane fallback when maxSeen = 0. | 11.789 | UI: chart-line-momentum-roc primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.807 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineMomentumRoc>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Rate-of-Change (ROC) momentum oscillator on bottom. Formula: ROC[i] = (close[i] - close[i-length]) / close[i-length] * 100. Default length=10. Bars before i = length are warmup nulls. close[i-length] = 0 -> ROC = null (divide-by-zero guard). -0 from 0/negative_K normalized to +0 so bit-exact anchor holds for negative K. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K != 0) -> numerator = 0 -> ROC = 0 exactly across positive/negative K and several lengths; GEOMETRIC close = 2^i -> ROC = (2^length - 1)*100 exactly (powers of 2 stay exact in IEEE 754) for length in {2,3,4,5}. CONST close = 0 is singular -> all-null ROC. Zone classifier (strong-up >= 10 / above 0..10 / at == 0 / below -10..0 / strong-down <= -10 / none). | 11.790 | UI: chart-line-elder-force primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.808 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineElderForce>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Elder Force Index (EFI) oscillator on bottom. Formula: raw[i] = (close[i] - close[i-1]) * volume[i] for i >= 1 (null at bar 0); EFI[i] = EMA(raw, length)[i]. Default length=13 (Elder's classic period). EMA seeds at first finite raw (bar 1). -0 from 0 * negative_volume normalized to +0. Bit-exact anchor: CONST close (any K) -> every (close - prevClose) = 0 -> raw = 0 regardless of volume sign or magnitude -> EFI = EMA(0) = 0 exactly past bar 0. Integration sweep verifies across many K (including 0 and negatives), V (including 0 and negatives), and length in {3,5,7,13,20}. Zone classifier buckets by ratio to maxAbs (strong-up >= 50% / above 0..50% / at == 0 / below -50..0 / strong-down <= -50% / none) with sane fallback when efiAbsMaxSeen = 0. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + volume + EFI + zone, zero baseline dashed reference, config badge. 91 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, EMA helper, computeLineElderForceRaw null at bar 0 + CONST close raw=0 + zero volume + negative volume -0 normalization, computeLineElderForce CONST anchor + non-mutation + NaN length + ramp nonzero, zone classifier incl. efiAbsMaxSeen=0 fallback, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps).
