| 11.791 | UI: chart-line-pivot-camarilla primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.809 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLinePivotCamarilla>` -- pure-SVG single-panel React primitive overlaying Camarilla pivot levels on the close. For each bar levels are derived from the **prior** bar's H, L, C: pivot = (H+L+C)/3; R_n = C + (H-L)*1.1/k_n; S_n = C - (H-L)*1.1/k_n where k_1=12, k_2=6, k_3=4, k_4=2. Bar 0 has no prior bar -> all levels null. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT (H=L=C=K) -> prior range = 0 -> every R/S offset vanishes -> pivot = R1 = R2 = R3 = R4 = S1 = S2 = S3 = S4 = K exactly past bar 0. Integration sweep verifies across K in {0, 1, 5, 100, -3, 7, -50}. Non-flat CONST_BAR levels use toBeCloseTo (1e-9) due to non-dyadic 1.1 factor; algebraic identity R_n - C == -(S_n - C) also verified. Zone classifier: breakout-up / above-pivot / at-pivot / below-pivot / breakout-down / none with sane fallback for zero-width stack (R4 == pivot == S4 -> classify by pivot vs close only). Renders close + pivot + four R lines (R1-R4 dashed) + four S lines (S1-S4 dashed); ten series toggle independently via legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden); showResistance / showSupport group-toggle bundles. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; markers respond to click + Enter + Space; tooltip surfaces close + H/L + pivot + R1/R2 + R3/R4 + S1/S2 + S3/S4 + zone. 77 vitest cases (finite coercion, computeLinePivotCamarilla bar 0 null + CONST_FLAT bit-exact + CONST_BAR offsets + R/S symmetry + non-mutation + non-finite prior, zone classifier incl. zero-width fallback, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.792 | UI: chart-line-stiffness-indicator primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.810 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineStiffnessIndicator>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Markos Katsanos Stiffness Indicator on bottom. Formula: middle = SMA(close, length); stdDev = sqrt(sum((close-middle)^2)/length) population; threshold = middle - stiffnessFactor*stdDev; above[i] = 1 if close[i] >= threshold[i] else 0; stiffness[i] = sum(above, length)/length * 100. Defaults: length=20, stiffnessFactor=0.2. Warmup is 2*length-2 bars (count window needs `length` valid above samples; above needs `length` close samples for SMA/stdev). Bit-exact anchor: CONST close (any K) -> stdDev = 0 -> threshold = K -> close >= K always true -> every above = 1 -> stiffness = 100 exactly. Integration sweep verifies across K in {0, 1, 5, 100, -3, 7, -50}, length in {3, 5, 7, 10}, factor in {0, 0.2, 0.5, 1}. Factor independence demonstrates volatility band cannot leak when close is flat. Zone classifier (rigid >= 75 / firm 50..75 / soft 25..50 / fluid < 25 / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + stiffness + zone, mid-line baseline at 50%, config badge. 87 vitest cases (finite coercion, length/factor normalization, SMA + population stdev helpers, computeLineStiffnessIndicator warmup + CONST close 100 + factor independence + non-mutation + NaN length + mid-band oscillation, zone classifier, run, layout incl. fixed [0,100] axis + mid baseline + marker count + single-point graceful, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.793 | UI: chart-line-volatility-quality primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.811 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineVolatilityQuality>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Volatility Quality Index (VQI) oscillator on bottom. VQI compares EMA-smoothed true range to rolling ATR: TR = max(h-l, |h-prevC|, |l-prevC|); ATR = SMA(TR, length); EMA_TR = EMA(TR, length); VQI = EMA_TR / ATR. Default length=14. Warmup is length-1 bars (ATR SMA needs length TR samples). ATR=0 (CONST_FLAT singular) -> VQI=null. -0 normalized to +0 defensively. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_BAR (constant H, L, C with L <= C <= H) -> every TR = H-L -> EMA_TR = ATR = TR -> VQI = 1. For dyadic TR (powers of 2: TR in {2,4,8}) the EMA-of-constant identity alpha*K + (1-alpha)*K = K holds bit-exact in IEEE 754, so VQI = 1 exactly. For non-dyadic TR (10, 99) EMA drifts at most 1 ULP, ratio still rounds to 1 within 1e-12. CONST_FLAT singular -> all-null VQI. Zone classifier (expanding >= 1.1 / above 1..1.1 / at == 1 / below 0.9..1 / contracting <= 0.9 / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + H/L + VQI + emaTR/ATR + zone, unity reference line, config badge. 91 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, EMA + SMA + TR helpers, computeLineVolatilityQuality warmup + CONST_BAR dyadic bit-exact + CONST_BAR non-dyadic close to 1 + CONST_FLAT all-null + non-mutation + NaN length + VQI positivity, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.794 | UI: chart-line-hl-spread primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.812 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineHlSpread>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and High-Low Spread oscillator on bottom. Spread is per-bar range scaled to percent of close, smoothed by SMA: raw[i] = (high[i] - low[i]) / close[i] * 100; spread[i] = SMA(raw, length)[i]. Default length=14. Bars before i = length - 1 are warmup nulls. close == 0 nulls raw (divide-by-zero guard) and nulls every spread bar whose window includes it. -0 from 0/negative_close normalized to +0. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT (K != 0) -> raw = 0 -> spread = 0 exactly; CONST_FLAT K = 0 singular -> all-null spread; CONST_BAR with dyadic (H-L)/C ratio (e.g. 10/20=0.5, 20/20=1, 5/20=0.25, 8/16=0.5) -> spread bit-exact constant past warmup. Integration sweep verifies across multiple (H, L, C, length) combos. Zone classifier (wide >= 75% / normal 25..75% / narrow < 25% / flat == 0 / none) with sane fallback when spreadMaxSeen = 0. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + H/L + bar spread + smoothed spread + zone, zero baseline dashed reference, config badge. 91 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, raw computation incl. divide-by-zero guard + dyadic, SMA, computeLineHlSpread warmup + CONST_FLAT + CONST_BAR dyadic bit-exact + non-mutation + NaN length + non-negativity, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.795 | UI: chart-line-range-osc primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.813 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineRangeOsc>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Range Oscillator on bottom. Oscillator subtracts long-term EMA of TR from short-term EMA: TR = max(h-l, |h-prevC|, |l-prevC|); shortEMA = EMA(TR, shortLength); longEMA = EMA(TR, longLength); rangeOsc = shortEMA - longEMA. Defaults: shortLength=14, longLength=28. Bars before i = longLength - 1 are warmup nulls so long EMA has seen length samples. -0 normalized to +0. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT (any K) -> every TR = 0 -> both EMAs = 0 -> rangeOsc = 0 exactly; CONST_BAR with dyadic TR (H-L in {2,4,8}) -> EMAs of constant dyadic TR equal TR bit-exact in IEEE 754 (alpha*K + (1-alpha)*K identity holds for dyadic K) -> rangeOsc = TR - TR = 0 exactly. For non-dyadic TR the EMAs drift independently by 1 ULP, ratio close to 0 within 1e-9. Integration sweep validates both. Zone classifier (expanding >= 50% of abs max / above / at / below / contracting <= -50% / none) with sane fallback when absMax = 0 (above/below by sign). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + H/L + short EMA + long EMA + rangeOsc + zone, zero baseline dashed reference, config badge. 89 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, EMA + TR helpers, computeLineRangeOsc warmup + CONST_FLAT + CONST_BAR dyadic bit-exact + CONST_BAR non-dyadic close to 0 + non-mutation + NaN lengths, zone classifier incl. absMax=0 fallback, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.796 | UI: chart-line-cycle-strength primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.814 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineCycleStrength>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Cycle Strength oscillator on bottom. Measures amplitude of the lagged-difference (cycle) component relative to total signal energy: detrended[i] = close[i] - close[i - cycleLag]; cycleEnergy[i] = sum(detrended^2, length); totalEnergy[i] = sum(close^2, length); strength[i] = cycleEnergy[i] / totalEnergy[i]. Default length=14, cycleLag=7. Bars before i = cycleLag + length - 1 are warmup nulls. totalEnergy = 0 (all closes 0 in window) -> strength = null (divide-by-zero guard). Bit-exact anchor: CONST close (any K != 0) -> every detrended = K - K = 0 -> cycleEnergy = 0 -> strength = 0 exactly past warmup, regardless of K sign or magnitude (sum-of-squares is non-negative, positive for K != 0). Integration sweep verifies across K, length, cycleLag combinations. CONST close = 0 is singular -> all-null strength. Zone classifier (cyclic >= 0.5 / mixed 0.1..0.5 / trending < 0.1 / flat == 0 / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + Cycle Strength + zone, mid baseline at 0.5, config badge. 90 vitest cases (finite coercion, length/cycleLag normalization, detrended helper, computeLineCycleStrength warmup + CONST anchor + oscillating positivity + non-mutation + NaN length + null propagation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.797 | UI: chart-line-trend-strength primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.815 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineTrendStrength>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Trend Strength oscillator on bottom. Measures how dominant the linear trend is relative to residual noise: linear regression slope and standard error of residuals over a window of `length` bars, then trendStrength = |slope| / (|slope| + standardError) bounded in [0, 1]. Default length=14. Bars before i = length - 1 are warmup nulls. |slope| + stdErr = 0 (flat constant series) -> strength = null (singular). Bit-exact anchor: PERFECT LINE (close = a*i for integer a != 0) -> least squares fits exactly: slope = a, every residual = 0, stdErr = 0 -> trendStrength = |a|/|a| = 1 bit-exact past warmup. Integer slope and dyadic-friendly half-integer means keep arithmetic exact. Integration sweep verifies across a in {1, 2, 3, -1, -5} and length in {3, 5, 7, 14}. CONST close is singular -> all-null strength. Zone classifier (strong >= 0.75 / firm 0.5..0.75 / soft 0.25..0.5 / choppy < 0.25 / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + slope + stdErr + Trend Strength + zone, mid baseline at 0.5, config badge. 88 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, regression helper, computeLineTrendStrength warmup + PERFECT LINE bit-exact + CONST all-null + non-mutation + NaN length + noise-on-line in (0,1), zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.798 | UI: chart-line-atr-trail primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.816 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineAtrTrail>` -- pure-SVG single-panel React primitive overlaying Chandelier-style long-side ATR trailing stop on the close with monotonic ratchet rule. Formula: TR = max(h-l, |h-prevC|, |l-prevC|); ATR = SMA(TR, length); highest = max(close, length); candidate = highest - multiplier*ATR; trail[i] = max(trail[i-1], candidate[i]). Default length=14, multiplier=2. Bars before i = length - 1 are warmup nulls. Ratchet never lets trail descend. Bit-exact anchors: CONST_FLAT (h=l=c=K) -> TR=0 -> ATR=0 -> trail = K exactly past warmup (trail coincides with close); integration sweep verifies across K (incl. negatives), length, multiplier. CONST_BAR with dyadic TR (H=11, L=9, C=10, mult=2) -> ATR=2 exactly, trail = 10 - 2*2 = 6 exactly. Ratchet rule explicitly verified with V-shaped series and noisy random walk (trail[i] >= trail[i-1] at every valid bar). Zone classifier (breakout = close > trail AND trail rose / above / at / broken / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out formula and ratchet mention; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + H/L + ATR + highest + trail + zone, config badge. 88 vitest cases (finite coercion, length/multiplier normalization, SMA + rolling max + TR helpers, computeLineAtrTrail warmup + CONST_FLAT + CONST_BAR dyadic + ratchet on V-shape + non-mutation + NaN length, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.799 | UI: chart-line-spike-detector primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.817 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineSpikeDetector>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Price Spike Detector on bottom. Z-score of bar-to-bar change: delta[i] = close[i] - close[i-1] (null at bar 0); mean = SMA(delta, length); stdDev = population stdev(delta, length); spike[i] = (delta[i] - mean) / stdDev. Default length=14. Bars before i = length are warmup nulls (delta undefined at bar 0). stdDev = 0 (all deltas identical) -> spike = null (singular). -0 normalized to +0 defensively. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (any K) -> every delta = 0 -> stdDev = 0 -> spike = null everywhere; ALTERNATING close [0,1,0,1,...] with even length -> deltas alternate +/-1, rolling sum over even window = 0, mean = 0, sum of squared residuals = length, stdDev = sqrt(length/length) = 1, so spike = delta = +/-1 bit-exact. Integration sweep verifies across even lengths {4, 6, 10, 14, 20}. Zone classifier (extreme-up >= 3 / spike-up 1.5..3 / normal / at == 0 / spike-down -3..-1.5 / extreme-down <= -3 / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + delta + Z-score + zone, zero baseline dashed reference, config badge. 88 vitest cases (finite coercion, length normalization, delta helper, computeLineSpikeDetector warmup + CONST all-null + ALTERNATING +/-1 bit-exact + non-mutation + NaN length + null propagation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.800 | UI: chart-line-hilbert-instant primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.818 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineHilbertInstant>` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React primitive plotting close on top and Hilbert-Transform-inspired Instantaneous Trendline on bottom. 4-bar WMA-smoothed close minus its lagged value: smoothed[i] = (4*c[i] + 3*c[i-1] + 2*c[i-2] + c[i-3]) / 10 (weights sum to 10); instant[i] = smoothed[i] - smoothed[i - lag]. Default lag=6. Bars before i = 3 + lag are warmup nulls. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (any K) -> smoothed = K exactly (weights/10 = 1) -> instant = 0 exactly past warmup; RAMP close = a*i (integer a != 0) -> smoothed = a*(i-1) bit-exact (10i - 10 is exact integer multiple of 10) -> instant = a*lag bit-exact past warmup. Integration sweeps verify both anchors across many K, a, and lag combinations. Zone classifier (strong-up >= 50% of abs max / up / flat == 0 / down / strong-down <= -50% / none) with abs-max-zero fallback. ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula; legend (controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden), markers/dots/tooltip with close + smoothed + instant + zone, zero baseline dashed reference, config badge. 88 vitest cases (finite coercion, lag normalization, WMA smoothing helper bit-exact, computeLineHilbertInstant warmup + CONST 0 + RAMP a*lag + non-mutation + NaN lag + null propagation, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweeps). | 11.801 | UI: chart-line-alligator primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.819 (2026-05-26). Built `<ChartLineAlligator>` -- pure-SVG single-panel React primitive overlaying Bill Williams' Alligator on the close. Three SMMAs (Wilder smoothing) of median price ((h+l)/2), each shifted forward: jaw = SMMA(median, 13) shifted 8 bars; teeth = SMMA(median, 8) shifted 5 bars; lips = SMMA(median, 5) shifted 3 bars. Configurable periods/shifts. First valid jaw bar at i = jawPeriod + jawShift - 1 = 20. Bit-exact anchor: CONST_FLAT (h=l=K) -> median = K -> SMA seed = K -> SMMA recurrence collapses to (K*(L-1) + K)/L = K*L/L = K bit-exact for any IEEE 754 representable K. After shifting, jaw = teeth = lips = K past warmup. Integration sweep verifies across many K (incl. 0 and negatives). Zone classifier (eating = lines stacked monotonically / awake = stacked with inversion / sleeping = at least two coincide / none). ARIA region + img-role SVG + sr-only description spelling out the formula and parameters; four-series legend (close + jaw + teeth + lips) with controlled + uncontrolled + defaultHidden + per-line show flags; markers/dots/tooltip with close + median + jaw + teeth + lips + state, config badge. 81 vitest cases (finite coercion, period/shift normalization, SMMA helper CONST K bit-exact + seed math, computeLineAlligator CONST_FLAT bit-exact + median math + non-mutation + NaN periods, zone classifier, run, layout, description, React surface, integration sweep). | 11.802 | UI: chart-line-peak-detector primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.820 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLinePeakDetector />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive marking local maxima of close above the rolling `SMA(close, length) + threshFactor * populationStdDev(close, length)` threshold. Top 60% renders the price line; bottom 40% renders a binary 0/1 peak indicator with strict `>` neighbour comparisons (no plateau peaks). Defaults: length=14, threshFactor=1. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close -> threshold=K and strict `>` fails so every valid bar peaks at 0 across (K, length, threshFactor); ALTERNATING [0,1,0,1,...] with threshFactor=0 -> odd bars peak at 1 because 1 > mean=0.5. 79 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.802-ui-chart-line-peak-detector.md`. |
| 11.803 | UI: chart-line-trough-detector primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.821 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineTroughDetector />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive marking local minima of close below the rolling `SMA(close, length) - threshFactor * populationStdDev(close, length)` threshold. Mirror of v1.11.820 peak-detector. Top 60% renders the price line; bottom 40% renders a binary 0/1 trough indicator with strict `<` neighbour comparisons (no plateau troughs). Defaults: length=14, threshFactor=1. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close -> threshold=K and strict `<` fails so every valid bar troughs at 0 across (K, length, threshFactor); ALTERNATING [0,1,0,1,...] with threshFactor=0 -> even-index inner bars trough at 1 because 0 < mean=0.5. 79 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.803-ui-chart-line-trough-detector.md`. |
| 11.804 | UI: chart-line-trend-power primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.822 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineTrendPower />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting rolling OLS regression trend strength = `slope^2 / max(residualVariance, MIN_RESIDUAL_VARIANCE)` where `MIN_RESIDUAL_VARIANCE = 2^-50` is a dyadic floor (so a perfect linear fit yields `slope^2 * 2^50` bit-exact instead of Infinity). Top 60% price line; bottom 40% Trend Power oscillator with dashed `strongThreshold` reference line. Defaults: length=14, strongThreshold=1. Zones: strong-trend / weak-trend / flat / none. Markers fire only on strong-trend bars. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close -> power=0 everywhere across (K, length); LINEAR `close = a*k` -> `power = a^2 * 2^50` (verified `1 -> 2^50`, `2 -> 2^52` for length 4 and 8). 95 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.804-ui-chart-line-trend-power.md`. |
| 11.805 | UI: chart-line-coppock-signal primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.823 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineCoppockSignal />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting `WMA(ROC(longROC) + ROC(shortROC), wmaPeriod)` Coppock curve. Top 60% price line; bottom 40% Coppock signal with dashed zero line + bullish/bearish markers on every zero-line cross. Defaults: longROC=14, shortROC=11, wmaPeriod=10. Zones: positive/negative/zero/none. Cross detector via `detectLineCoppockSignalCrosses`. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K != 0) -> coppock=0 across (K, periods) sweep; ZERO close -> null everywhere (div-by-zero guard); GEOMETRIC `close = 2^k` -> `ROC(L) = (2^L - 1) * 100` constant integer, defaults yield `coppock = 1843000` and 4/2/3 preset yields 1800 (both bit-exact). `-0 -> +0` ROC normalization. 90 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.805-ui-chart-line-coppock-signal.md`. |
| 11.806 | UI: chart-line-hl-mean primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.824 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineHlMean />` -- pure-SVG single-panel React/TS primitive overlaying `SMA((high + low) / 2, length)` on close. Close and mean share the same y-axis; markers fire on close-vs-mean crosses. Defaults: length=14. Zones: above / below / at / none. Bit-exact anchors: CONST `h = l = c = K` -> midpoint = K, SMA = K, close == hlMean -> zone `'at'` at every valid bar across `K in {0, 1, 5, 100, -3}` and `length in {3, 4, 7, 10}`; ASYMMETRIC CONST `h = 10, l = 2, c = 8` -> midpoint = 6, SMA = 6, close = 8 > 6 -> zone `'above'` everywhere (mirror with c = 4 yields `'below'`). 85 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.806-ui-chart-line-hl-mean.md`. |
| 11.807 | UI: chart-line-momentum-divergence primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.825 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineMomentumDivergence />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting `divergence = ROC(close, length) - momentum(close, length)` where ROC is percent change and momentum is absolute change. Top 60% price line; bottom 40% divergence with dashed zero line + bullish/bearish markers on zero-line crosses. Default length=14. Zones: positive/negative/zero/none. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K != 0) -> ROC=0, momentum=0 -> divergence=0 across (K, length) sweep; ZERO close -> null (div-by-zero guard); GEOMETRIC `close = 2^k` exploits unit mismatch -- ROC = `(2^L - 1) * 100` constant while momentum scales `2^(i-L) * (2^L - 1)`, so for L=4 divergence at `i=4` is exactly `1500 - 15 = 1485` and at `i=5` is `1500 - 30 = 1470` (both bit-exact). `-0 -> +0` normalization in ROC and momentum helpers. 88 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.807-ui-chart-line-momentum-divergence.md`. |
| 11.808 | UI: chart-line-coppock-trigger primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.826 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineCoppockTrigger />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting the Coppock Curve with emphasis on zero-line crossings as actionable triggers. Trigger variant of `<ChartLineCoppockSignal />` (11.805) -- same WMA(sumROC) math; visual differences: hard bullish/bearish fill split at zero via user-space `linearGradient` with paired stops at `zeroSplitOffset`, SVG triangle markers (upward bullish, downward bearish), explicit `run.triggers: Array<{ index, x, close, coppock, kind }>` list, `onTriggerClick` callback. Defaults: longROC=14, shortROC=11, wmaPeriod=10, triangleSize=6. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K != 0) -> coppock=0 -> zero triggers across (K, periods) sweep; GEOMETRIC `close = 2^k` -> coppock=1843000 -> zero triggers (stable positive). 88 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.808-ui-chart-line-coppock-trigger.md`. |
| 11.809 | UI: chart-line-adv-decline primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.827 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineAdvDecline />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting the Advance Decline line beneath a market index close. Line is rolling window sum of per-bar net breadth `advances - declines` across the lookback. Input shape `{ x, close, advances, declines }`. Default length=14. Zones: positive/negative/zero/none. Cross detector flags up/down on zero-line transitions; markers render only on cross bars. Bit-exact anchor: CONST `a=A, d=D` -> rolling sum collapses to `(A - D) * length` at every valid bar (integer-exact in IEEE 754); verified across `A in {0, 5, 100}`, `D in {0, 3, 50}`, `length in {3, 4, 7, 10}`. Special cases: `A = D` -> zero zone; `A > D` -> positive; `A < D` -> negative. `-0 -> +0` normalization. 84 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.809-ui-chart-line-adv-decline.md`. |
| 11.810 | UI: chart-line-hl-pct primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.828 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineHlPct />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting the High Low percent of price oscillator beneath the close. Per-bar range scaled to percent of `|midpoint|`, smoothed via rolling SMA: `hlPct = SMA((high - low) / |midpoint| * 100, length)`. Markers fire on `volatilityThreshold` crossings. Defaults: length=14, volatilityThreshold=5. Zones: high/low/flat/none. Bit-exact anchors: CONST `h=l=K` -> raw=0 -> hlPct=0 across (K, length) sweep; CONST h=12,l=8 -> midpoint=10, raw=4/10*100=40, SMA=40 (bit-exact, integer-dyadic); CONST h=11,l=9 -> raw=20; CONST h=l=0 -> raw=null (div-by-zero guard); `Math.abs(midpoint)` keeps raw non-negative for negative midpoints. 93 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.810-ui-chart-line-hl-pct.md`. |
| 11.811 | UI: chart-line-recombining-bb primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.829 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineRecombiningBb />` -- pure-SVG single-panel React/TS primitive overlaying a recombining Bollinger Band envelope on the close. Standard band `mean +/- sigmaScale * stdDev` computed every bar; upper and lower lines collapse to the mean on bars where `close >= fullUpper || close <= fullLower` (band touch trigger). Markers anchor on the mean at recombine bars. Defaults: length=20, sigmaScale=2. Zones: recombine / above-mid / below-mid / at-mid / none. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K) -> mean=K, stdDev=0, band edges collapse to K, `>=` trigger fires every valid bar across (K, length) sweep; ALTERNATING `[0,1,0,1,...]` with length=4, sigma=2 -> mean=0.5, stdDev=0.5, fullUpper=1.5, fullLower=-0.5 (exact dyadics) and no recombines; sigma=0 forces recombine on every valid bar. 71 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.811-ui-chart-line-recombining-bb.md`. |
| 11.812 | UI: chart-line-dynamic-momentum primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.830 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineDynamicMomentum />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive with adaptive-lookback DMI oscillator. Per bar: `shortStd = popStdDev(close, shortVolLength)`, `longStd = SMA(shortStd, longVolLength)`, `ratio = shortStd / longStd` (fallback 1 when longStd=0), `dynLength = clamp(round(baseLength / ratio), minLength, maxLength)`, `dmi = (close[i] - close[i - dynLength]) / close[i - dynLength] * 100`. Defaults: baseLength=14, shortVolLength=5, longVolLength=10, minLength=5, maxLength=30. Zones: positive/negative/zero/none. Markers on zero-line crosses. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close (K != 0) -> ratio fallback to 1, dynLength = baseLength, dmi = 0 across (K) sweep; CONST close = 0 -> dmi = null (div-by-zero guard); dynLength always clamped to [minLength, maxLength]. 72 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.812-ui-chart-line-dynamic-momentum.md`. |
| 11.813 | UI: chart-line-dynamic-rsi primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.831 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineDynamicRsi />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive with adaptive-lookback RSI (same dynLength logic as 11.812). RSI recomputed fresh per bar over adaptive window via SMA smoothing of up/down moves: `rsi = 100 * avgUp / (avgUp + avgDown)` with neutral=50 fallback when both averages are zero. Defaults: baseLength=14, shortVolLength=5, longVolLength=10, minLength=5, maxLength=30, overbought=70, oversold=30. Zones: overbought/oversold/neutral/none. RSI axis fixed at [0, 100]. Markers fire on overbought-entry and oversold-entry. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close -> ups=downs=0 -> rsi=50 across K; MONO UP `close[k] = k + 1` -> rsi=100; MONO DOWN `close[k] = N - k` -> rsi=0 (all bit-exact). 83 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.813-ui-chart-line-dynamic-rsi.md`. |
| 11.814 | UI: chart-line-cum-tick primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.832 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineCumTick />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting the Cumulative Tick oscillator. Each bar contributes `direction = sign(close[i] - close[i-1]) in {-1, 0, +1}`; rolling window sums these across the lookback. Defaults: length=14. Zones: positive/negative/zero/none. Markers fire on zero-line crosses. y-axis seeded at `[-length, +length]`. Bit-exact anchors: CONST -> 0 across (K, length); MONO UP `close[k] = k+1` -> cumTick = +length; MONO DOWN `close[k] = N-k` -> cumTick = -length; ALTERNATING `[10, 11, 10, 11, ...]` with even length -> cumTick = 0. All integer-exact in IEEE 754. 78 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.814-ui-chart-line-cum-tick.md`. |
| 11.815 | UI: chart-line-fractal-bb primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.833 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineFractalBb />` -- pure-SVG single-panel React/TS primitive overlaying a Bollinger Band anchored to fractal pivots (no stdDev). Each bar reseeds upper/lower from highest/lowest fractal pivots confirmed within the lookback window (`windowEnd = i - pivotRadius` enforces no look-ahead). Fractal high at bar k is a strict local max in `high` across `pivotRadius` neighbors each side; mirror for low. Mean = (upper + lower) / 2. Defaults: length=20, pivotRadius=1 (3-bar). Zones: above-upper/below-lower/in-band/at-mid/none. Fractal markers anchored at pivot bars (high red, low green). Bit-exact anchors: CONST input -> strict-inequality fails -> no pivots -> band null everywhere across (K, length) sweep; constructed peak fixture (`highs = [10, 11, 12, 11, 10, 8, 9, 13, 12, 11, 10]`, `lows = [9, 10, 11, 10, 9, 7, 8, 12, 11, 10, 9]`, pivotRadius=1) detects fractal highs at bars 2 (12) and 7 (13), fractal low at bar 5 (7); at bar 8 with length=5 -> upper=13, lower=7, mean=10 (integer-exact). 69 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.815-ui-chart-line-fractal-bb.md`. |
| 11.816 | UI: chart-line-recombining-kc primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.834 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineRecombiningKc />` -- pure-SVG single-panel React/TS primitive overlaying a recombining Keltner Channel envelope on the close. Mirror of 11.811 recombining-bb but with **EMA** replacing SMA and **ATR** replacing standard deviation. Band edges collapse to EMA mean on `close >= fullUpper || close <= fullLower`. Defaults: length=20 (EMA), atrLength=10, multiplier=2. Zones: recombine/above-mid/below-mid/at-mid/none. Bit-exact anchor: CONST `h=l=c=K` -> tr=0, atr=0; EMA of constant is constant via **CONST short-circuit** (`next = v === prev ? v : alpha * v + (1 - alpha) * prev`) -- avoids 1-ULP drift for non-dyadic alpha (e.g. 1/3 at length=5). Band edges collapse to K and `>=` trigger fires every valid bar across (K, length, multiplier) integration sweep. 73 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.816-ui-chart-line-recombining-kc.md`. |
| 11.817 | UI: chart-line-bb-fisher primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.835 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineBbFisher />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting Fisher Transform `atanh(normalized)` over Bollinger Bands. Pipeline: `percentB = (close - lower) / (upper - lower)`, `normalized = clamp(2 * percentB - 1, -clampLimit, +clampLimit)`, `fisher = Math.atanh(normalized)`. Defaults: length=20, sigma=2, clampLimit=0.999, overbought=1.5, oversold=-1.5. Zones: overbought/oversold/neutral/none. Markers on overbought/oversold entries. Bit-exact anchors: CONST close -> band collapses -> percentB=null -> fisher=null everywhere across (K, length) sweep (div-by-zero guard); ALTERNATING `[0,1,0,1,...]` length=4, sigma=2 -> at bar 3: percentB=0.75, normalized=0.5, `fisher = Math.atanh(0.5)` (deterministic library value, asserted `toBe(Math.atanh(0.5))`); mirror at bar 4 yields `fisher = Math.atanh(-0.5)`. 79 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.817-ui-chart-line-bb-fisher.md`. |
| 11.818 | UI: chart-line-atr-multiplier primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.836 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineAtrMultiplier />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting `closeRange(length) / atr(atrLength)` normalized volatility ratio. High ratios = trending; low = chop. Defaults: length=14, atrLength=14, highThreshold=1.5, lowThreshold=0.5. Zones: high/normal/low/flat/none. Markers fire on threshold entries. Bit-exact anchors: CONST `h=l=c=K` -> closeRange=0, atr=0 -> ratio=null via divide-by-zero guard across (K, length) sweep; LINEAR `close = k+1` with h=l=close -> after ATR warmup (`tr[0]=0` falls out of window) atr=1 exactly, rolling closeRange over unit-step `length` bars = `length-1` exactly, so `ratio = (length-1) / 1 = length-1` (integer-exact) for `length in {4, 5, 7, 10}`. 77 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.818-ui-chart-line-atr-multiplier.md`. |
| 11.819 | UI: chart-line-atr-ratio primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.837 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineAtrRatio />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting `shortAtr / longAtr` volatility regime indicator. ratio > 1 = expanding volatility; < 1 = contracting. Defaults: shortLength=5, longLength=20, highThreshold=1.2, lowThreshold=0.8. Zones: expanding/normal/contracting/flat/none. Markers on threshold entries. Bit-exact anchors: CONST `h=l=c=K` -> both ATRs=0 -> ratio=null via div-by-zero guard across (K, sL, lL) sweep; LINEAR `close = k+1` with h=l=close -> `tr[0]=0, tr[i>=1]=1`. Once `tr[0]` falls out of longer window (at `i = longLength`), both ATRs evaluate to 1 exactly so `ratio = 1` (integer-exact) for `(sL, lL) in {(3, 5), (5, 8), (5, 10)}`. 71 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.819-ui-chart-line-atr-ratio.md`. |
| 11.820 | UI: chart-line-stoch-fast primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.838 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineStochFast />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting Fast Stochastic Oscillator (raw `%K`, no SMA smoothing). `%K = (close - lowestLow) / (highestHigh - lowestLow) * 100` in `[0, 100]`. Defaults: length=14, overbought=80, oversold=20. Stoch axis fixed `[0, 100]`. Zones: overbought/oversold/neutral/none. Markers on threshold entries. Bit-exact anchors: CONST `h=l=c=K` -> degenerate window -> %K=null across (K, length) sweep; LINEAR UP `close=k+1` (h=l=close) -> numerator=denominator=length-1 -> %K=100 exactly; LINEAR DOWN `close=N-k` -> close=lowestLow -> %K=0 exactly; ALTERNATING `close=i%2` -> %K alternates 100/0. All integer-exact in IEEE 754. 75 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.820-ui-chart-line-stoch-fast.md`. |
| 11.821 | UI: chart-line-absolute-momentum primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.839 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineAbsoluteMomentum />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting `absMom = |close[i] - close[i - length]|`. Direction-independent magnitude oscillator; both raw (signed) and absMom (magnitude) exposed per sample. Defaults: length=14, strongThreshold=5. Zones: strong/weak/flat/none. Markers on threshold crossings. Bit-exact anchors: CONST (K) -> raw=0, absMom=0 across (K, length) sweep; LINEAR UP `close = k+1` -> raw=length, absMom=length (integer-exact); LINEAR DOWN `close = N-k` -> raw=-length, absMom=length; ALTERNATING `close = i%2` with length=2 -> absMom=0 (same parity), with length=1 -> absMom=1. All integer-exact in IEEE 754. 70 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.821-ui-chart-line-absolute-momentum.md`. |
| 11.822 | UI: chart-line-range-bias primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.840 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineRangeBias />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive plotting per-bar `bias = (close - midpoint) / (high - low)` positional ratio in `[-0.5, +0.5]`. No rolling state. Defaults: highThreshold=0.3, lowThreshold=-0.3. Zones: bullish/bearish/neutral/flat/none. Bias axis fixed `[-0.5, +0.5]`. Bit-exact anchors (dyadic-exact, per-bar): close=high -> bias=0.5 (algebraic identity `((h-l)/2)/(h-l) = 0.5` across (h,l) pairs); close=low -> bias=-0.5; close=midpoint -> bias=0; high=low -> bias=null (div-by-zero guard); h=10,l=2,close=4 -> bias=-0.25 (quarter-position dyadic). 70 vitest cases passing in `vitest run`. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.822-ui-chart-line-range-bias.md`. |
| 11.823 | UI: chart-line-trend-detector primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.841 (2026-05-26): `<ChartLineTrendDetector />` -- pure-SVG dual-panel React/TS primitive comparing SMA slope against threshold to flag uptrend/downtrend/ranging regimes. Markers on regime transitions. Barrel export wired in `web/src/components/ui/index.ts`. See `docs/patches/11.823-ui-chart-line-trend-detector.md`. |
